name: [URGENT] Action Required (via VPP)
subject: Pass the “No Kings Act” NOW!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
There’s only one thing we can do to keep Trump in check...
| Look, Republicans may be in control of the House, Senate, White House, and even Supreme Court...

**_But there’s still _one thing_ we can do to keep Trump in check:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241226_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b) **[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241226_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b)** | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241226_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b)
---
Folks, we _cannot_ safeguard our Democracy if Trump is NEVER held accountable — but thanks to his MAGA Supreme Court picks, he’s practically a KING!

**We can still stop Trump from causing irreparable damage over the next 4 years,_but we must act FAST:_**

**[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED FOR TOP DEMOCRATS: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241226_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b)**
[**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241226_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b)
---
Thank you,

Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18311%2E878179%2EF0Kr5b)
---

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Just a few days before they start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
This campaign started weeks ago because it is critical to be prepared to protect voting rights in the state legislative sessions starting in the new year.
Now they are just days away, and the power grabs have already been underway in states like North Carolina. There's more coming -- in the courts, in other state legislatures, in Congress. We desperately need resources to respond.
Please, folks, time is short and we need everyone to step up and chip in $25 or whatever you can today to make our $50,000 goal to defend voting rights across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_3&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_3&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_3&amount=25]
Team,
This Giving Tuesday we cannot think of a better gift for everyone than protecting our right to vote.
We're not going to lie -- we know things look bleak. Opponents of voting rights had a good Election Day. We're staring down the barrel of more suppressive policies. That's no reason to give up, however, and we can't afford to throw our hands up and obey in advance. Not with the court cases, state bills, new laws, special elections, and so much more on the horizon.
We've set our goal to raise $50,000 from grassroots donors to help mobilize and defend voting rights before state legislative sessions start next year.
Will you chip in $25 or more to help reach our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal before December 31? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_3&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project was founded to expand mail-in ballot access during the pandemic.
When voting rights were threatened in the wake of the 2020 election, we mobilized to fight back against the wave of voter suppression that swept across the country with more than 400 bills in 49 of 50 states.
Since then we've been on the front lines of every battle for our right to vote, from Congressional legislation to court cases to voter registration to voter turnout in the last two elections. We've helped countless voters register, find their polling place, get informed about the issues, and make their ballot count.
Simply put: There's no way we're giving up now. Not for a second. Not ever.
Team -- to accomplish these goals we need everyone with us. Fuel our efforts for Giving Tuesday and more with $25 or whatever you can give today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_3&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_3&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_3&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_3&amount=25]

clean_body: This campaign started weeks ago because it is critical to be prepared to protect voting rights in the state legislative sessions starting in the new year. Now they are just days away, and the power grabs have already been underway in states like North Carolina. There's more coming -- in the courts, in other state legislatures, in Congress. We desperately need resources to respond. Please, folks, time is short and we need everyone to step up and chip in $25 or whatever you can today to make our $50,000 goal to defend voting rights across the country >> [] [] Team, This Giving Tuesday we cannot think of a better gift for everyone than protecting our right to vote. We're not going to lie -- we know things look bleak. Opponents of voting rights had a good Election Day. We're staring down the barrel of more suppressive policies. That's no reason to give up, however, and we can't afford to throw our hands up and obey in advance. Not with the court cases, state bills, new laws, special elections, and so much more on the horizon. We've set our goal to raise $50,000 from grassroots donors to help mobilize and defend voting rights before state legislative sessions start next year. Will you chip in $25 or more to help reach our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal before December 31? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] Voter Action Project was founded to expand mail-in ballot access during the pandemic. When voting rights were threatened in the wake of the 2020 election, we mobilized to fight back against the wave of voter suppression that swept across the country with more than 400 bills in 49 of 50 states. Since then we've been on the front lines of every battle for our right to vote, from Congressional legislation to court cases to voter registration to voter turnout in the last two elections. We've helped countless voters register, find their polling place, get informed about the issues, and make their ballot count. Simply put: There's no way we're giving up now. Not for a second. Not ever. Team -- to accomplish these goals we need everyone with us. Fuel our efforts for Giving Tuesday and more with $25 or whatever you can give today >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Team AOC
subject: Just $14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This campaign is only possible because of thousands of folks from across the country pitching in what they can. We’re proud that our average donation this month is $14.
**Alexandria already has at least one MAGA Republican opponent for 2026.** In 2020, our challenger raised and spent more than $10 million against us. The disinformation they sow discredits our movement unless we fight back.
Right now, we’re racing against the clock to reach our $2,200,000 end of year goal before midnight on the 31st to make sure we have resources to fight back against the incoming Trump administration and our MAGA opponent.
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria from NY-14 and beyond so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[ [ Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reach our end of year goal? Every single contribution will make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241226.kqRXuR&refcode=em20241226-7812-P_FND_EOQ_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7812%2E2526796%2Ee_6U1o) **[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241226.kqRXuR&refcode=em20241226-7812-P_FND_EOQ_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7812%2E2526796%2Ee_6U1o)** Whether you can donate today or not, please know that Alexandria and our whole team is so thankful for your support. In gratitude, Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241226?refcode=em20241226-7812-P_FND_EOQ_GRM&t=22&refcode2=7812_2526796_e_6U1o&akid=7812%2E2526796%2Ee_6U1o)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241226-7812-P_FND_EOQ_GRM&t=23&akid=7812%2E2526796%2Ee_6U1o)**

name: OKGOP
subject: Can you believe the HUGE victories we had in 2024?!? Get ready 2025, cause here we come!
body:
| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=1)
---
Peter -- As we close out 2024, we wanted to think back to the huge successes we had this year. Obviously getting President Trump re-elected was an enormous victory that changed the direction of our nation. And not just a slight change, this was a monumental change that will have a generational impact. Republicans took back the US Senate & kept control of the US House of Representatives, meaning we are going into 2025 with the Senate, House, AND White House. The America First agenda is primed to make our country great again starting in January. Once again all 77 counties voted for President Trump. Not just once again meaning a second time, but once again for a THIRD time IN A ROW! That’s a huge accomplishment. Oklahoma remains deep Red. This is Republican country! We had our special Presidential conventions this year. With District Conventions, State Convention, & culminating with the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee. President Trump won ALL of Oklahoma’s delegate votes at the National convention thanks to the great slate of America First Trump supporters created by our Executive Committee & elected at our State Convention. We also elected our Presidential Electors & Alternate Electors at the various conventions. And on December 17th they met at the Governor’s office to submit Oklahoma’s 7 electoral college votes on behalf of Donald J. Trump. At the State level we had some huge victories as well. Not only did we keep our super majority in the Oklahoma State House & State Senate, we took aim at something that had never been done before: judicial elections. Oklahoma has never voted out a judge under the current system established in 1963. A system which was put in place, by the way, because corrupt Democrat judges (but I repeat myself) took tens of thousands of dollars in bribes to determine the outcome of cases before them. This new system has still benefited the Democrats greatly as they’ve maintained control of our courts in Oklahoma. And with three democrats judges up on the November ballot, we decided to do what had never been done before: beat a judge at the ballot box. And in a historic fashion for the FIRST TIME in Oklahoma history, we voted a judge off the bench! And not just any judge, a leftist judge who had been serving on the Oklahoma Supreme Court for longer than Nancy Pelosi has been in Congress!!! We’re so thankful to all those who donated to help us in the judicial plan, those who spread the word to vote no, & the organizations who partnered with us. Together we made history! It’s been an honor to serve as State Chairman for the OKGOP. There have been numerous battles, with more still to come. But the price of liberty is eternal vigilance. Thank you for those who have stood with us in the fight & for those who will continue to do so in the battles still to come. For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman
[OKGOP.com](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=2) P.S. You’ve already received emails from our team about the next battle before us: the leftist plan to allow Democrats to vote in Republican Primaries. Take a moment to [sign this petition to say NO to this destructive plan](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcDesAvBdmRUgC2hBZOgiDYULXrU-VNhMktvigk6VpXHSQ&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=3)! P.P.S. One way you can support the party is with our Minuteman program. Become a monthly member by [clicking here to join today](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcAQx6YXJqaqN5-NtFYYCIelIRyc8tbH1gvQ91lUSsicyYSpMw8C12cTeLDDuYEyTks&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=4).
[](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcAQx6YXJqaqN5-NtFYYCIelIRyc8tbH1gvQ91lUSsicyYSpMw8C12cTeLDDuYEyTks&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=5)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=6).
You can also keep up with OKGOP on [Twitter](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JcrYNQ7dhdufXPgOgJxNGHSsRONv6mnq7ly6aBOUvGVprSj7jfHNOpP70kR_1QLA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=7) or [Facebook](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UQNagEd-DqbIXa37T8ODid9mG9NGbq3z9te4_riKc6EaGmrOrRzKc2wAaVTFbzRY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_can_you_believe_the_huge_vic&n=8).

And with three democrats judges up on the November ballot, we decided to do what had never been done before: beat a judge at the ballot box. And in a historic fashion for the FIRST TIME in Oklahoma history, we voted a judge off the bench! And not just any judge, a leftist judge who had been serving on the Oklahoma Supreme Court for longer than Nancy Pelosi has been in Congress!!! We’re so thankful to all those who donated to help us in the judicial plan, those who spread the word to vote no, & the organizations who partnered with us. Together we made history! It’s been an honor to serve as State Chairman for the OKGOP. There have been numerous battles, with more still to come. But the price of liberty is eternal vigilance. Thank you for those who have stood with us in the fight & for those who will continue to do so in the battles still to come. For the People, Nathan Dahm OKGOP Chairman P.S. You’ve already received emails from our team about the next battle before us: the leftist plan to allow Democrats to vote in Republican Primaries. Take a moment to ! P.P.S. One way you can support the party is with our Minuteman program. Become a monthly member by .

| Throughout their history - from biblical times, to the Holocaust, to the horrific October 7 attacks - God's children have all too often faced hatred and persecution. Israel and her people are still enduring unimaginable heartbreak and unprecedented attacks. But today, the Jewish state and the Jewish people have found true friends and supporters in the evangelical Christian community.

Do you stand with Israel and her people? Show your support with your very own Star of David charm. The Star of David adorns the flag of the State of Israel and is the most common symbol associated with Judaism and the Jewish people.

Take a stand in solidarity against those who strive to tear the Holy Land from the hearts and hands of the Jewish people by [requesting your complimentary Star of David Charm](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAYhH_Ny22R_RoMHHxol9CtUrVRT0kvK-OP4AgDsSFp_n0VRHOdeaSZR_qpd_YhoPgKiJ3TERCBfQHE6-nuw3Lx-29vf3__Orxd-U-fP1t839AbvuBByR-70_dDdv3oycfpMMZq-LO_0Rc_PybzorfV1Hjp-mda1IkWzGqSJUbQguXIq4JVSSdyLCUvSCltq0guEa02ZckIy6luLVaJE0gwo4gFYYiEp5bmZVty2qqKSqIJZGTdSaU3wSlJ43yXIYyjT9Xok1508zzF9VgD2HSmn1Jn1SUdwxmwiUu4mQdgU2WADQHWxM-4tDEoYPVuf3xuH993R-SAfJn9pzfaLR5YvdmtYRyXoAyw-hLucsuU9JN05wFYvV2zLqzn_gPjMJthBlarTgafBKGnu-t7F3kBGTmvVk-Hm8B_AQAA__9eRI0o) from the International Fellowship of Christians and Jews - and wear it proudly to demonstrate your commitment to Israel and the Jewish people.

Show your support with your very own Star of David charm. The Star of David adorns the flag of the State of Israel and is the most common symbol associated with Judaism and the Jewish people. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Will you help my friend Tulsi Gabbard…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
She’s counting on you.

| | | | **We’re strong, America-First women, and that’s why the Woke Mob is TERRIFIED of us.**
_It’s Anna Paulina Luna_ \- and Radical Democrats will continue doing everything they can to DESTROY us, but just like President Trump - we WILL NOT be intimidated by women HATING Leftists.
They’ve called us **self-hating** , **gender traitors** , **racists** , and **everything in between**.
They said there wasn’t an **ice cube’s chance in hell** the MAGA movement would accept us.
They said the party of Donald J. Trump would never trust “a couple of women” to get the job done.

The hypocritical, **anti-woman Democrats** left strong, free-thinking women like Tulsi and I in the dust a LONG time ago. Now, ironically, _they can’t even describe what a woman is_ ...

---

We’re asking for **ALL hands on deck** now. We need EVERY America-First Patriot that receives this message to chip in whatever they can. The future of America is on the line, and we’re running out of time.
So we won’t put a number on it, nor a deadline, just asking you to give what you can, when you can because our country,
and **our movement need you now more than ever before**.

-Anna Paulina Luna

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaho5davpcthk27qb7setp54chs0d0kn0sd20vr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie0o32cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu00iebdkcvtl1i32s3q2a0l7omjvpki5tkgfj48_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie0o32cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za1ascdavnnnatdojgqe6t5ho42bu0q9bjnmmil0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie0o32cdh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0uj80t16k9dgqk0jaghn6q3haj20u85i1un2b1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie0o32cdh2bs)**
---

name: Patriot
subject: PLEASE! Will you take our NEW leadership survey?
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend -

**[Sorry to bother but before you log off for the day, would you mind quickly finishing our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmopoo9m6gafa7s32lmupel9th60ot2lefetltf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs "Before you log off for Thanksgiving, would you please finish our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?")**

We're in the final stages of preparation before Republicans take full control of the government and we need your input on what YOU think House Republican Leaders should prioritize heading into the new Congress.

_A preview of our survey is below for your convenience:_
---
| | | | 119TH CONGRESS LEADERSHIP SURVEY

Due: 11:59 PM
_______________________________________

---
| | 1) Should we ban non-citizens from voting in US elections?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3vk2pkmot4r8ktg59sr6q6hb6rnpku2j13n0vr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ttie7i2145vrn19lig8jii3uo7ppih1jvp289g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs) [**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdni0dpt0eemglvsv7p8tjjsddcfmta5rdldosto_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs)**
---
2) Should we mandate voter identification laws nationwide?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvts42ne9vpgbq5epni953k0vgargqvntg5jtefg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl1c22sm6qatqsviugieijccbqidg59lrrermmmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs) [**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvdammlv2kgpqia41v3b2r699vh19lvb8gub04g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs)**
---
3) Should we require proof of citizenship to vote?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdasa3mtthll4fj4tsa9tm212ol67obmo5rv4h1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrmpv4nvu93f8podbcojmfqgvsi749hdf6ptn1e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs) [**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2cnr5n9eccu4kfva8lnnp8g5givtb8t5ait23k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9iecor1chh2bs)**
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9gdagmbuipp8oiihb34ae79jt2ej59d9tcqqubo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vcocmgsbu8bhmfdst9ts65345sjhsncg4lgbqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8nofitadf1orvlgf429ensu24v694nan4rtng8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z70n93dj7u2tii7fjicu55flsr5rpn39msdfhugg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**

name: James O'Keefe
subject: VITAL: Join me to Expose the Deep State
body:
The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9idbtanapenph9jc87mud8lccneq7aqrinse10_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2c46t0m6c6snb78v289jr4250115qag097lfgig_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)
Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8lvl10e6rntq5361p18u757dr8d0n0n25h2cvk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkm7ho2ssbde1dvkfgvnu8un5eaaj20iop4pdkv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1u3cj6o7sunetuutb82be0otdsbk979n19bndbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zije3jjuak7h78tvrdtavhcrot55ndeqhrur25i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**

**[Are you in?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjin76elbb2jigf694e0651mbdm6aanc28hkgj3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zos6m5bbka0b1eu6e54qonh4b6sqesviojuu04qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie2pb6c3h2bs)**

name: Patriot
subject: PLEASE! Will you take our NEW leadership survey?
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend -

**[Sorry to bother but before you log off for the day, would you mind quickly finishing our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zctd9g6b0fnh2nck6agrac7fadpbueod5ijmk1fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs "Before you log off for Thanksgiving, would you please finish our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?")**

We're in the final stages of preparation before Republicans take full control of the government and we need your input on what YOU think House Republican Leaders should prioritize heading into the new Congress.

_A preview of our survey is below for your convenience:_
---
| | | | 119TH CONGRESS LEADERSHIP SURVEY

Due: 11:59 PM
_______________________________________

---
| | 1) Should we ban non-citizens from voting in US elections?
---
**[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8s54p6fl39db700ma6bbdaqtrkqaipj1k0pvc08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvidg7bgc6ktnlk8u9rkjk05khoa4b7m9hvk0bmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs) [**NO**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zkk8u8gjeptojmf4o7mb2lc3bf2dkqekolg9rcig_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)**
---
2) Should we mandate voter identification laws nationwide?
---
**[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zn0nrp8qh65a2f6nipube1q7aq12a9p9spf4r07o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5savg6gi2pb4nij4cpl5hemn5ots4nt3vqp2jc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs) [**NO**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z528ij4usgvvq5td468bu5s5n3gkbpmp8er4dsf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)**
---
3) Should we require proof of citizenship to vote?
---
**[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3v7tnf5gpnb4u222aroae3t27tf2ciov5ne3eh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv6oemr3d4jl0r6e2udur3i5ahgtrogne1c6pu4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs) [**NO**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0htde8ncg0avnecm4gsvqh9r1vss80eqqa128oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)**
---
4) Should we enact mass deportations of illegals?
---
**[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5pledijvoj8ee9mckset2mcm5b7a0ujm4p0lsc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zb1suj7q79grup0mvs6b09lih4n2ooim6pe693m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs) [**NO**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1u63t68ptk23sbkmmt0007amvrmn1raeu1fclj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)**
---
5) Should we finish building The Wall?
---
**[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z72732n50bh9opu76hjee5mbljvbd08gu4e06n4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zj51q8gk0tpvdn96mfabnrg4e2buh73se632spd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs) [**NO**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvt81hln1qdne7kh3sa69gaaamcu0dl8n9ja31h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4c5h2bs)**
---
6) Should we increase the number of Border Patrol agents?
---

body:
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6uicgef96om1hvmbiqiktn0988h7sfh98sldf3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4clh2bs "Generic Button")

---

We must act NOW to protect these seats and ensure the continued success of our America First movement. That's why we need your immediate support to stop the Democrats' scheme in its tracks.

**[Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z738slnj6ksekc02988duimvtibtdin60kmp4a4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieaob4clh2bs "Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.")** We can't afford to lose these seats, and we can't do it without your help.

name: Patriot
subject: PLEASE! Will you take our NEW leadership survey?
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend -

**[Sorry to bother but before you log off for the day, would you mind quickly finishing our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zunqml6s3btbspmjv1og4nj29q3kal9rgtbuifp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs "Before you log off for Thanksgiving, would you please finish our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?")**

We're in the final stages of preparation before Republicans take full control of the government and we need your input on what YOU think House Republican Leaders should prioritize heading into the new Congress.

_A preview of our survey is below for your convenience:_
---
| | | | 119TH CONGRESS LEADERSHIP SURVEY

Due: 11:59 PM
_______________________________________

---
| | 1) Should we ban non-citizens from voting in US elections?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf5ovdmeohdaumk1ch0hpqo3jodsvkn98lgeq3oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh3ofk1hq099jmnu544qct8p89ad2ch1m3ibnmjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9bjd4biipkd3mgc5sive0sromluqlkbgh6ig39o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
2) Should we mandate voter identification laws nationwide?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlt3t2a454e8l8c3otvj197dhhmkpkf23lfde5jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4r76dgfn15c7723r5mb42r2gren5a317rk4k330_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7uqnu4u4aihvnbbdf65mq8n8uhrpjote6mk3fq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
3) Should we require proof of citizenship to vote?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze6209dp4cnof3cstpvp5av6u1s1jl1rv22lnqp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdgja2iq726t11no23an86aevml3p19tfa84qmgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn07c8d85cnjaokdigtr01e16fo0aknu8it7qffo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
4) Should we enact mass deportations of illegals?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za9sd8lto6mj4actpq6l5qt0cdrroneh7b9qa1vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoic20sppemr4jsclno2lq8sgoj627b6dhu4fsro_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z57j90ip26cmt4v48mlvir8kc5bhr6nvenffu5jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
5) Should we finish building The Wall?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5j707m6rcvd7asamgv2oquucjsrdsaihne3eo8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zroej178f2hrpm5g4ff7vm8cds0ohhgctvu0lk6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z743r3hpilcdt9f6qsra0g2aib8hig332i3n1348_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
6) Should we increase the number of Border Patrol agents?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z71q071mtccn9v41q8ml3b7rv001afmk10oald6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkptraiib77pigo7g0v4iajai6a86g0e9oc4u0lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z04e1sp2alm4bhh3bqil3vrqnqfah4oo62l3rqc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
7) Should we end taxes on tips?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3bciq8du2par6e09klger35i0g1cemhancfsgd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeevv9mjkmdvnnrnhjdk4pa8mqb087rmia0khmio_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6p13g46jsesddq8jn0jmkpa37sl6h5cbpcrdgoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
8) Should we crack down on soft-on-crime laws in blue cities?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8fahpupj0qvmf1dn8cq7momhbhbcsomteup17co_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmmkgvkdj27amq7i3nu4gv5b1090hcthi6945l9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z298skeeo2t8g7h5266edidsj7t0i967rni7mj5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
9) Should we ban men from competing in women's sports?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zna5lcbt05ive7gvbu55coej196ar7f6r3jcv200_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf93106e35o4a2ac73dlfd1pqvueuuuv53h06cl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) [**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrfir9h5ocuko6gf0jnlbk5pd5kth8nrtjmkpkt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)**
---
10) What else do you think House Republican Leaders should prioritize?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztojm8jt7qo70aje30hoqh4sb1o6v71qvq1j98n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs)[**RESPOND HERE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3ccp5c7huk2f9upclnakt5nbtkrhh8q745094a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cdh2bs) **

Thanks,

subject: Can Jimmy Patronis count on you to defend our conservative values and secure America's future?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The Democrats are targeting this seat, and we can't afford to lose it - every dollar counts in this fight for Florida's future

| [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z45k0olek02pq74dm8u8jjd41d0hgih36vd0k6ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2clh2bs) Fellow Conservative, We're at a critical moment in our nation's history. With a **[razor-thin Republican majority](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvasra3j7emg33kgprbjbel4v38c8gu8e79kcbgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2clh2bs)** in the House, every seat counts. And I'm writing to you today because I need your help to ensure we keep Florida strong and America First! As you know, the Democrats are targeting this seat in the upcoming Special Election, and we cannot afford to lose it. That's why I'm counting on your support to elect _[Jimmy Patronis](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjmdmlp1sosa3iemli3atel3c5rnehjlvgd7kef0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2clh2bs)_ , a proven ally of President Trump who will fight every day to secure America's future and defend our conservative values. The stakes are high, Fellow Conservative. With the House GOP's majority hanging by a thread, we need **[Jimmy's leadership](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8kcf9a9lor0066bbsq3f5ub3oso3ptcvu2ron2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2clh2bs)** now more than ever. And with your donation today, we can ensure we have the resources needed to win this critical election. Will you stand with President Trump and elect Jimmy Patronis? **[Your donation is critical](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqinl5a3979t01s71rq0b80skt642ql8b8c8dvsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2clh2bs)** to keeping Florida strong and America First! |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: VITAL: Join me to Expose the Deep State
body:
The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq2m94as5hv40lpb88ussn9n2m25jhfi05hff7oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9h06gc0cvrdso62hbk6d10t4mlkv77agma9ngco_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)
Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zioa4d2k52k1o2gkmeu7edpu5he1c10cic5sjab0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrgfn9tdk1691ae25lhsoqvhjvfr52h68v5qn300_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhs6qfas3qb17ji5j9kjteffv2hepblvfi5tdi0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9bulolb6sekssa99q29gdk9abbcorg75n0cne3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)**

**[Are you in?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc1k9c5m12kk1kh49d6250v6jp9880c8v4b7o3a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr281mroirbqbp15ugbpr12misu44auonjsu8rm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ieeoj2cth2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf12blf9se75q86dgm48rev1lq5ru4fsc1kvjjgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie9o36clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8a1vdvee66icpdbv7hj9fk91mad2uo1jv0qbmcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie9o36clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z47176hef2538rf4ncahsmk15e6mf9c013gdhd68_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie9o36clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgu9mln51lsh8e7rn2osmpj471pi63r4f17601po_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9ie9o36clh2bs)**

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

body:
As a founding member, I’d like you to hear this directly from me.

When we send Tish James packing, I’ll know exactly who to thank – YOU.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zullur46kmfksdmjfr1pjbg9cu0idk4q8bmt92ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg60o72chh2bs)
---
Dear Friend, enough is enough.
---
The lawlessness and the LAWFARE from the far-Left in New York are about to come to a screeching halt.
---
For years, corrupt Democrat Attorney General Letitia James has had only _one_ priority – _and it certainly isn’t protecting law-abiding citizens like YOU..._
---
**_No, her only priority has been an endless, taxpayer-funded WITCH HUNT against President Trump!_**
---
But the people just made their voices heard loud and clear.
---
President Trump just received a historic SURGE of support in New York in his landslide victory.
---
And now, after sending President Trump back to the White House, those very same voters like _YOU_ are ready to send Tish James packing once and for all.
---
**As the Republican candidate who’s run _the most competitive statewide race in New York_ since Republicans held the governor’s office, I know we can and we _WILL_ win.**
---
After November 2024, no one can deny the tides are changing.
---
And come Election Day 2026, when we **FIRE** Tish James once and for all, rest assured, I’ll know exactly who to thank for our victory:
---
The **_DAY_** **_ONE_** members of our campaign.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any amount to ACCEPT your Founding Membership with the Official Campaign to FIRE corrupt Democrat Attorney General Tish James.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqv10b7cmf9p7esp98n3cu89mqo8bg51scjhusn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg60o72chh2bs)

Thank you,

name: Firecracker Mini OTF
subject: Switchblade that attaches to your car keys (opening mail/packages easier too)
body:
This is one of my favorite knives to date...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2?message_id=IjRlNTNkZDgwLWE2NzktMDEzZC05OWY5LTU2NWVmNjc5NDFlMkBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/b638d414310bb08afc90098e34c1ee87891d3ef7/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2)
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/6ce869e32a7f5350f0e5417ed24109580590c29d/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2)
---
|
---
| | This is one of my favorite knives to date.

I own a ton of expensive hunting knives and OTF blades, but truly nothing has been more convenient that this [car keys switchblade.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/b638d414310bb08afc90098e34c1ee87891d3ef7/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2)

It's always with me on the go, where my car keys are is where my concealed switch is too, this compact American designed knife, is called _**"The Firecracker" - and was initially launched for a 4th of July promotion.**_

Due to the growing response for this line of switchblades, they restocked and making them available again year-round.

These are going viral because there's nothing that [fits so flush on a keychain while having the OTF ejectable switch feature in a knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/b638d414310bb08afc90098e34c1ee87891d3ef7/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2) on the go.

This is mobile convenience of switchblade knife perfect for easy daily tasks like opening mail/packages.

I find my car keys are always on me more often than an edc knife, so combining all in one place just makes my life easier being able to carry this tool so easily.

Doesn't get in your way only brings value and handiness to your life.

Get the Compact switchblade safely sits your pocket along with your car or truck keys.

**[Claim Your Car Keys Firecracker Switchblades Here>>>](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19494/6374453/b638d414310bb08afc90098e34c1ee87891d3ef7/399ef8cc2525865a75aea7414e3262feafe64dc2)**

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Will you help my friend Tulsi Gabbard…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
She’s counting on you.

| | | | **We’re strong, America-First women, and that’s why the Woke Mob is TERRIFIED of us.**
_It’s Anna Paulina Luna_ \- and Radical Democrats will continue doing everything they can to DESTROY us, but just like President Trump - we WILL NOT be intimidated by women HATING Leftists.
They’ve called us **self-hating** , **gender traitors** , **racists** , and **everything in between**.
They said there wasn’t an **ice cube’s chance in hell** the MAGA movement would accept us.
They said the party of Donald J. Trump would never trust “a couple of women” to get the job done.

The hypocritical, **anti-woman Democrats** left strong, free-thinking women like Tulsi and I in the dust a LONG time ago. Now, ironically, _they can’t even describe what a woman is_ ...

---
|
---
[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo1q8a6nma89dumsudcklj2rksipbnslsd8v7k38_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg60o74c5h2bs)
|
---
**I** n **C** ase **Y** ou **M** issed **I** t \- just last night, the Dems started a petition to _**REMOVE Tulsi Gabbard from President Trump’s cabinet**_ ... in less than 24 hours, it has gained **THOUSANDS** of signatures.
We’re asking for **ALL hands on deck** now. We need EVERY America-First Patriot that receives this message to chip in whatever they can. The future of America is on the line, and we’re running out of time.
So we won’t put a number on it, nor a deadline, just asking you to give what you can, when you can because our country,

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The Democrats are targeting this seat, and we can't afford to lose it - every dollar counts in this fight for Florida's future

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9notvsig91p1arh09he4p7d0qk2u4pc0vhh155g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg68pr6cph2bs) Fellow Conservative, We're at a critical moment in our nation's history. With a **[razor-thin Republican majority](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8mfjdc2jiioo72tsvd2t75s65es9flkkt1h8h8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg68pr6cph2bs)** in the House, every seat counts. And I'm writing to you today because I need your help to ensure we keep Florida strong and America First! As you know, the Democrats are targeting this seat in the upcoming Special Election, and we cannot afford to lose it. That's why I'm counting on your support to elect _[Jimmy Patronis](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt3mh2ku45p0uv6jfl2telec030r16f69qrm48sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg68pr6cph2bs)_ , a proven ally of President Trump who will fight every day to secure America's future and defend our conservative values. The stakes are high, Fellow Conservative. With the House GOP's majority hanging by a thread, we need **[Jimmy's leadership](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6lt11i9qvvnc3kqoc094nvt6to4crttoi2a4g28_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpg68pr6cph2bs)** now more than ever. And with your donation today, we can ensure we have the resources needed to win this critical election. Peter,

I have __**one last goal**__ coming up quickly, and it's important. It’s the 2024 end-of-year fundraising deadline, and I need your help to **CRUSH** it.

_We the People_ have issued a mandate for change. clean_body: | | | | | Friend - "Before you log off for Thanksgiving, would you please finish our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?" We're in the final stages of preparation before Republicans take full control of the government and we need your input on what YOU think House Republican Leaders should prioritize heading into the new Congress. A preview of our survey is below for your convenience: | | | | 119TH CONGRESS LEADERSHIP SURVEY Due: 11:59 PM | | 1) Should we ban non-citizens from voting in US elections? 2) Should we mandate voter identification laws nationwide? 3) Should we require proof of citizenship to vote? 4) Should we enact mass deportations of illegals? 5) Should we finish building The Wall? 6) Should we increase the number of Border Patrol agents? 7) Should we end taxes on tips? 8) Should we crack down on soft-on-crime laws in blue cities? 9) Should we ban men from competing in women's sports? 10) What else do you think House Republican Leaders should prioritize? Thanks, House GOP Leadership Team | | | | Paid for by Team Emmer, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Emmer for Congress and Electing Majority Making Effective Republicans (Emmer PAC) 824 S Milledge Avenue Suite 101 Athens, GA 30605 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@contact.tomemmer.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , | The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

**[Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cde0f76422f44931b81d9b3ea40a618d&_e=bSqvJobeq0sCO2v1p7V_ghSrFwq0XHZHPzyY42WKBiwjpUr-0OWLvOnVWn-W5WRLzKHPfU7W1hgbuRBGJxr76ZAjPMDB4u6v0rJ3qyx7hjJyCJyeaKZReKv1XtHMatmc0QiLItZVD0ghafDLKwDLmxH2cLCj53xhTgdjhzyCWZZhrIDKYuy3uI5KII0IcXIz0EUaG8PSNO9wsPEsrNZ6yjClDCAGlxyyL6uEp-55XsoRsI5SiFkWst7SFYV1gwgrwTOyq49dro_4x3iRAqQWZsrLpdOJaIyGN7H_sU0gaTgonAlPQzR39QcuNeoS5ZJsfkKpnvnzcQlV_N-LCiRkZF4Y6ZQTeKzOjQHYOlpVD78MtmElIKiB6xC6I7e_Y03GVnrCh9f3Tl4-f89wA5_9XzNzm_HLIbx9_IqCIkhUAyUhae8hglzNGEis82KkPlg-a4T_0VNLQAzMwywND8Ozqc3MHUAQv_o1Xau3Hb2NP7w%3D "Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.")** We can't afford to lose these seats, and we can't do it without your help.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8977e061c887407cad5051016487e0c7&_e=EiY4F80soOylOJZMCQXG3wf9foGQbkFVL1FdkKyjIw3pQOLS9D21FdnQJu3U4AJQJ7YlxHrWyzjORtv74xwCYCH_rBvWqlae3DQ4wnibdmF_hz7SYaXe6Vt8jOIaAEARgcyZEWAT4G9UKtMh0fWn0NPd8Sm28oW9e4zqWUkK5pHz5gFj0LkkrfPs1C5tptAZKEFevMUQDnGtlMi-AAsbRtonXr8FULLpsQLLwRQW5BNrr3CIGQtM_J03TYLR0vf7iFSZLMbfAEuDSxbUSqMygCJDG05ndU8lwYlEI-bAgVd9jpJuaCPa4NDI52ijMxx2Y0RnoWoufC77_-KLIt8XCs_RmUUdtGA_7MM-2W-Yjp0AqMMUIiT2yiOd8rlR5caBRElo4_P3dehMZ39Ph65jiGTag2k1RmuwtXuYRb9R74bKZauP-09dD2deK1Eyb_mg) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8977e061c887407cad5051016487e0c7&_e=EiY4F80soOylOJZMCQXG3wf9foGQbkFVL1FdkKyjIw3pQOLS9D21FdnQJu3U4AJQJ7YlxHrWyzjORtv74xwCYCH_rBvWqlae3DQ4wnibdmF_hz7SYaXe6Vt8jOIaAEARgcyZEWAT4G9UKtMh0fWn0NPd8Sm28oW9e4zqWUkK5pHz5gFj0LkkrfPs1C5tptAZKEFevMUQDnGtlMi-AAsbRtonXr8FULLpsQLLwRQW5BNrr3CIGQtM_J03TYLR0vf7iFSZLMbfAEuDSxbUSqMygJesv1uahohdw9EIkC4wcQ6hRg3mx7Of1TZSlPCT_YU6pZ_TBS8F3-ppDtgxgCadZFaS9qzY5ZjGveW9GmEUAZSMlPdU3ScsHkFpmTCeQX9M91QS4Qz6j96seLeVg6VsqhP86y_JORsEK7wU8gRRq0o7drluHLdKozb8E0bNC9xo) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8977e061c887407cad5051016487e0c7&_e=EiY4F80soOylOJZMCQXG3wf9foGQbkFVL1FdkKyjIw3pQOLS9D21FdnQJu3U4AJQJ7YlxHrWyzjORtv74xwCYCH_rBvWqlae3DQ4wnibdmF_hz7SYaXe6Vt8jOIaAEARgcyZEWAT4G9UKtMh0fWn0NPd8Sm28oW9e4zqWUkK5pHz5gFj0LkkrfPs1C5tptAZKEFevMUQDnGtlMi-AAsbRtonXr8FULLpsQLLwRQW5BNrr3CIGQtM_J03TYLR0vf7iFSZLMbfAEuDSxbUSqMygDEzjyrnJCKaF09W2SQzY1FxpsSWgdh_O3W_5N07L8mDy95IsB4A4m3v3QFNv7tODUMnYmVjhABW2v8NiY5itrNlAQXe75mjVKNcbTdSybL7nvxjd4ilTCWE7M9W-FeZGxZrzG3HaKx1l6gcZQ17UXKM5Kdv9RDWww7BZ9HMS4OI)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8977e061c887407cad5051016487e0c7&_e=EiY4F80soOylOJZMCQXG3wf9foGQbkFVL1FdkKyjIw3pQOLS9D21FdnQJu3U4AJQJ7YlxHrWyzjORtv74xwCYCH_rBvWqlae3DQ4wnibdmF_hz7SYaXe6Vt8jOIaAEARgcyZEWAT4G9UKtMh0fWn0NPd8Sm28oW9e4zqWUkK5pHz5gFj0LkkrfPs1C5tptAZKEFevMUQDnGtlMi-AAsbRtonXr8FULLpsQLLwRQW5BNrr3CIGQtM_J03TYLR0vf7iFSZLMbfAEuDSxbUSqMygNtsBLZS3RGFS0MXQWroyyIFK0aEh61f1B8ApWJYQqQElFaavVvANifvqAPeqmmn9v09DwZ8TDJjXaWLly8RKrYGyEU-zqaf-na4b0Ea-BrH7nLpYnUx-6VKj9SluLZxM3fmAAdBXAkh1fjcw8G-H3Fns-bq2UkXEixpQIzyN4MJ)**

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vskIyySWDN

You know that most institutions of higher education have been
hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskIyySWDN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

You know
that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of
anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent
years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have
spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need
to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next
year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the
American way of life. And I think the opportunities are
significantly better than in the past.

We must
do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices
of liberty and limited constitutional government on the
battlefield of education.

Hillsdale
College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With
the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we
are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for
our nation.

That's
why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31
to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through
Education in 2025.

The focus
of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism
nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your
help.

Before
the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College
with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise
$6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31.

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never
been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to
undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have
been increasing-with the ultimate goal of transforming American
government and society.

Your
year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by
educating millions of Americans-especially younger
Americans-about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way
we accomplish this is through our free online courses-courses
such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the
Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and
"Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

We must
increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these
free online courses, as well as through our several other
educational outreach efforts-efforts such as Imprimis and our
ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12
charter schools nationwide.

Defeating
the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an
essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of
life.

Hillsdale
College refuses to accept even one penny of government
support-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state
student grants and loans. This principled independence frees us
from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and
allows us to remain true to our mission.

It also
means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like
you.

I see the
tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation
and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale's educational
outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on
younger Americans.

Your
year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational
outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you
agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism
by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger
Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please
make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by
December 31.

You can
give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64125935:skIyySWDN:m:3:2627245898:5A457CBF1B6292610F8F2EBC8B6930EF:r

We are
honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Thanks to YOU, Republicans took back the Senate and House Majorities and Donald Trump will return to the White House! I know that with good folks like you on my team, we’ll continue to advance President Trump’s agenda and protect our values in Tennessee and all of America. But that doesn’t come without a price. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c8c4e269c3f475eaee87a9cbfe2e1f4&_e=6WUUc7xIP-TbDwxgw742mfIV9mAtkcmS2zIwFkQFxgu91Vzr4Imfu1uX4UM9UWFF1AZMh6eccz1si7NkgpX3_qjSCLxwZ0gwPdDfzYWQUlzCeHJbHfM1LWk-cggJJekLRgNm3aaxUWWntUDz4RRtkUf2qu-a9WW9_03ot46SDyKQJD3oue6xF59LqVhHceEoAmCKDyzIGrefqsmncA-6Y16Wq848RoE7a7B0aPGMSbgO5cCIj5GYmDlS8R870QNtQmAMJawyMdHLA-aW58AultdA7OdFrF-M8l98A5G2FPfwxUhD6pTUbZGi4LSryFQ9_55u0XXy7yabA2OfHG1NBCMdV2HuDlrCVaFGquuxCLmXdGexkiZ5VtyOj_olHs78TGW7fp9pOnphi7Nr_ubA5NrLD2H2a1azRuwD3STKSaavC7mQ-KTsIBO5AqPA3VPp) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c8c4e269c3f475eaee87a9cbfe2e1f4&_e=6WUUc7xIP-TbDwxgw742mfIV9mAtkcmS2zIwFkQFxgu91Vzr4Imfu1uX4UM9UWFF1AZMh6eccz1si7NkgpX3_qjSCLxwZ0gwPdDfzYWQUlzCeHJbHfM1LWk-cggJJekLRgNm3aaxUWWntUDz4RRtkUf2qu-a9WW9_03ot46SDyKQJD3oue6xF59LqVhHceEoAmCKDyzIGrefqsmncA-6Y16Wq848RoE7a7B0aPGMSbgO5cCIj5GYmDlS8R870QNtQmAMJawyMdHLA-aW58Aulgaq0IFzjFaAiz6jCbWvw-_M7nKXunjOljY_tNUTwdUNtKiAckTg6r54nwkE-JVugcOZbA6jAxsWylkeg3eH-_KX7yoeiXNCrk6oUYgxMBmZeVYV5i5djJ2Af3To12DTSV84BJx8ysQrheuOwPx1M5sbJrOMSuK1PqbG_ezeEGtI) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c8c4e269c3f475eaee87a9cbfe2e1f4&_e=6WUUc7xIP-TbDwxgw742mfIV9mAtkcmS2zIwFkQFxgu91Vzr4Imfu1uX4UM9UWFF1AZMh6eccz1si7NkgpX3_qjSCLxwZ0gwPdDfzYWQUlzCeHJbHfM1LWk-cggJJekLRgNm3aaxUWWntUDz4RRtkUf2qu-a9WW9_03ot46SDyKQJD3oue6xF59LqVhHceEoAmCKDyzIGrefqsmncA-6Y16Wq848RoE7a7B0aPGMSbgO5cCIj5GYmDlS8R870QNtQmAMJawyMdHLA-aW58AulqLZLGnqn8sxkfxiX34HpxRZYCzkATQ97DnPOQzBKndwPMlketb34YiGfC7IOmPYhj8vwNiZ3y1RADSG3Ofkpp2ADagEk7VhbDifABPIr4tBqOw39zW8WmIR4-WVdLpdLMjDLMlw-KQxNnfA1W9GNVho7B88_3TzcGtxlsPcII8S)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c8c4e269c3f475eaee87a9cbfe2e1f4&_e=6WUUc7xIP-TbDwxgw742mfIV9mAtkcmS2zIwFkQFxgu91Vzr4Imfu1uX4UM9UWFF1AZMh6eccz1si7NkgpX3_qjSCLxwZ0gwPdDfzYWQUlzCeHJbHfM1LWk-cggJJekLRgNm3aaxUWWntUDz4RRtkUf2qu-a9WW9_03ot46SDyKQJD3oue6xF59LqVhHceEoAmCKDyzIGrefqsmncA-6Y16Wq848RoE7a7B0aPGMSbgO5cCIj5GYmDlS8R870QNtQmAMJawyMdHLA-aW58AullWV1JRqfWFXubJZ_ChY-ACDs1VyWtIZ0eQyaNnAIwtLJP9fHv6tIrlU6RAVCTIfVgh7lWNxppr3Qv4DmWTqZcHgjkUkMN0oR38RwGqTJa5NAb2xQ0G5KHeCekNaiNrekEk8rd9hE9sj93gZfK4WQMqLELgh26bKTnDFDti6EewZ)**

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce23565a-7a56-42ef-a838-e1d60a561ce1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, The election didn't go the way we hoped, but it has only lit a fire under our feet to take action. Right now, we’re fighting to build a blue firewall and restock our resources for the next elections. By building this momentum now, we'll be sure to reach voters early, invest in year-round organizing efforts, and recruit Democrats to take on extremism everywhere. [That’s why we recently launched our 2025 Democratic Membership Campaign to ensure that every Democrat has a shot at winning at any level across the country!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b6a220a-d5d5-487b-8eae-72b26a52e4e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb932b370-2e37-4ea8-bb11-87a52391d1ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| We set a goal of activating the memberships of 50,000 Democrats like you before 2024 ends. But we are 33% behind our goal, which is why we extended our deadline to sign up by TONIGHT. [According to our records, you haven’t activated your membership. So will you take the first step to protect our democracy by chipping in $10 now to activate your 2025 Democratic Membership and help Democrats win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc0e1a43-3791-46d4-afb4-5d647c2b51d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43d65bd3-8b2c-4196-abaa-9bd18a09bb2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis.
