name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-0M5ok17mQqxCwa6NumaBA~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-0M5ok17mQqxCwa6NumaBA~~/AARclAA~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-0M5ok17mQqxCwa6NumaBA~~/AARclAA~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-0M5ok17mQqxCwa6NumaBA~~/AARclAA~)**
---

Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2174d3ae8775414aaae66c772ae9873e&_e=uVEkKUkTEPzM0wWDMbOUSuvKNbekfNF2hWs2kfbyfkw8sf5o6bmk_RtFLWCk5WKb52RRR8Y0LqzbhVKrTLFmDrWVnW2b-STWRHtfrP8BTBOR6ZMEBdsC8TSFphrDF3vCDIJC6KQzZqYvZprRQociucYDFzyl2LniYNZ7BzF2i0S7WeTDGGFPVOV8_St_cTyuQAdo1_EZAfOCAC9AZbZWGV4yk-i7O7iUd4KbIPw7HdVpvT-Ni_fw6swMVeC6Lrypvg4Cp0tYCdEYn8okLN_NB0-vjVbbJwqpdl7Abv-dyl_UfM2-V_Y5PMvGiHsnUhzY3etqRi0xt8mmPdLCuf5SVYWvPyvl-OPMtLbigrQin2a2r93mxwHK9OxGiKNEM51s).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2174d3ae8775414aaae66c772ae9873e&_e=uVEkKUkTEPzM0wWDMbOUSuvKNbekfNF2hWs2kfbyfkw8sf5o6bmk_RtFLWCk5WKb52RRR8Y0LqzbhVKrTLFmDrWVnW2b-STWRHtfrP8BTBOR6ZMEBdsC8TSFphrDF3vCDIJC6KQzZqYvZprRQociucYDFzyl2LniYNZ7BzF2i0S7WeTDGGFPVOV8_St_cTyuQAdo1_EZAfOCAC9AZbZWGUvcks1wDke3Xeq9pnUlwoypEF-aDYPq7d2rK3gXCtryT1UahLl2GIL5NvCCSYGc9cmeBIomP2NacN6ZBNDaFnBXBs-n2GvgijYmd4fp1XZEAFqG3oaTwtXJylp3PPQspSpab8RQNA0uKr8dI7Q0qxEjU8Jc2op-lESyQ0SDyfTO)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.
* I'll legally protect you.
* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.
* And to those bad actors in government:
* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.
* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.
* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2174d3ae8775414aaae66c772ae9873e&_e=uVEkKUkTEPzM0wWDMbOUSuvKNbekfNF2hWs2kfbyfkw8sf5o6bmk_RtFLWCk5WKb52RRR8Y0LqzbhVKrTLFmDrWVnW2b-STWRHtfrP8BTBOR6ZMEBdsC8TSFphrDF3vCDIJC6KQzZqYvZprRQociucYDFzyl2LniYNZ7BzF2i0S7WeTDGGFPVOV8_St_cTyuQAdo1_EZAfOCAC9AZbZWGaveEJtAXDrbGTD8iXFtSH1b1x3McqIR9xlbefilRN7vazqVrsBDhbpsy3oW6LDLWyYWE7fefQUMvm3MyFta9ufTW6xoZEkT0J9JA1hURtGDnLN1PVHqiSHLdm6y0Ngs4ErO15CHXdDz0jjjo7xszSpzZgnoo5gfepyRLsnpfV0k)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2174d3ae8775414aaae66c772ae9873e&_e=uVEkKUkTEPzM0wWDMbOUSuvKNbekfNF2hWs2kfbyfkw8sf5o6bmk_RtFLWCk5WKb52RRR8Y0LqzbhVKrTLFmDrWVnW2b-STWRHtfrP8BTBOR6ZMEBdsC8TSFphrDF3vCDIJC6KQzZqYvZprRQociucYDFzyl2LniYNZ7BzF2i0S7WeTDGGFPVOV8_St_cTyuQAdo1_EZAfOCAC9AZbZWGdGllw4sZK49pgxMc6A19J3FP2qcMh4envqXRqwGx2BDnDCPOSw7QEV1wfta9WV94jgqtT_EzyuWCCH3_raWbgUFMRi1VHzKA2M2pnx8U7y2Dk963EKNROOluigF0iPzZiwlP_iZlxViRCOl2HyuYT-TZsGTFzjGEVPZHaq2VpYP)**

**[Are you in?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2174d3ae8775414aaae66c772ae9873e&_e=uVEkKUkTEPzM0wWDMbOUSuvKNbekfNF2hWs2kfbyfkw8sf5o6bmk_RtFLWCk5WKb52RRR8Y0LqzbhVKrTLFmDrWVnW2b-STWRHtfrP8BTBOR6ZMEBdsC8TSFphrDF3vCDIJC6KQzZqYvZprRQociucYDFzyl2LniYNZ7BzF2i0S7WeTDGGFPVOV8_St_cTyuQAdo1_EZAfOCAC9AZbZWGWwZj5ZHoKS9IHpsGH_l6vLRbSNDeqAAr59hgaOLZMKEl654glekjQcje0LJVuERkz-6MM7xN_Ul9mfApXd6hJSD69GxUyec15BNQparyMt3UKafwvhQ55zoWpoJrj2Ip_MQdKLz9UFKjVDvEVIBx_GsdpB5xqIOyGc9AHK2AvCm)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2174d3ae8775414aaae66c772ae9873e&_e=uVEkKUkTEPzM0wWDMbOUSuvKNbekfNF2hWs2kfbyfkw8sf5o6bmk_RtFLWCk5WKb52RRR8Y0LqzbhVKrTLFmDrWVnW2b-STWRHtfrP8BTBOR6ZMEBdsC8TSFphrDF3vCDIJC6KQzZqYvZprRQociucYDFzyl2LniYNZ7BzF2i0S7WeTDGGFPVOV8_St_cTyuQAdo1_EZAfOCAC9AZbZWGVcF4GKbwrhprvbPV0rHTlDBaB8PlL06P4Ix9cXedMMBXP-LgbxSDTq9rSQUEQuLL2kntx-Ijv_sbEgVyvjDv1oWvfx5BcDhatrfWfIzLpP4jSPx-R0lKfXXFHV6uHklv-co4Qxk297CBhfCISQX-_P_ZyDnrEKpSkBMHMHVV0-J)**

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9d9718cf919480ca50dfb9f44dc12e2&_e=oJGGoKp0NVJaOfsgFE2XlCbsF4aLPLEiwg1LXfQhNzY6aTJC678u9Q6c_w_FGZFl-WJctgFFH4eprbHhGljPmDrUSx9Tr9-7pFzQzkYwbEHU1jC_GccAfVBHsIUfdbxDRrwSlGhL9vktgHCRPuq6xznx8lq8gluzeIynWqqe5I1For0lOFnL47mtyCIUwGSECfISpCg7ZUtmRROZr2HjeJuxDXYSv5qkrnZ0JU4QbVjhekna_m6_jJ3TJD0X0p9fbSuiyPKUN450Y-f_WhK9rEy2m0IvZFt6Wwv5MbzeIqMLTmLBJ5Za-f4o4jRslMAuul-xP-4bAYC2d_nUkXEB_YzPWuTIP852fi1-53c5xWGIPOtoGEiaYJ4XlxFsRkjywjhcnU2CxlR3kkfR2lpL6Fd2Ri-OuhqMiBId3A3BFBo4g9z0c72NlBKTdi96DQt8) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9d9718cf919480ca50dfb9f44dc12e2&_e=oJGGoKp0NVJaOfsgFE2XlCbsF4aLPLEiwg1LXfQhNzY6aTJC678u9Q6c_w_FGZFl-WJctgFFH4eprbHhGljPmDrUSx9Tr9-7pFzQzkYwbEHU1jC_GccAfVBHsIUfdbxDRrwSlGhL9vktgHCRPuq6xznx8lq8gluzeIynWqqe5I1For0lOFnL47mtyCIUwGSECfISpCg7ZUtmRROZr2HjeJuxDXYSv5qkrnZ0JU4QbVjhekna_m6_jJ3TJD0X0p9fbSuiyPKUN450Y-f_WhK9rLwGjJBZ9ZzqUvSf8FN5HSoMK2PAjbsl4OpHBhTLriXI-EplENghdFvIHwDBK6s5Sm9UNleUjauxM7-s-oYOQVRzjyvImjTq_GCZAtoKRpzN7fbgUmBuUa6C2AqZQJOPo7F13Rc_MeUkenyHONHBTA5FdcqlCzaK30RUXSMaqiFp)**

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Friday, December 27, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1835, the [first Masonic lodge in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72OgzAQBp_G7kDeNX8uXFxDl2uvRDa7gCWDI7BCePsT6VNN9c2n-XsMDxdi2OZft7LN7ykNqLAqAAtsB3IhXkMlyXpFBiRbaHWNxmio5GJHU2uNajIAahyVYa3ZdF2ljamJJi2DvWWA2ALoGrDsVN16jzRRNzbet6JSTCGnvcwLZ367Y4pXevFejmmV0S45Pw-hfwT2AvvzPMt8LC5tMWxcpn0W2H9WBbmr8NcNgT1veb8J2Mjd0vMMMYajud_m1YX4keevtS-L_wEAAP__HfhWiw) met at Brazoria. The lodge disbanded during the Texas Revolution the following year, but it was reestablished in October 1837. Shortly thereafter, future Republic of Texas President Anson Jones was elected the first grand master of the Grand Lodge of Texas. Today's issue is a bit shorter than usual as the Flyover team gets ready to greet the New Year next week. We'll return with our regular _Texas Flyover_ on Monday. Today's sponsor is the [Voice of Martyrs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ8GuiB7DBgKF1d3lyrZdktkM-MwkoMj2wnJ26_Yftuj86fv-zJfLAferl_2Rqa8fJxBQHuScAI9o-XwntsajRM4ypqM1KqDcVSyrVfTCqus7twIiLoj0SuBdnEwIvYShrFmc5RJAC2l6iQ0g-i0c4Aeh6V3TletIOQSU1NWKvSy2Yd3fFJqlnirg1lLuedK_atgqmDa9725U8q0PArH7fAc6kqbt1xWzj4mx4i0VTBd2ZcjpqY5x0daaF4iUqU-Ps-yH87Q_q-TwfvOIXDujyfXm-XwO1z-JPE08BMAAP__941g5A), who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories.

## Indigenous Rancher Aims To Bring Bison Back
Indigenous ranchers like Theda Pogue of Sulphur Springs are spearheading [efforts to reintroduce bison](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OhCAUxfGngQ4DVx2HgmIbu9l2SwMCchMEA8yHb7-ZSbbcF_ifX87PbblpjJi2b7071V4-L8BhYAIYTIvVGM9loFYZbqWgTompH0HKXgw0KCfB89V4uHDNJXgjuBfGDDD61VtpKap3TABMQvSjgO7Kx8kYsN5e14sxExm4s9hy6Vpwzb109fHMD1e6Ne80qtDaUUn_RWAmMB_hrF0uG4E5uWclMP9ZDdacGCaLm0v5XlnRaQ2uVPaJMnP3XsfchbZHWpQ9nhgj1ssbsO0a42ev_XvAQ8FvAAAA___XI17S) to their native lands, aiming to reconnect with their cultural heritage and revitalize grassland ecosystems. An estimated 30 million bison roamed North America at the time of Christopher Columbus, but their numbers [dwindled to near extinction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtCAUBeCn0Q4jVxEpKP7Gbv52S3ORi5CgTIAdZ95-4_bbfznn5Hw91geGGM79Px6k69ulFXoYGQcGcrUY4mcdW6tNbxVvSXM5CFBq4GPrtRKjQKMIycpZouBcuHlzkrZJucFObdB3GAeQnA-CQzf3QhoD1tl5m4yRzdiTDTXlrnqq9Mbi4ie9KHdbOtqofa3P0gz_GlgaWK7r6soRqi_pDHgeuN-sgcWHUlP-3MRTJlY9MfPtHMbEzsRiOnfKLCc8yLKhn6TqxwaWNmv7vEKMoUz3lP3AEH-b659XvDT8BAAA___ksmIB) in the 19th century due to overhunting and westward expansion. Conservation efforts have since increased their numbers, with about 30,000 bison now residing on tribal lands. Organizations like the [National Wildlife Federation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fu6yAUxvGnwZstOJgQBoZ7K3lq2qVSRgvMITkqMRHQOHn7Ktk7fdv30_94mA-OEq2nD3dB2-4xz8Bh7AX0oOfgKD3msQvW82BEh1ZoqcAYKcbubJXXchfNosXC0WhEVCMsygEGY7iUHdnnmQDQQkglYNhzpb2HEMN-2Xmv2cgxUMtlaGdseHc1pke-YRmWfOmSPbd2rUz-YzAxmLZtG9YtDrmcGEyfP6U_5vLNYDpSCoki9m95rVhurlFeGUz_qb72q5B3qX93a6hdseG6UUpUd0__dHGUXlz7s_9m4TcAAP__Fcld1A) and the InterTribal Buffalo Council have facilitated the process of transferring bison from preserves to 6.3 million acres of federally recognized tribal land. However, the high costs of acquiring and managing bison are challenging for independent ranchers like Pogue, who paid $12,000 for her first herd of six bison. For her and other Indigenous ranchers, however, the cost is worth it to reclaim a [part of their cultural identity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L3OozAQheGrgW4iPJifFC62SfdtuyUa20M8ksHI9pLk7lek3_7o0avz52f5IYmyP3_Txqa-17RghxoUAk6LJ4mfRbfe2M7fVctGTf2A93uvdBsMW736aR5nnh11ltD2PGo9eDU4rdzairkwhTgp1Q8Kb3M3TNaiX_3sRmunRnfspaZ8q4Erv6ms8ZNOzjeXtjaaUOtRmv5Xg48GHzWwS_vJuVCVtF-bBh9WStqBMkMhl9lDTbBTlZOBNs7iaC9g_1ZgcgFqFssQqIDUAum1QznYCUXIHL9sCXJcRg28ASqFA7bZ-OMlMUoZr-bnRhK_ifW_n50G_wUAAP__85RyUg) and improve the ecological health of native grasslands, which have become more biodiverse with the reintroduction of bison.
## Beyonce Halftime Show Sparks Social Media Buzz
The Baltimore Ravens [dominated the Houston Texans](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vxCAMhn9NsjkC53tg6JLtunaMIJDDEoEo0OPy7yvauZNlW8-rR-_XY31IcuSfn_IwIr33sCLDDjgCjquW5O61q7VQTM-8NoKPbY_z3PKutoIxuakB1YSDUuPEzNANio1y5sPMZM9qEiWMI46ctz3HZmL9qBTqXU9bYaqOGU0pXE2yJpm3jLu7w8tczRaO2gmb0hmr9qPCpcIl59xEKq8KF7-7CpfC-FhWk8uw4Tum4OHvDpGO093gQ4Lg4ZQXZEoW5L6BMjHBJV_GR9gsmT2CIudifQl9ZnKO4lD8nock96uT_u3nJfAnAAD__6lZaeQ) in the second of two Christmas Day NFL games broadcast on Netflix. They took down the AFC South division champs 31-2, and their star quarterback, Lamar Jackson, broke Michael Vick's all-time career rushing record for quarterbacks. While the Texans' dismal play left fans pessimistic about their chances of success in the playoffs, the [Super Bowl-caliber halftime performance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGPhCAUBOBfox0beYBoQXGN3V57peHBYyXBZYNkWf_9xeuvnsl8mZ_7ercxxefj2-5k6ifkFQaQjAMDvXob07nK3hsc_Mx7MlwLBfMsuOw3M-oJ5YzKC-uklsr5cUKyAdVsUSD00VxjHEBzLhSH2zQojQg--MmNiLqTA_lYc7nVjSp97BHSmd9Ubi7vfTJbra-jE18dLB0srbWr14p9XXkHC9KZn47YZlOocSd2bLmxJ9WQ4oe53DCfzNlSqXSw9MX4V4spxWO86MduY_qT6r_X3wZ-AwAA__8axF3S) by Houston native Beyonce generated buzz about a controversial NFL rule. Beyonce took the stage to perform several songs from her Grammy-nominated _Cowboy Carter_ album released earlier this year, marking the first time she's given a live performance showcasing songs from her foray into country music. Dressed in white attire and wearing a cowboy hat and boots, the singer entered the field atop a white horse [surrounded by lowrider convertibles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuupDAMxvGngc6IOOFWpNhmurPtlighDrEUYJSEYXj71eylPL31k__fr6_5y3Dkff1pNtLl7Y8ZW1QgEHCYneF4z6p22rZuEjVpMcgOp0kKVQe9yB7F4I2UXT8J247DpJRqlVTj6J3sa9YfTCAOQshOYDO23WAtOu_Gpbd2qFRLjsuRmhKo0NtkH-_jRalZjq2OOpTyzJX8UeGjwsd1XY09M--UM--Z3d-7Ch-W7mNfCJaQOJfNZNip-MhvCCb6whsBmVwoAa1rBkfFcMxwHydsnDM5-FddofxvPSn5I23k4OISIFACZ841fBQbTwJ-3SDrpN3z4hg595-cdTMc_3xfvp3zpfF3AAAA__8PxXrQ) before being joined on stage by her 12-year-old daughter Blue Ivy. At one point during the show, she [made a pistol gesture](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfA5sjfDgGBg9d2NK1IzrbZ2L1YiPjJuHfV3Tv_J6ePr2v23LDyDGtn_ggU98hL9CBEhIEDIvHyMeiWm9s5yfZkpFDf4Vp6qVq7wYDStWPpIIe-zDpUaJGpaVFDWPwto3mHJMAg5T9VcJl7K6DteCDH522dmhURz7WXC71TpXeuAc-8pPKxeVHy-Ze67Y3_UcDcwOzLdlGy3SGDcz7lkvdG5ix1OiYzgYdOTkS608SIaaVitjiXjOLFFi4gu7b51cSjphswRpzEhsl5Ho0MLfF-O0VmeOuT9r6wMh_kvrvNU8DvwEAAP__Z3FpEQ), sparking a wave of comments from social media users who noted the NFL has penalized players for celebrations incorporating guns this season, including just hours earlier when Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy received a 15-yard penalty for pretending to show a pistol in his waistband.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ8GuiB7DBgKF1d3lyrZdktkM-MwkoMj2wnJ26_Yftuj86fv-zJfLAferl_2Rqa8fJxBQHuScAI9o-XwntsajRM4ypqM1KqDcVSyrVfTCqus7twIiLoj0SuBdnEwIvYShrFmc5RJAC2l6iQ0g-i0c4Aeh6V3TletIOQSU1NWKvSy2Yd3fFJqlnirg1lLuedK_atgqmDa9725U8q0PArH7fAc6kqbt1xWzj4mx4i0VTBd2ZcjpqY5x0daaF4iUqU-Ps-yH87Q_q-TwfvOIXDujyfXm-XwO1z-JPE08BMAAP__941g5A) [**Be Inspired by Bold Believers**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ8GuiB7DBgKF1d3lyrZdktkM-MwkoMj2wnJ26_Yftuj86fv-zJfLAferl_2Rqa8fJxBQHuScAI9o-XwntsajRM4ypqM1KqDcVSyrVfTCqus7twIiLoj0SuBdnEwIvYShrFmc5RJAC2l6iQ0g-i0c4Aeh6V3TletIOQSU1NWKvSy2Yd3fFJqlnirg1lLuedK_atgqmDa9725U8q0PArH7fAc6kqbt1xWzj4mx4i0VTBd2ZcjpqY5x0daaF4iUqU-Ps-yH87Q_q-TwfvOIXDujyfXm-XwO1z-JPE08BMAAP__941g5A) For 25 years, Todd Nettleton, the host of VOM Radio, has ventured into some of the world's most hostile and restricted nations.

His mission? To meet the courageous men and women who have faced persecution for their unwavering faith in Christ. Todd has traveled far and wide to hear their powerful stories firsthand and to bring their voices to the world, sharing their extraordinary testimonies of faith and resilience. In his new book, _When Faith Is Forbidden: 40 Days on the Frontlines with Persecuted Christians_ , Todd invites you to meet these bold believers. Each stop on this journey will challenge you to reflect on your own walk with Christ along the sometimes-difficult path toward our heavenly home. Through their incredible stories of courageous faith, we pray you will be inspired to a deeper, bolder walk with Christ. This compelling book is free for you with any gift--simply [request your copy today](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ8GuiB7DBgKF1d3lyrZdktkM-MwkoMj2wnJ26_Yftuj86fv-zJfLAferl_2Rqa8fJxBQHuScAI9o-XwntsajRM4ypqM1KqDcVSyrVfTCqus7twIiLoj0SuBdnEwIvYShrFmc5RJAC2l6iQ0g-i0c4Aeh6V3TletIOQSU1NWKvSy2Yd3fFJqlnirg1lLuedK_atgqmDa9725U8q0PArH7fAc6kqbt1xWzj4mx4i0VTBd2ZcjpqY5x0daaF4iUqU-Ps-yH87Q_q-TwfvOIXDujyfXm-XwO1z-JPE08BMAAP__941g5A)!

On this day in 1835, the met at Brazoria. The lodge disbanded during the Texas Revolution the following year, but it was reestablished in October 1837. Shortly thereafter, future Republic of Texas President Anson Jones was elected the first grand master of the Grand Lodge of Texas. Abilene 🌥️ 70/46° | Amarillo ⛅ 59/37° | Austin 🌤️ 77/46° | Brownsville 🌥️ 84/70° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 80/58° | DFW 🌥️ 67/48° | El Paso ⛅ 67/42° | Houston 🌥️ 71/56° | Laredo 🌤️ 82/50° | Lubbock ☁️ 65/40° | Midland ⛅ 68/44° | San Antonio 🌤️ 77/45° | Tyler 🌥️ 66/53° | Waco ⛅ 69/46° | Indigenous Rancher Aims To Bring Bison Back Indigenous ranchers like Theda Pogue of Sulphur Springs are spearheading to their native lands, aiming to reconnect with their cultural heritage and revitalize grassland ecosystems. An estimated 30 million bison roamed North America at the time of Christopher Columbus, but their numbers in the 19th century due to overhunting and westward expansion. Conservation efforts have since increased their numbers, with about 30,000 bison now residing on tribal lands. Organizations like the and the InterTribal Buffalo Council have facilitated the process of transferring bison from preserves to 6.3 million acres of federally recognized tribal land. However, the high costs of acquiring and managing bison are challenging for independent ranchers like Pogue, who paid $12,000 for her first herd of six bison. For her and other Indigenous ranchers, however, the cost is worth it to reclaim a and improve the ecological health of native grasslands, which have become more biodiverse with the reintroduction of bison. Beyonce Halftime Show Sparks Social Media Buzz The Baltimore Ravens in the second of two Christmas Day NFL games broadcast on Netflix. They took down the AFC South division champs 31-2, and their star quarterback, Lamar Jackson, broke Michael Vick's all-time career rushing record for quarterbacks. While the Texans' dismal play left fans pessimistic about their chances of success in the playoffs, the by Houston native Beyonce generated buzz about a controversial NFL rule. Beyonce took the stage to perform several songs from her Grammy-nominated Cowboy Carter album released earlier this year, marking the first time she's given a live performance showcasing songs from her foray into country music. Dressed in white attire and wearing a cowboy hat and boots, the singer entered the field atop a white horse before being joined on stage by her 12-year-old daughter Blue Ivy. At one point during the show, she , sparking a wave of comments from social media users who noted the NFL has penalized players for celebrations incorporating guns this season, including just hours earlier when Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy received a 15-yard penalty for pretending to show a pistol in his waistband. | Flying together with our sponsor For 25 years, Todd Nettleton, the host of VOM Radio, has ventured into some of the world's most hostile and restricted nations. ## Poll: Americans Hopeful for 2025
A majority of [Americans feel hopeful](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAYhJ8GOgz8IEhBcY3dXnulQfhZuaAYZdfs2192--smmWQm3_dzm24-l7zdv_2KrqU6AQfFBDAwU_S5vCZFo0uIgJKiE0b2YK0CThc3q2ACCC2NNcAxRoVDb4WCJAefrKfZvdcEgBFC6n7obBw06jinEHttQBLFMeZWj-635q0tmMqrPvHoQl1pcUtr-0nkF4GRwHhdVxfmc8PrfPcExnckMPoVjxz8drK1HsiWumN6FObn-mgMOPSsLX5jH7K9lkJgpIeL-5VLyac2RPH76nP5vLb_LDwd_AUAAP__oqleSQ) as the new year approaches, with nearly half expressing confidence that President-elect Donald Trump will increase peace and stability worldwide, according to a new poll. The CBS News/YouGov survey, which included over 2,200 adults, found that 57% are optimistic about the country’s direction—up 10% from last year. Reasons for this optimism included Trump's upcoming presidency, the economy, and personal finances. This marks the second consecutive month in which the CBS News/YouGov poll has reflected a positive reception for the incoming Trump administration. ## Map: Credit Card Debt Burden by State
The average U.S. household carries [$6,140](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPtCAQxvFPg90YGEDXguJt7PZtrzQo4zoXXA2wGr_9xeuvf_LPL8_Xc3h6jvx-_fcruTJvA0o0oBCwHYLneA2mCm4mQtIVOdVqi11nUFaLmxurtSRtJqWktJ0hi9aqhx5HSd3cVuzumkJsldKNfdRdeDTUhHGegm1a1MJICly2VH9v_C4LzfHaDkr1tK1VdEspexb6n8BeYH-eZ31w_vg4-Z2Lj5zLPRTYr37fKUBZCPxByb8IpnSXYfIpQKCxAL-BDkoXfCBDLr4Q3DqBfZVc2E-OkXPTCiNfq-f4Syh_XXI4_AkAAP__px1jgQ) in credit card debt, revealing significant disparities in debt burdens across the country, according to a new report. The analysis looked at [consumer data](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyhCAYhJ8GOx34AcGCIo3dpU3pIPycJIg3QM65t894faptdr-d-b5uy83GFPP90-5oWjgWoCB6Bj2oxduYXovovAmIgLxDwxSXME0CaLcZBlYGKh3XGunKGJNMsTBZzwXVQrsumovGABRjfJR6mLwecfRrcF6OCjgRFH1sRxm-j5jbhiG9jieWwR17l8zW2qMS_kFgJjCf5zmsNv8U2_AqEJhduea9s8VXAnPG84rabMPae1xbv_4Wj_kN4DHXeN9a7YrxjzOmFOuoiKD33cb0vmz_KXga-AsAAP__Ucld0w) and found that rising costs have driven increased credit card usage, leading to higher overall debt and making repayment more challenging for many households. Households in wealthier states tend to carry higher balances but are often able to pay them off more quickly. Conversely, households in poorer states face prolonged repayment periods. For those making only minimum payments, it would take at least 17 years to fully pay off the national average debt of $6,140. Louisiana, Mississippi, Oklahoma, West Virginia, and Alabama have the longest payoff timelines, while Massachusetts, California, Minnesota, and New Hampshire have the shortest. Reasons for this optimism included Trump's upcoming presidency, the economy, and personal finances. This marks the second consecutive month in which the CBS News/YouGov poll has reflected a positive reception for the incoming Trump administration. , a majority of respondents reported feeling either happy or at least satisfied with Trump’s election victory, expressing enthusiasm about what he might achieve as president. Map: Credit Card Debt Burden by State The average U.S. household carries in credit card debt, revealing significant disparities in debt burdens across the country, according to a new report. The analysis looked at and found that rising costs have driven increased credit card usage, leading to higher overall debt and making repayment more challenging for many households. Households in wealthier states tend to carry higher balances but are often able to pay them off more quickly. Conversely, households in poorer states face prolonged repayment periods. For those making only minimum payments, it would take at least 17 years to fully pay off the national average debt of $6,140. Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dc31a2576d3437ebae181be940e004b&_e=5jbyvVU_vyJgB1XjgGDk0SIsSv1yV3VCEA_7KdOD-KOlM5Kv4qZ4x6Y17Xi7xHjrb8GxYwZHYbflKaBv5CBT83xD1wYErTLLibSWEvgOyA9yqf686RNHoVf0IbvQdGuwr8VUJg5LUPZdaFPwJvykaxWTHx7LN9kU0Za5p4l4Na1Yecjav4uO7eGzknY0HrwWb82KBExbPlMXCRIT2JO0HqS27kNKRCyzEaGSVX8cqu4bGbnTMrwLzUXhuKb1yOjJR4ny65NPQ0iT7ZJyI30UpfRa6bS0JBezMMJYgXVuQPkjz9rzprUVymzoGzUrj_-cx5QKT0yTz_7QVvUPqEMhAxm_5zj85_ievlEdnafsvwR8zLz2-xRcFVxBZKxbYcut).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dc31a2576d3437ebae181be940e004b&_e=5jbyvVU_vyJgB1XjgGDk0SIsSv1yV3VCEA_7KdOD-KOlM5Kv4qZ4x6Y17Xi7xHjrb8GxYwZHYbflKaBv5CBT83xD1wYErTLLibSWEvgOyA9yqf686RNHoVf0IbvQdGuwr8VUJg5LUPZdaFPwJvykaxWTHx7LN9kU0Za5p4l4Na1Yecjav4uO7eGzknY0HrwWb82KBExbPlMXCRIT2JO0Hm-UPZrv9e4Qpz1dSvY5fICNuc4QuXSgkWWlb8G9vcnPHjxlCLCPGqjjjAx7OPOh7HAyDhcvwWE7XvRYHZz5Cno3__U2ErBHh5XQGFTWHtprlZz1Fq7LsUuCXRr6uohaVfIAe_asluKXcKiOGVyo3d2ECSUBthwYvua4Cq2QXUr7)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dc31a2576d3437ebae181be940e004b&_e=5jbyvVU_vyJgB1XjgGDk0SIsSv1yV3VCEA_7KdOD-KOlM5Kv4qZ4x6Y17Xi7xHjrb8GxYwZHYbflKaBv5CBT83xD1wYErTLLibSWEvgOyA9yqf686RNHoVf0IbvQdGuwr8VUJg5LUPZdaFPwJvykaxWTHx7LN9kU0Za5p4l4Na1Yecjav4uO7eGzknY0HrwWb82KBExbPlMXCRIT2JO0Hj0JZVXguFRsWgW2g6KWCgUor6W5FLb74yjYgtNouanoVUPPRYKXN8ZxWxJonC9_y3TUHs0OIVKsf79JL9Wf2_a8YcKer1NubPbDVDcbrbdJB4sB8S4PWEEWqunuFz0voyRfhtrm_MeCMegmWAQyOq15khWsxCuh2K3XojO1EfAz)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dc31a2576d3437ebae181be940e004b&_e=5jbyvVU_vyJgB1XjgGDk0SIsSv1yV3VCEA_7KdOD-KOlM5Kv4qZ4x6Y17Xi7xHjrb8GxYwZHYbflKaBv5CBT83xD1wYErTLLibSWEvgOyA9yqf686RNHoVf0IbvQdGuwr8VUJg5LUPZdaFPwJvykaxWTHx7LN9kU0Za5p4l4Na1Yecjav4uO7eGzknY0HrwWb82KBExbPlMXCRIT2JO0HiHldUmqxmDEJm1LTFxSjCtBKEg0bza6lW22tDARBlAJR4IbMZhVHoHCyprLIHgkn_BNL624KLbg8Yoh3zo6sMJMBRKrg8MxhPBlxn1hRu-pbfViAbGzwaOCvXOmsk_v4MzXboKSAt0599qn5agrbCXNTwAkQdYdgvsQH7xa5X0s)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dc31a2576d3437ebae181be940e004b&_e=5jbyvVU_vyJgB1XjgGDk0SIsSv1yV3VCEA_7KdOD-KOlM5Kv4qZ4x6Y17Xi7xHjrb8GxYwZHYbflKaBv5CBT83xD1wYErTLLibSWEvgOyA9yqf686RNHoVf0IbvQdGuwr8VUJg5LUPZdaFPwJvykaxWTHx7LN9kU0Za5p4l4Na1Yecjav4uO7eGzknY0HrwWb82KBExbPlMXCRIT2JO0Hka-dKA7I5mp9e8szHPa-NJrHq3pkidJOeuCUzmX6N4y8jiNdNLrZDgu2kuVUkWKOgCKd9XcQr4QYJ0le-cN4cqh2c5udrrfEctFEkR9b1gOTwnnnZ8BB6Cy7XX6LZNAEh4Egjil5GVDrQbyvIk0Xo3dKUz3QH-tdBbTpXAHvd9A)**

clean_body: The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started. | Dear Friend, In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration. We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but . I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term. The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started. While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration. This is a dual-track process, and While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government: For those good people who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things: I'll tell your full story. I'll legally protect you. The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur. And to those bad actors in government: OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE. You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists. I will expose you. My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll. Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025. Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse. We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more. In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. ** Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Patriot
subject: PLEASE! Will you take our NEW leadership survey?
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend -

**[Sorry to bother but before you log off for the day, would you mind quickly finishing our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~ "Before you log off for Thanksgiving, would you please finish our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?")**

We're in the final stages of preparation before Republicans take full control of the government and we need your input on what YOU think House Republican Leaders should prioritize heading into the new Congress.

_A preview of our survey is below for your convenience:_
---
| | | | 119TH CONGRESS LEADERSHIP SURVEY

Due: 11:59 PM
_______________________________________

---
| | 1) Should we ban non-citizens from voting in US elections?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
2) Should we mandate voter identification laws nationwide?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
3) Should we require proof of citizenship to vote?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
4) Should we enact mass deportations of illegals?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
5) Should we finish building The Wall?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
6) Should we increase the number of Border Patrol agents?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
7) Should we end taxes on tips?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
8) Should we crack down on soft-on-crime laws in blue cities?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
9) Should we ban men from competing in women's sports?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
10) What else do you think House Republican Leaders should prioritize?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~)[**RESPOND HERE**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jQLoNT8E624sw3_bM5H4BA~~/AARclAA~~~) **
---

Thanks,

House GOP Leadership Team
---

name: History Facts
subject: Why Truman was forced to vacate the White House
body:
In November 1948, President Harry S. Truman and his family were forced to vacate the White House regarding concerns over the building’s structural integrity. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cbxfefb4s6ztszztkxjjqsfnwg6q3jhy0q3zdakz7ldzmmimhsedr9hblx80yptvdtwrlb97126h400kkw0i7rresqhx9672zvf5cpy6gf2zr7sd7max386kzsyk2yt5jzfgeublwes9p9s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [President Harry S. Truman was forced to vacate the White House for years.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n November 1948, President Harry S. Truman and his family were [forced to vacate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the White House regarding concerns over the building’s structural integrity. Truman had moved into the White House after taking office in 1945, but a series of incidents — including one in which the leg of his daughter’s piano fell through the floor — affirmed that the residence required extensive renovations. A dissatisfied Truman called repairs from Theodore Roosevelt’s administration a “[botch job](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).” Analysts also suggested that the building deteriorated during Franklin D. Roosevelt’s time in office, as the Great Depression and World War II forced FDR to reallocate vital resources away from much-needed repairs.
---
The Truman family moved into nearby Blair House, a building purchased by the federal government in 1942 to serve as the President’s official guest residence. Though Truman wasn’t pleased with the displacement, he also wasn’t in a rush to return to an unsafe building. The president authorized an extensive renovation that lasted from 1948 until 1952, during which deeper foundations were dug and a steel frame skeleton was added to the White House’s interior. Nearly the entire building was renovated; a balcony installed by Truman in early 1948 was one of the few elements left untouched. After lengthy delays, Truman moved back into the White House in March 1952, and spent the final 10 months of his presidency there.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Truman is one of seven incumbent presidents who didn’t run for reelection.
While the majority of incumbents seek reelection, [seven presidents](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp5j1u&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) opted not to pursue a second term: James K. Polk, James Buchanan, Rutherford B. Hayes, Theodore Roosevelt, Calvin Coolidge, Harry S. Truman, and Lyndon B. Johnson. Polk declined to run in 1848, claiming to have accomplished his major goals in just four years. Buchanan’s popularity plummeted leading up to the Civil War, and he realized he wasn’t a viable candidate for reelection in 1860. Hayes opted against running in 1880 having previously vowed to serve only one term. Teddy Roosevelt initially chose not to run as an incumbent in 1908, but returned as a third-party candidate in 1912. Coolidge — who became president upon the death of Warren G. Harding — declined reelection in 1928, saying, “Ten years... is too long for a President in this country.” Truman chose not to run in 1952, believing the country was due for a fresh start. Lastly, LBJ dropped out of the race in 1968, as his popularity declined amid the Vietnam War.

Truman had moved into the White House after taking office in 1945, but a series of incidents — including one in which the leg of his daughter’s piano fell through the floor — affirmed that the residence required extensive renovations. A dissatisfied Truman called repairs from Theodore Roosevelt’s administration a “.” Analysts also suggested that the building deteriorated during Franklin D. Roosevelt’s time in office, as the Great Depression and World War II forced FDR to reallocate vital resources away from much-needed repairs. The Truman family moved into nearby Blair House, a building purchased by the federal government in 1942 to serve as the President’s official guest residence. Though Truman wasn’t pleased with the displacement, he also wasn’t in a rush to return to an unsafe building. The president authorized an extensive renovation that lasted from 1948 until 1952, during which deeper foundations were dug and a steel frame skeleton was added to the White House’s interior. Nearly the entire building was renovated; a balcony installed by Truman in early 1948 was one of the few elements left untouched. After lengthy delays, Truman moved back into the White House in March 1952, and spent the final 10 months of his presidency there. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Days Truman spent as vice president 82 | | Year Truman signed a bill formally establishing the U.S. Air Force 1947 | Year Truman signed a bill formally establishing the U.S. Air Force 1947 | | Percentage that Truman increased the national minimum wage 87.5% | | Years after his death Truman received a law license (he applied in 1947) 24 | Years after his death Truman received a law license (he applied in 1947) 24 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Truman is one of seven incumbent presidents who didn’t run for reelection. While the majority of incumbents seek reelection, opted not to pursue a second term: James K. Polk, James Buchanan, Rutherford B. Hayes, Theodore Roosevelt, Calvin Coolidge, Harry S. Truman, and Lyndon B. Johnson. Polk declined to run in 1848, claiming to have accomplished his major goals in just four years. Buchanan’s popularity plummeted leading up to the Civil War, and he realized he wasn’t a viable candidate for reelection in 1860. Hayes opted against running in 1880 having previously vowed to serve only one term. Teddy Roosevelt initially chose not to run as an incumbent in 1908, but returned as a third-party candidate in 1912. Coolidge — who became president upon the death of Warren G. Harding — declined reelection in 1928, saying, “Ten years... is too long for a President in this country.” Truman chose not to run in 1952, believing the country was due for a fresh start. Lastly, LBJ dropped out of the race in 1968, as his popularity declined amid the Vietnam War. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/27/2024
body:
Elected Republicans, from Denver to Washington, offered greetings on Christmas
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends!
I hope you all had a wonderful holiday, whether you were celebrating Christmas or the beginning of Hanukkah -- or maybe both! The news cycle this week has been on the slower side, but we still have some updates for you below.
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** The passing of Lauren Boebert’s []()[CONVEY Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) marks a milestone for Mesa County, transferring federal land to local control and promising economic growth on the Western Slope. Meanwhile, tracking maps show [wolves moving into new territories](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as Colorado continues its controversial wolf reintroduction program.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** As President Biden’s administration rushes to [embed over 1,200 diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) hires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) into the federal workforce before the Trump administration takes office, the move has drawn scrutiny for its cost to taxpayers and potential policy conflicts.
**🗣️ RMV Commentary Spotlight...** Lindy Browning writes an analysis of [Colorado’s energy policies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), highlighting the impacts of environmental overregulation on rural communities with critics arguing these initiatives undermine the very groups they claim to support.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 27, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Elected Republicans, from Denver to Washington, offered greetings on Christmas](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
>From the halls of Congress in Washington, D.C., to the Golden Dome in Denver, Republicans serving Colorado paused Wednesday not just to take time with family, but to turn to Twitter/X to communicate with constituents on the occasion of Christmas and the beginning of Hanukkah.
“Jesus’ coming is good news for all people,” U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert said in a video she posted. “Believers and unbelievers, saints and sinners, Republicans and Democrats. Jesus came to this world to save imperfect people like you and me.”
Boebert is currently serving in the 3rd District on the Western Slope, but in January will begin serving the 4th District in Northern Colorado and on the Eastern Plains.
Jeff Hurd, who is the U.S. representative-elect replacing Boebert in the 3rd District, was pictured with his family in a Tweet in which he wrote “warmest Christmas greetings from our family to yours” and quoted John 1:4-5.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[After six-year struggle, Boebert’s CONVEY Act now just needs Biden’s signature to transfer land to Mesa Co.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* After six years of effort, Lauren Boebert's CONVEY Act has cleared Congress and awaits President Biden's signature. The act will transfer 31.1 acres of federal land in Clifton to Mesa County, paving the way for economic development on Colorado’s Western Slope.
* The legislation garnered bipartisan support, with Senator John Hickenlooper championing it in the Senate. This collaboration highlights the potential for rural development through federal land conveyances.
* Mesa County leaders emphasize that the act will create jobs, attract businesses, and foster long-term economic growth while preserving federal interests on retained land.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Wolf collar pings south of I-70 once again, as seen in updated tracking map from CPW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [OUT THERE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Tracking data from Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) shows a wolf collar pinging south of I-70, with additional movements into Larimer and Moffat counties while wolves are now absent from most of Garfield County.
* CPW continues evaluating Garfield, Eagle, and Pitkin counties as potential sites for the next wolf release, expected in early to mid-2025.
* The tracking maps highlight watershed areas frequented by wolves but do not indicate continuous presence, reflecting dynamic migration patterns.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[In advance of Trump inauguration, Biden Admin working to make 1,200 DEI hires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* With just weeks before the Trump administration takes office, the Biden administration is working to embed up to 1,200 diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) positions into the federal workforce, with some roles offering salaries as high as $310,000.
* Critics argue these hires, totaling an estimated $160 million annually in salaries, are an unnecessary burden on taxpayers and conflict with the incoming administration’s priorities to reduce DEI-focused initiatives.
* While the federal government expands DEI efforts, many corporations, including Walmart and American Airlines, are scaling back such initiatives due to public pressure and legal challenges against discriminatory hiring practices.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Browning: With hiring of environmental justice liaisons, state taking another stab at DEI implementation at taxpayer expense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LINDY BROWNING, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_During a time when state legislators are trying to figure out where to cut the budget because of the state operating at what previously was thought to be a $1 billion shortage, the Energy and Carbon Management Commission, previously known as the Colorado Oil and Gas Commission, has announced that they are hiring two new environmental justice liaisons._
_According to the announcement on the ECMC website: “We are hiring two EJ Community Liaisons. One position is dedicated to the West Slope and one position is dedicated to the Front Range. You’ll work remotely from home and receive a state-issued electric vehicle to make travel possible as you interact extensively with communities in your region. You’ll work independently but be part of a passionate, committed team.”_
_It appears that ECMC has prioritized funding for an internal advocate for “disproportionately impacted” communities pushing for a statewide influence, and focus on implementing those energy policies._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Garbo: Woman burned alive on NYC subway, the deadly consequences of open borders and sanctuary policies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C.J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 25** _A woman was burned alive in one of the most horrific acts of violence imaginable — set on fire as she slept in a New York City subway station, dying a slow and agonizing death as her attacker stood by and watched._
__
**[Delta County schools grapple with state-mandated gender policies in community opposed to it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| LOCAL | DECEMBER 24** _In January 2025, House Bill 24-1039 will take affect across Colorado, requiring public schools to honor students’ chosen names and pronouns._ __
[**Devotional: The reason for the season, Jesus and justice for all**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 24** _Why do humans care so much about justice? It’s a question worth pondering, especially during Christmas, when themes of peace, goodwill and fairness shine brightly._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🏥 DID YOU KNOW?** Many of Denver’s hospitals originated as tuberculosis sanatoriums, reflecting Colorado’s reputation as the “**world’s sanatorium**.” The state’s dry climate and high altitude made it a sought-after destination for tuberculosis patients starting in the 1860s. Health officials of the time recommended Colorado for its fresh air and abundant sunshine, believed to aid recovery.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “Each day comes bearing its gifts. Untie the ribbon.” — Ann Ruth Schabacker
|

The tracking maps highlight watershed areas frequented by wolves but do not indicate continuous presence, reflecting dynamic migration patterns. | With just weeks before the Trump administration takes office, the Biden administration is working to embed up to 1,200 diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) positions into the federal workforce, with some roles offering salaries as high as $310,000. Critics argue these hires, totaling an estimated $160 million annually in salaries, are an unnecessary burden on taxpayers and conflict with the incoming administration’s priorities to reduce DEI-focused initiatives. While the federal government expands DEI efforts, many corporations, including Walmart and American Airlines, are scaling back such initiatives due to public pressure and legal challenges against discriminatory hiring practices. | BY LINDY BROWNING, During a time when state legislators are trying to figure out where to cut the budget because of the state operating at what previously was thought to be a $1 billion shortage, the Energy and Carbon Management Commission, previously known as the Colorado Oil and Gas Commission, has announced that they are hiring two new environmental justice liaisons. According to the announcement on the ECMC website: “We are hiring two EJ Community Liaisons. One position is dedicated to the West Slope and one position is dedicated to the Front Range. You’ll work remotely from home and receive a state-issued electric vehicle to make travel possible as you interact extensively with communities in your region. You’ll work independently but be part of a passionate, committed team.” It appears that ECMC has prioritized funding for an internal advocate for “disproportionately impacted” communities pushing for a statewide influence, and focus on implementing those energy policies. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ C.J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 25 A woman was burned alive in one of the most horrific acts of violence imaginable — set on fire as she slept in a New York City subway station, dying a slow and agonizing death as her attacker stood by and watched. JEN SCHUMANN| LOCAL | DECEMBER 24 In January 2025, House Bill 24-1039 will take affect across Colorado, requiring public schools to honor students’ chosen names and pronouns. DRAKE HUNTER| COMMENTARY |DECEMBER 24 Why do humans care so much about justice? It’s a question worth pondering, especially during Christmas, when themes of peace, goodwill and fairness shine brightly. Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🏥 DID YOU KNOW? Many of Denver’s hospitals originated as tuberculosis sanatoriums, reflecting Colorado’s reputation as the “world’s sanatorium.” The state’s dry climate and high altitude made it a sought-after destination for tuberculosis patients starting in the 1860s. Health officials of the time recommended Colorado for its fresh air and abundant sunshine, believed to aid recovery. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “Each day comes bearing its gifts. Untie the ribbon.” — Ann Ruth Schabacker | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: From the Desk of the COO
subject: It's been a tough year for our military
body:
Match your gift to support service members.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[DOUBLE YOUR SUPPORT*](https://links.e.uso.)
---
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
---
[**2X YOUR TAX-DEDUCTIBLE GIFT
FOR SERVICE MEMBERS NOW**](https://links.e.uso.)
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/xdbZhGmmpds~r/QWxFRGMvYjhNdVorL0prcW1RcTNtQmllcWdhNDJNR1A1MlFNbWxtZzBtb3k5UnN3cmFMVGxJUVIvZDBUMCtlM1dGTU0vY3Fpb3JPaVRkYUV2NjZuTVJCeHRWcC8zdU1iVkxIVWJlU3Z3Y2M9S0/ZUZtVURUdXYzY0MrRFBYYjNRUW5tTUlVOHhGMEtVbE1PczhtNDlqeHpDSjAxd3lUK0xBdmNZMXNKRWxLTERNOUk2MjUwMmppOWp1Skl2UGhFYjc4VGl5SGl3NnQ0Q215S0)
[**TODAY 'S GOAL: $100,000 **](https://links.e.uso.) [GOAL DEADLINE: **MIDNIGHT**](https://links.e.uso.)
| | [DOUBLE YOUR SUPPORT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
You may not see this on the evening news, but it's important: **2024 has been a tough year for our military and their families.**
40,000 of our service members are stationed in the Middle East, and approximately 120,000 more are deployed abroad. I can speak from my personal experience serving in the Air Force: Deploying to dangerous parts of the world, far from your home and loved ones, is one of the most difficult parts of military life. That's why these heroes need our urgent support, and why I'm reaching out today.
**[Will you make a tax-deductible donation of $29 today to help us support our heroes into 2025? Your gift will be MATCHED by Leonardo DRS to help us reach our critical goal of raising $500,000 over email and text message by the end of the year-- all toward programs and support for service members.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/V7YEHrYYm-)**
[MATCH MY GIFT FOR SERVICE MEMBERS NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Whether it's the National Guard rescuing people from flooding during Hurricane Helene or ongoing deployments to the Middle East -- our service members risk their lives for our country every day. Now it's up to us to give them the critical support and appreciation they deserve. But as a nonprofit organization -- the USO is not part of the government -- we rely on the generosity of grateful Americans like YOU to help us accomplish our mission every year.
**What we raise in the next five days can impact how much we 're able to support our service members in 2025. That's why I'm personally asking: [Will you make a tax-deductible gift of $29 or more now? ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/V7YEHrYYm-)**
[DONATE $29 (BECOMES $58!)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-)
---
[DONATE $58 (BECOMES $116!)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $116 (BECOMES $232!)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)
---
[HAVE ANOTHER AMOUNT MATCHED](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC0mmjZfd/QWxFRGMvYjhNdVorL0prcW1RcTNtQmllcWdhNDJNR1A1MlFNbWxtZzBtb3k5UnN3cmFMVGxJUVIvZDBUMCtlM1dGTU0vY3Fpb3JPaVRkYUV2NjZuTVJCeHRWcC8zdU1iVkxIVWJlU3Z3Y2M9S0/ZUZtVURUdXYzY0MrRFBYYjNRUW5tTUlVOHhGMEtVbE1PczhtNDlqeHpDSjAxd3lUK0xBdmNZMXNKRWxLTERNOUk2MjUwMmppOWp1Skl2UGhFYjc4VGl5SGl3NnQ0Q215S0)
---
Thank you for your generosity. With so much uncertainty about the year ahead, it's mission-critical that we hit our $500,000 end-of-year goal, so I'm grateful for anything you can contribute today.
Christopher Plamp
Col., USAF (Ret.)
Chief Operating Officer, USO
*Leonardo DRS is matching all gifts to the USO through a mail, text and email campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $35,000, through December 31, 2024.

body:

Dr. Fauci Received $15M Taxpayer-Funded Security Detail for 2 Years After Retiring from U.S. Government as Highest Paid Employee (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/dr-fauci-received-15m-taxpayer-funded-security-detail-for-2-years-after-retiring-from-u-s-government-as-highest-paid-employee.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3ff27815ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/dr-fauci-received-15m-taxpayer-funded-security-detail-for-2-years-after-retiring-from-u-s-government-as-highest-paid-employee.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3ff27815ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Dr. Anthony Fauci with Katty Kay on Influential. (Credit: BBC)
By Illinois Review

Former National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases Director Dr. Anthony Fauci received a taxpayer-funded security detail as part of his retirement package from the U.S. government after having served as the chief medical advisor to the president for 38 years.

Fauci, who abused his powers during the pandemic and made up guidelines that destroyed lives and livelihoods, has left taxpayers with a $15 million security tab as he enjoyed retirement over the last two years – chauffeured around in a motorcade of SUVs and surrounded by a team of U.S. Marshalls around the clock. Fauci went on vacations, took walks with his wife and embarked on a national book tour – all while being trailed by a large contingent of taxpayer-funded security officers.

| **General Information on Congressman-Elect Bresnahan's Swearing-In on January 3rd and 11th**
---
| Good morning,
I hope you had a Merry Christmas! We are emailing you about two exciting opporutunities to see Congressman-Elect Bresnahan get sworn in to represent the 8th Congressional District in the U.S. House of Representatives. Please see the details below.
**Washington D.C. Swearing-In****Where:** Longworth House Office Building #1133, 15 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC**When:** January 3, 2025 from 2:00 PM-5:00 PM**Additional Details:** Please email info@robforpa.com if you are interested in attending.
**In-District Swearing-In****Where:** Luzerne County Courthouse, 200 N River St, Wilkes-Barre, PA**When:** Morning of January 11, 2025 **Additional Details:** Please email info@robforpa.com if you are interested in attending.
Thank you,
Team Bresnahan
---

_It’s Anna Paulina Luna_ \- and Radical Democrats will continue doing everything they can to DESTROY us, but just like President Trump - we WILL NOT be intimidated by women HATING Leftists.

They said the party of Donald J. Trump would never trust “a couple of women” to get the job done.

The hypocritical, **anti-woman Democrats** left strong, free-thinking women like Tulsi and I in the dust a LONG time ago. Now, ironically, _they can’t even describe what a woman is_ ...

body:
If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |

| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8c700c4fcddb47b5bc015198cb8421e6&_e=_Le5xsYJ4doD4helQOx31Iamoz3hA76w7paeog-WYA6qPt-DcZ0AUA2ZYmgNSHCd7etkmkxbnbN2Bvhep3yqOpozIqaoOAdteUvJrcpuqIyC5k_9gHZMO47rXdcH6Lu-1ywqtdQTScK5TyVr6a_pcOa8y4QfRWIdU28K8zzTbdcjpfi87_vZ0hZENI_vjqV3tM9IXxtyhnUJx0KsuZqT6MDJ2eUG83d0KQv0ygFtY1p-uPQMlDCM83ScAlk0fBn0m4LSNLk-wIkBeQclKrQrZBrJG_15zItc1L3jFg8X1XHwSeMQykljlmIR8xgpKJp8J329oxClbcVfxVheH-5F7nR5y1NS8X0d7NVnuGtvVjBN3ujV8EBKxwd-KEOFcY1Eh0qDoz8kJsz2x7f77NnNvw%3D%3D "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. body:
We have one final deadline to meet. Can we do it?

|
---
| | |
January marks a new era in American politics. Republicans take control of Washington, and House Republicans are ready to get to work and get our country back on track.

But before we get there, we have one final deadline to meet: **[our 2024 end-of-year fundraising goal.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a5a4fbcfebc94b1daa15b3914644a92f&_e=DTVPs6hUoTjl7-4S1fj08DGMGzzbtMVZxyO_xCRb9BGNHL0ICpVbUCfOjd8fKp4j3f72ezaqKAs5AOPf0w7tPZvk--lPL4YGq_6I4111ePYVzpM5ZABwMyRaJM9caTTWmgB-1HAGJFeOINSW_a11mJ_obtv2Sb9SfnEXumkRmTvm2Kl4fI9vCd79gSeHn6sCE0hzq64lneT1pFPAv8-vjL_6HC1ooS0c2k45iOzWdv_Pq-8PWYlHZq_Iz46_p9TYrnfoePfHecXflqlowMk0-7bt08m_XfuHyKyFR0CEq-OdSwjiUdvZE0d276bZblrVb5XuVmbcxUHFF1ARzzO_9ooldv-9UIkT56sbmB8KQh-4t9h3pZ2mfvy3bN0f4LES092DJUuoBN2krkU2lxAQa35Ro_amtATth7l3t8Dsw2Vwa_tmg0zIX0Ttc_xcQg-s "our 2024 end-of-year fundraising goal. name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: There is no more important moment than this one, Derek
body:
Here’s why:
---
Derek, In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make your first $3 contribution to the DNC ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. There is no more important moment to give — here’s why: In just a few weeks, Donald Trump will become president. And he’ll have a Republican-controlled Congress ready to do his bidding. Once Trump takes office, he will issue a flurry of executive orders aimed at rigging the economy for the ultra-wealthy, attacking our freedoms, and undermining Democratic progress. We must be ready from day one to fight back. We know it’s been a long year. We understand that you may be tired or feeling tapped out. But we cannot sit back and let Trump take us backward without a fight. [**So if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make your first contribution to the DNC, this is it. This is the moment when your donation will have the greatest impact as we prepare for Trump’s first 100 days in office.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241227_2407_fr&refcode2=2407_22930333_qk6ce8&akid=2407%2E22930333%2Eqk6ce8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241227_2407_fr&refcode2=2407_22930333_qk6ce8&akid=2407%2E22930333%2Eqk6ce8)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Personally asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39364%2E3422442%2EgU7-ug)
Derek,
With your support, Derek Tran successfully flipped CA-45 from red to blue last month!
**Now, we need to support Derek Tran as he runs for re-election** for the very first time. Republican groups will do everything they can to flip this seat back to red, and holding this seat is key to flipping the House in 2026.
In a competitive district like CA-45, early donations are critical to laying the foundation for a campaign—trust me, I know from my own experience.

subject: Unleash the Power of the Stingray - The Ultimate Defense Secret ⚡️
body:
Well, we have what you’ve been looking for!...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19497/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/d315ac17e9167f3449dbcca481f018d88bf7daf7). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

| | Dear Patriot, If you’re tired of feeling vulnerable and defenseless in today's uncertain world then you’re not alone... [Many people have been searching for a simple, quick and non lethal way to protect themselves from an attacker, regardless of their size or strength.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19497/6374453/ae1ddd40739180b5370c77f5f235e5daa9c69e97/d315ac17e9167f3449dbcca481f018d88bf7daf7) Well, we have what you’ve been looking for! Introducing the Stingray, the ultimate compact zapper that's taking the self defense world by storm! This high-voltage stun gun is more than just a weapon – it's your force multiplier, your ticket to safety and security. Imagine being able to turn the tables on any assailant with the simple press of a button. [The Stingray's 10 million volts pack a punch that will leave even the biggest and toughest attackers begging for mercy. It's time to level the playing field, my friend!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19497/6374453/ae1ddd40739180b5370c77f5f235e5daa9c69e97/d315ac17e9167f3449dbcca481f018d88bf7daf7) Why You’ll Love The Stingray: ⚡️ Power: Neutralize any threat instantly, making their size and strength totally irrelevant.

name: MAHA Action
subject: MAHA News: Join us for the Inaugural MAHA Ball and More
body:
Welcome to our newsletter where you can stay informed on all things MAHA.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_0)
---
| Welcome to MAHA’s Well Sourced, our newsletter where you can stay informed on all things MAHA, including the latest on the issues, MAHA events and updates, and more. We have an incredibly exciting opportunity before us to transform public health and Make America Healthy Again, and we could not be happier you’re here. Thank you, and we’re wishing you and your family the most beautiful holiday season and New Year!
---
|
---
| WATCH: First, a tribute. We would not be here without the courageous leader who inspired the massive grassroots effort that is MAHA. [This is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. – a lifelong advocate for health, the environment, and the American people.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_1)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_2)
---
|
---
| ACT: President-elect Donald J. Trump’s appointment of RFK Jr. as Health and Human Services Secretary is truly historic. With a lifetime of experience fighting for public health, scientific transparency, and environmental safety, Kennedy is poised to reverse the chronic disease epidemic and secure a healthier future for America as Secretary of Health and Human Services.
Take action in support of Robert F. Kennedy’s appointment and help us propel the MAHA movement forward by sending an email or calling your Senator to ensure his confirmation. You’ll find everything you need to help play your part in making history at the link [here](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_3).
---
|
---
| ATTEND: The MAHA Inaugural Gala. This black-tie gala, set in a distinguished venue just steps from the National Mall, will pay tribute to the tireless efforts and unwavering commitment of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and the MAHA heroes who helped shape this movement. This is not just an event—it’s a moment to connect with the champions of the MAHA vision, reflect on decades of hard work, and witness the culmination of a movement that will continue to shape America’s future. Email [events@mahaaction.com](mailto:events@mahaaction.com) for more information – we can’t wait to see you there.
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_4)
---
|
---
| READ: 800 medical professionals endorsed Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to lead HHS in a letter this week, demonstrating broad support from the medical community for Kennedy’s nomination. The letter represents the voices of health leaders across the US, including [Dr. Mehmet Oz](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_5), [Dr. Mark Hyman](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_6), [Dr. John Abramson,](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_7) and many, many more.
“Americans' healthy life expectancy ranks 67th in the world, while Americans pay almost twice as much for healthcare per person as the citizens in other wealthy nations," points out Dr. Abramson, a signatory on the letter who's served as a family physician for 22 years and has taught primary care and currently teaches health care policy at Harvard Medical School. "Epidemiologic imbalance of our health research (96% directed at new drugs and devices) and non-transparency of clinical trial data in the peer review process play a large role in sustaining our outlier status of poor health and high costs. This dysfunction can and must be corrected."
Amen. If you’re a doctor or medical professional who would like to sign on and express your support you can do so [here](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_8), and check out the full press release at the [link](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_9).
---
|
---
| LISTEN: One of our favorites – but not just ours, as it was the most listened to podcast of 2024. [Check out the brilliant duo, Casey and Calley Means, as they dive deep with Tucker Carlson.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_10)

FOLLOW US: Our Instagram is live at [MAHA Action](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_11). Give us a follow to stay in touch!
QUOTE OF THE WEEK: “[Now we’re on the verge, with President Trump’s leadership, with Bobby Kennedy, with real warriors like Jay Bhattacharya...of a golden age of health,” Calley Means.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_12)
We can’t wait.
Thank you for being here – let’s MAHA!
---
| Copyright @ 2024 MAHA Action. All rights reserved. MAHA Action exists to revive and empower a healthier America, free of corporate interests, for the health and prosperity of our communities and country.
---
| No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG4AEXJR0B92SGQYDQCT0G8S_13).
MAHA Alliance 8000 TOWERS CRESCENT DR FL 13 Vienna, Virginia 22182
---

**We’re disappointed but not surprised...** [ ]() Americans are FURIOUS with Trump for scheming to pardon January 6th insurrectionists despite the fact that they tried to overthrow our government.

If we can show MASSIVE public outrage over this move, we can force Trump to walk back his promise.

**So we need input from all Democrats ASAP:** | **[_Do you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241227_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22685%2E4449941%2ESraGO4)** | [NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241227_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22685%2E4449941%2ESraGO4)
---

[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241227_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=22685%2E4449941%2ESraGO4)

We look forward to reading your responses,
