name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan’s delusion knows no bounds
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
“Donald Trump has never been about retribution.”
That’s the line Jim Jordan delivered with a straight face in a recent interview on Fox Business.
Are you kidding me?
The only things Donald Trump cares about are loyalty from his lapdogs and revenge for every petty grievance.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241227_jordan_trump_retribution_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241227_jordan_trump_retribution_image]
Jim Jordan, who’s spent the bulk of his career as Trump’s personal lap dog, now wants you to believe this man – who literally demanded televised military tribunals for his critics – is all about fairness and justice.
Give me a break.
Enough is enough. It’s time to end this reign of chaos and focus on what matters – real representation, real solutions, and real leadership. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us fight back against Jim Jordan’s dangerous agenda. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241227_jordan_trump_retribution_link1]
Let’s be clear: this isn’t just dangerous rhetoric.
Trump is stacking his administration with loyalists like Kash Patel, a man notorious for pushing conspiracy theories and pledging to weaponize the FBI against his political enemies.
He’s also bringing back figures like Stephen Miller, the architect of his cruel family separation immigration policies, and Mike Flynn, who called for martial law to overturn the 2020 election results.
Let’s not forget Jeffrey Clark, who tried to use the Department of Justice to overturn state election results, and Sidney Powell, a purveyor of wild election fraud conspiracies who is now poised to play a key role in reshaping legal strategy to attack democracy itself.
With Jim Jordan already sharpening his tools to unleash this chaos, we’re looking at an administration determined to undermine democratic institutions, gut oversight, and target anyone who dares to stand in their way.
This isn’t leadership – it’s an authoritarian playbook in action.
Instead of protecting Ohioans or passing a single meaningful piece of legislation, Jordan is gearing up for another round of sham investigations and political theater, all at our expense.
While seniors worry about their Social Security, veterans struggle to get the care they deserve, and families face skyrocketing costs, Jim Jordan is too busy plotting Trump’s next vendetta to lift a finger for everyday people.
The good news is we’re not backing down. We’re building a movement to hold Jordan accountable, expose his record, and deliver the leadership Ohio and the nation deserves. But we can’t do it without you.
Donate today and be part of the fight to end Jim Jordan’s reign of treasonous incompetence. Together, we’ll take back our future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241227_jordan_trump_retribution_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

clean_body: alt [] Friends, “Donald Trump has never been about retribution.” That’s the line Jim Jordan delivered with a straight face in a recent interview on Fox Business. Are you kidding me? The only things Donald Trump cares about are loyalty from his lapdogs and revenge for every petty grievance. [] Jim Jordan, who’s spent the bulk of his career as Trump’s personal lap dog, now wants you to believe this man – who literally demanded televised military tribunals for his critics – is all about fairness and justice. Give me a break. Enough is enough. It’s time to end this reign of chaos and focus on what matters – real representation, real solutions, and real leadership. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us fight back against Jim Jordan’s dangerous agenda. [] Let’s be clear: this isn’t just dangerous rhetoric. Trump is stacking his administration with loyalists like Kash Patel, a man notorious for pushing conspiracy theories and pledging to weaponize the FBI against his political enemies. He’s also bringing back figures like Stephen Miller, the architect of his cruel family separation immigration policies, and Mike Flynn, who called for martial law to overturn the 2020 election results. Let’s not forget Jeffrey Clark, who tried to use the Department of Justice to overturn state election results, and Sidney Powell, a purveyor of wild election fraud conspiracies who is now poised to play a key role in reshaping legal strategy to attack democracy itself. With Jim Jordan already sharpening his tools to unleash this chaos, we’re looking at an administration determined to undermine democratic institutions, gut oversight, and target anyone who dares to stand in their way. This isn’t leadership – it’s an authoritarian playbook in action. Instead of protecting Ohioans or passing a single meaningful piece of legislation, Jordan is gearing up for another round of sham investigations and political theater, all at our expense. While seniors worry about their Social Security, veterans struggle to get the care they deserve, and families face skyrocketing costs, Jim Jordan is too busy plotting Trump’s next vendetta to lift a finger for everyday people. The good news is we’re not backing down. We’re building a movement to hold Jordan accountable, expose his record, and deliver the leadership Ohio and the nation deserves. But we can’t do it without you. Donate today and be part of the fight to end Jim Jordan’s reign of treasonous incompetence. Together, we’ll take back our future. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Quick Update. Please Read Now!
body:
This is a very special time of the year...and I want to wish you and all those close to you a very Merry Christmas and holiday season, and a happy and prosperous New Year.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I hope you had a blessed Christmas, and are enjoying a wonderful holiday season.

I want to let you know that many great Judicial Watch members and supporters are helping us with year-end gifts, and I am very grateful!

But I must tell you that we are carrying our biggest case load ever into 2025.

**So if you have not yet made a special year-end gift yet, I would be very grateful if you would **[**consider making your best year-end donation to Judicial Watch today!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71689&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

We could not fight so effectively for the rule of law and the American people's "right to know" without the support of great Americans like you!

Thomas Fitton

I know there’s a lot going on right now and your support means everything as we move into 2025. There’s a new legislative session coming up, and the work to protect democracy and the freedom to vote is more important than ever. My only public fundraising deadline this year is December 31st and I need to raise another $25,000 by then. = | | = Our mission is pretty simple: –Empower voters –Defend democracy –Fight back against disinformation –Support election workers. I’m excited to expand on that legacy and make Minnesota even more accessible and secure in the future. But time is of the essence and I need your help before this deadline. = | = Even though our mission is simple, what we’re up against is not. Because you're someone who values America's heritage

Dear
Fellow Conservative,

Because
you're someone who values America's heritage, we wanted to give
you access to this educational resource - the eBook "Moments in
American History."

This
eBook is a compilation of 22 significant events that have shaped
the United States. Each chapter dives into a key historical
moment, offering a concise and accessible overview that enriches
your understanding of America's profound heritage.

By
downloading this free eBook today, you will:

Gain
valuable insights into key moments and principles that have
shaped our nation.
Equip
yourself with a deeper understanding of American history to
better navigate current issues.
Take
a step towards preserving the essential foundations of our
republic for future generations.

Empower yourself to defend and uphold the values that make
America unique and strong.

"Moments
in American History" equips you with the knowledge you need to
appreciate and engage more deeply with America's story.

Click

and start your journey through the pivotal moments that define

Sincerely,

Kevin D.

name: Maurice Mitchell, WFP
subject: The easy response to all of this is to retreat and shut down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. | | | Dear Peter, 2024 is coming to a close, so I wanted to briefly reflect a bit on this past year, and share some of my thoughts about the paths we should be charting and the fights we’ll need to take on in 2025. Before we dig in, I need to ask something of you. We have our work cut out for us — not just these next few months, but these next few _years._ And I believe, with all of my heart, that the independent political power of the Working Families Party is a vital mechanism for the fights ahead. **[So if you’re already on board, please help build our organizational power by making a donation today.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLius7g-FIpntUNHfGv2S2FRF2LvxzijqrZkIOOtwzAMCmEMHxTDSQSw-qTU7Bs3yYuUYVfpXdmSYaC7sXJWdIDy_1uBSj10_4Up-aogX0z1nOvYec7dlHd2RhGcC0njlCoznWqb-VVlXAfkmtSaHC4hXiVDECIsRF6E7zFoXuWpl6IvHpHFylLvKFxHqlP9gZXYTy9mvKCi0A2IxConZACfcqXJ7wEZpt-HAZAztRRL18qZjLW1HLlvl3eEsrLRnYrCac1fDyKpBMPl56wirlyp2vrwT91QxOgWOhpk13kvXJ_EOwBSlct4ZvFLN4HP4cL9_Jx---SPFgKD9mXJ2vmFN-KYWKeH2nzBvhLEn-WGg/4cn/m0lYkRpwQsOfGbtWR3DiyA/h0/h001.T8gzLscAgdTQJAJcaBgKCPFDQKerMguLUsDJtS7wQE8) And if you’re still feeling burned by November’s elections, I hope you’ll let me explain why what we’re building is not the same old, same old.** First, the elephant in the room: the last month and a half has left so many of us reeling, and rightfully so. Donald Trump — an ambassador for billionaires and far-right zealots — won the presidency. And Republicans won both the Senate and the House. The easy response to this is to point fingers and blame voters. Or simply retreat, shut down, and tune out. And yes, while it's true that the Democratic Party needs a serious wake-up call — about their treatment of the working class, and their repeated desire to cater to moderate-conservatives and the ultra-wealthy — it is also a fatal mistake to give into despair and resentment. **What Trump and the whole billionaire class want most is for us to give up our power and surrender to their attacks.** They _want_ moderate Democrats punching down at staunch progressives. They _want_ those staunch progressives turning their backs on the party, too. And most of all, they want us to think that this fight is simply an issue of red vs. blue. **In reality, this fight is about the billionaires vs. all of us.** People all across the political spectrum share the belief that the two-party system is failing them, and _will continue_ to fail them. Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. **We can't wait around for the system to change on its own.** Both major parties have failed working people, and it's time to build independent political power — one that centers solidarity, and focuses on winning victories that families can see and feel. Not just at the federal level either, which all too-often attracts all the attention. But in towns, cities, and municipalities across the country. **So our next steps are twofold:**
1. Muster all of our political and organizational might to fight back against Trump and his Project 2025 agenda. The threats to working families are not to be taken lightly. But neither is our resolve.
2. Toss out the old playbooks and start laying a new groundwork to win back power in 2026 and 2028. We need to be inviting MORE people into our tent, not closing the doors on them. And that starts with winning over the same working class voters who may have gone a different way this year.

The bottom line is this: **having hope is a choice.** Yes, there is a real, unquestionable reason to feel scared about the future right now. But building a country that works for the people — where families aren’t struggling on the streets from exploitation by corporations and utter apathy by our government — is on all of us. **[It will take a mighty coalition to build governing power for working people of all races. Will you join me in re-committing yourself to growing our multiracial working class movement AND fighting back against whatever Trump and Project 2025 throw at us next year? If so, please make an end-of-year donation today.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLius7g-FIpntUNHfGv2S2FRBDKcodtQTrimKL6S8A3UXr0NP8lUFYzJouqe-O2A_WFT66DY8mxGfhS-K82MpufuaD7dlj6QB0HRTm5amVbj1JbOljRivDHZ2I9p938mHpUKeYxI4jQuHrDyVrf9Htc5buQIkf5B4kCzLCcio9mhTYaVeq23_w0DJOxWLSvFkWZcTpzVeuj_WW7KcYguL0f_NKdR-C65i4kwlZsI0NIGpjDeZhChRikUWkA-Wr6E4hNDcgiJu4l0Av9jigAlIOJ_fYnFa4Bdvh1B9HZCgTqyUhK4q0YnNpXChtzPM5YDcfU90ad80S3KD_x-6vVBmY6Kv8TdbbEfERz2eoC7EeGAg/4cn/m0lYkRpwQsOfGbtWR3DiyA/h1/h001.PrS9dm2g7bWsjlu0qmjwoVjeLT2-yjCWpsplv8VOBZc)** **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLius7g-FIpntUNHfGv2S2Fe7Q33OiKpWYYCPKSRFyXKaUHUv_PaLbZBKjDxyptuyLhzIJSOITQbVSJD96FTxS4YzQcYEbCwhvrLS5rK0xB1NId8ZCljoKIqwVsfdCw9c3OCf1j-ihfcA37UbabLN31Oek0T_r2B7XcvvdGhPIxwNV2dIkBu1z_u26LAEZ8efdgkz1pH0EkjRsqXqXaT2St9kW2N768azVN4fJeck0dhippU7dXE0FYceBtfdBNko9LfSwXoDP7rv49TSVlfJulxiB7-82CqOf5pWRHaMfRUhsB1G_LT668EsgQyfligFpC75VP-0yAID0aVvo3ch2RxHqtZ7K1W4no48_gjS0hTw/4cn/m0lYkRpwQsOfGbtWR3DiyA/h2/h001.pU7oO8vvsayidOda5TDljy3oKxiEFPASyQq3c5hMx3w)** With love and solidarity, Maurice Mitchell

clean_body: Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. | | | Dear Peter, 2024 is coming to a close, so I wanted to briefly reflect a bit on this past year, and share some of my thoughts about the paths we should be charting and the fights we’ll need to take on in 2025. Before we dig in, I need to ask something of you. We have our work cut out for us — not just these next few months, but these next few years. And I believe, with all of my heart, that the independent political power of the Working Families Party is a vital mechanism for the fights ahead. And if you’re still feeling burned by November’s elections, I hope you’ll let me explain why what we’re building is not the same old, same old. First, the elephant in the room: the last month and a half has left so many of us reeling, and rightfully so. Donald Trump — an ambassador for billionaires and far-right zealots — won the presidency. And Republicans won both the Senate and the House. The easy response to this is to point fingers and blame voters. Or simply retreat, shut down, and tune out. And yes, while it's true that the Democratic Party needs a serious wake-up call — about their treatment of the working class, and their repeated desire to cater to moderate-conservatives and the ultra-wealthy — it is also a fatal mistake to give into despair and resentment. What Trump and the whole billionaire class want most is for us to give up our power and surrender to their attacks. They want moderate Democrats punching down at staunch progressives. They want those staunch progressives turning their backs on the party, too. And most of all, they want us to think that this fight is simply an issue of red vs. blue. In reality, this fight is about the billionaires vs. all of us. People all across the political spectrum share the belief that the two-party system is failing them, and will continue to fail them. Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. We can't wait around for the system to change on its own. Both major parties have failed working people, and it's time to build independent political power — one that centers solidarity, and focuses on winning victories that families can see and feel. Not just at the federal level either, which all too-often attracts all the attention. But in towns, cities, and municipalities across the country. So our next steps are twofold: 1. Muster all of our political and organizational might to fight back against Trump and his Project 2025 agenda. The threats to working families are not to be taken lightly. But neither is our resolve. 2. Toss out the old playbooks and start laying a new groundwork to win back power in 2026 and 2028. We need to be inviting MORE people into our tent, not closing the doors on them. And that starts with winning over the same working class voters who may have gone a different way this year. The bottom line is this: having hope is a choice. Yes, there is a real, unquestionable reason to feel scared about the future right now. But building a country that works for the people — where families aren’t struggling on the streets from exploitation by corporations and utter apathy by our government — is on all of us. With love and solidarity, Maurice Mitchell National Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . | **_Peter,

Trump has declared he will go after the USPS._**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99348266/519638064/-699993791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmRhN2ExYzktNmFjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=15eG78iY7CKzr1yIF-1ivIyDJfeE9Id5Urkwf983S5E=&emci=7843012c-54be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=fda7a1c9-6ac4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16017524)
This isn’t the first time Trump and his allies have gone after an essential public service. They have been laying the groundwork to dismantle it for decades. Make no mistake, this move will be disastrous for millions of Americans who rely on this essential service.

I know how critical services like the USPS are to our communities, in particular rural communities. As an appointee for the Biden-Harris administration, I helped lead the rollout of a $65 billion effort to bridge the broadband gap in rural communities across the country.

In Congress, I’ll do everything I can to ensure our public services remain protected. I’m working with my team to prepare for the year ahead. [_**Will you sign our petition to show your support for keeping the USPS a public service and free of privatization? Supporter enthusiasm will help drive our efforts in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99348267/519638065/-699993791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmRhN2ExYzktNmFjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=15eG78iY7CKzr1yIF-1ivIyDJfeE9Id5Urkwf983S5E=&emci=7843012c-54be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=fda7a1c9-6ac4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16017524)

clean_body: This isn’t the first time Trump and his allies have gone after an essential public service. | = | Peter, Trump has declared he will go after the USPS. This isn’t the first time Trump and his allies have gone after an essential public service. They have been laying the groundwork to dismantle it for decades. Make no mistake, this move will be disastrous for millions of Americans who rely on this essential service. I know how critical services like the USPS are to our communities, in particular rural communities. As an appointee for the Biden-Harris administration, I helped lead the rollout of a $65 billion effort to bridge the broadband gap in rural communities across the country. In Congress, I’ll do everything I can to ensure our public services remain protected. I’m working with my team to prepare for the year ahead. | Grateful, April * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. I hope this season finds you well.

|

Hello Peter, The holiday season is such a great time of year. Families come together to share gratitude for the year that’s passed and hope for what’s to come. Homes are filled with peace, happiness, and joy. Unfortunately, this holiday season is harder for some of our communities. Many families in western NC are still rebuilding after devastating storms struck our state. And too many families in every corner of NC find their resources are stretched thin during these winter months. **If you’re able, I hope you will consider a contribution to[MANNA, western North Carolina’s food bank,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99348716/519638987/-1967130113?refcode=ea.ed0c7b0f-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.ed0c7b0f-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBjN2IwZi02YmM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZhLPyssovloGnn-boyQjxLSRvESMOp_UgAvjJ8Jeds=&emci=7cc0b4a7-e4be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=ed0c7b0f-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1049176) body:
I noticed something this week and wanted to reach out to you to check in.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Dear Fellow American,

I noticed something this week and wanted to reach out to you to check in.

We haven't seen your year-end gift come through yet.

We're really counting on you.

With the incoming Trump administration starting in a few short weeks, we have an opportunity to free the American people from the Left's dangerous policies.

Your support today is critical to make this happen before the New Year.

Will you renew your support for Heritage by making a tax-deductible year-end gift right now?

**If you 're willing to step into the fight, please make your tax-deductible gift today using this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5e8332b91d67421b9195f35c3efa202b&_e=S6tXrpVdwaIMl0pAzw98rNsQEhBIX3-9JmSj67UOjcFkUmjnburH39ua7mUgsDOnBU2xnaRGK-aLs_bK2CdKA8Qs7J-G3E14d3oi9mn0N_0kAAX5_JUOU0HepbRkhZoadynUE9XZrepeO2vTn7T3MeiKNbWSzj-hHAQMR28akD-6Ds7GnHlBXfraz_QW7HaY8XpUOZc9cTdyjvhF78rsFNDv3X7uIA5a59vJGomlxQCtjAQ_dQH_biKLDPO3RjO12ceKZI0S4LJdEs27bTVv0yl6LxfD8ImqPNDfi2_mTQdAqg49oL1f1j8HXl3et3vA0Z0EtP3a1zDGGNe4BclhX8r6V6KJUUvzw4hYoRpWcWM%3D)**

Please join us in this effort today.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director, Membership

**P.S. With the end of the year fast approaching, we must finish the year strong to promote liberty in 2024. Please click this secure link to make your year-end gift and activate your Heritage Foundation membership today:[https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5e8332b91d67421b9195f35c3efa202b&_e=S6tXrpVdwaIMl0pAzw98rNsQEhBIX3-9JmSj67UOjcFkUmjnburH39ua7mUgsDOnBU2xnaRGK-aLs_bK2CdKA8Qs7J-G3E14d3oi9mn0N_0kAAX5_JUOU0HepbRkhZoadynUE9XZrepeO2vTn7T3MeiKNbWSzj-hHAQMR28akD-6Ds7GnHlBXfraz_QW7HaY8XpUOZc9cTdyjvhF78rsFAdXYAK_p2ic1wy90V8XJCkELnVexx7IaPUmGPbnapsCsFKgwUFjgoBnfDqYPyyOMcFA__6ETBY9JwJWvvEsiQ14XHmUcVa_WKwsVhwVjSiABTRYDy2zehDKoWPmqs3556Tp0fskSM22k3DcMej7pQs%3D)**

name: Courtney Brady, Evergreen
subject: Building bold, unbreakable climate policies in the states
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Winning the fight for climate policies starts here
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3189642/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Dear friend,

The clock is ticking on a critical moment for federal climate policy. The future of climate progress won’t just be decided in Washington—it will be forged in the states through bold policies that withstand the test of time.

**States are where massive climate progress will be won.**[**Will you power this fight and 4X your donation to Evergreen Action before 2024 ends in five days?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3189643/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[4X YOUR DONATION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3189644/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Evergreen Action is doubling down on our work to design and implement bold **state climate policies** that can resist political attacks and Big Oil's influence.

We've already seen the power of state leadership through: |
---
|
* California's **zero-emission vehicle mandate** , which has set the gold standard for transportation policy.
* New York's **nation-leading congestion pricing system** , which will reshape how cities combat climate pollution.
* States across the Midwest proving that clean energy isn't just a coastal issue—**it's an economic engine.**

|
---
| But Big Oil is paying attention, too. They're funneling millions into state legislatures to roll back progress, and they'll use every tool at their disposal to block or repeal policies that threaten their profits.

We can't let that happen. [**With your support, we'll:**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3189645/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
|
* Empower state and local leaders to craft policies that are **designed to endure** —policies that are bold, effective, and legally rock-solid.
* Build coalitions that counter fossil fuel lobbying with grassroots power.
* Develop resources and strategies to help states lead the way on clean energy, transportation, and climate resilience.

|
---
| This is our moment to lead. **States aren't just policy laboratories—they're where the next phase of the climate fight will be won.** And we're ready to make sure that fight is bold, ambitious, and unstoppable.

We can't do it without you. [**Donate now, and our generous donor's 4X match will ensure that every dollar you give will go four times as far to power this fight.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3189646/87SdQ4wZ)

Let's show Big Oil what a movement with momentum looks like. Together, we can protect the progress we've made and lead the charge for climate action that can't be undone. |
---
| In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Courtney Brady
Deputy Director, Midwest States
Evergreen Action
---
---
---
---

---

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99349391/519641465/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk0NDNhMC02YmM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw-cdzD9iIOwCQ3uICPO96SBQ9D4DaRUWB5y4X6iP1I=)

| Every chapter comes to an end, and this one has been bittersweet — I spent last week packing up my Senate office.

My journey in the State Senate started in 2018. Since then, I’ve had the privilege to serve our community, work to pass legislation that made a difference and bring home tens of millions of funding for local priorities. Every photo, legislative report, award, and knickknack I packed was a testament to the work and progress we’ve accomplished together over the last six years. But come January 3rd, I will begin a new role to serve Maryland’s Third Congressional District in Congress, thanks to your support!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99349403/519641488/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk0NDNhMC02YmM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw-cdzD9iIOwCQ3uICPO96SBQ9D4DaRUWB5y4X6iP1I=) _Moving the oyster plates to D.C.!_
I’m grateful for my staff, volunteers, and the incredible grassroots network we’ve built from the ground up together — I couldn’t have done this without your unwavering support.

As I prepare to be sworn into Congress, my work in the State Senate will serve as a foundation for what I bring to the table — fighting to invest in our communities, protect our natural resources, and champion the kitchen table issues that matter to Maryland. You have put your trust in me, and I will continue getting things done for Marylanders.

Grateful,

Sarah Elfreth

* * *

| | As we enter the new year, we're building up our movement to prepare for whatever comes our way with the incoming administration. **I've said it before, and I'll say it again: I'll work with anyone across the aisle to improve the lives of New Jerseyans –**** _but I won't compromise on our shared values._** We have so much work to do on the issues that matter most, and Democrats will stay focused on delivering solutions, not fanning the flames of distracting and harmful culture wars. It'll take all of us together to ensure that we stand strong and stand up for what's right. [**As we prepare to close the books on 2024, I'm asking you to join the movement we're building by pitching in $5, $10, whatever you can give today. name: Voter Action Project
subject: The "off year" myth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_1&amount=25]
2025 is just a handful of days away, folks.
There will be elections in states like Virginia, New York, New Jersey, Wisconsin, Florida, and more next year.
We must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights.
While we work tirelessly to provide voters with resources to access a sample ballot, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to vote, we’re counting on your help.
Team, will you pitch in $22 (our average donation) to help our team reach our important $50,000 end-of-year fundraising goal? With your support, we’ll kick off 2025 with the resources we need to inform and turn out voters across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122724_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_1&amount=25]

body:
Today, my team and I are officially launching Heartland Patriots
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an exciting announcement.
**Today, my team and I are officially launching Heartland Patriots** — an organization that will build on the infrastructure of the movement we created together, and that is committed to supporting grassroots candidates who want to serve real working people instead of the corrupt special interests tearing our country apart.
**I’ll explain more about how exactly we plan to make an impact in a moment, but first I have to ask:[Will you become one of the very first Founding Donors to Heartland Patriots by making a contribution of any amount today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84652?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84652?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg)
---
When I first decided to run for office, I was told that it would be impossible for a normal person like me to run a modern campaign without help from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives.
But together, with support from hundreds of thousands of people like you chipping in just $5 or $35 at a time, our campaign raised millions of dollars. While billionaires and DC insiders pooled their resources to outspend us, we were still able to break grassroots fundraising records. Now, we have an opportunity to leverage the power of this grassroots movement to help even more everyday people running for office — and to help them compete against Big Money and corporate elites.
**[That’s why, today, I’m asking you to become one of the very first Founding Donors to Heartland Patriots: Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can today? We won’t ever take a cent from corporate PACs or shady insiders, so your contribution — no matter the amount — really will make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84652?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84653?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84652?refcode=em20241227-8695&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=8695%2E614464%2EPU-Btg)

You will hear more from my team and me about the importance of this work and how we can impact important races in the days ahead. If we’re going to elect leaders who will put working families and our country first, it’s going to take all of us standing together to make it happen!
I’m excited for this new chapter — and I hope you’ll continue to be part of it.
Now let’s get back to work,
— Lucas

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. | | |
---
| |
---
| |

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=952b0513cd894b52bcfc39c42f110373&_e=ndCbkunCjTK_GSPrQ2ftrSnstdooteb3FBds2LDNwLU6F_1q9S9QDQcEk-N8HSgjdsNe9I8Us9uZiJzFSaWPUDyKFffSuN-4q8VxF8wD5t2ruVx6rNWpaNxGacooF4frbCj0QnSGZjvX_WV-XqhGbzno5_kBZI69Ye3wTQGaMfM51Acux4M9VhBq918E8-BwEtwguQ5qYCoRapGLyTVMf8VgunUM4UTRX6TF8Qi1TCfErKJVJGEnX5OwNFHynFex8dThq0RGbU4ioCkbJ0s2ehOOXicNIQ9oKuATuhgBUxrH44l5r5okmgO0TB1Etk3KITNA3U9RwvY7ME7rd8N0bnAuA4vLEbcvFsFTYs_B2iRncwE9cJmfiiYAASc5LNraMQn4JP72Gi8FIN4IDIvRoLtNyWAKrpR-gzf9B2yVaj0%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=952b0513cd894b52bcfc39c42f110373&_e=ndCbkunCjTK_GSPrQ2ftrSnstdooteb3FBds2LDNwLU6F_1q9S9QDQcEk-N8HSgjdsNe9I8Us9uZiJzFSaWPUDyKFffSuN-4q8VxF8wD5t2ruVx6rNWpaNxGacooF4frbCj0QnSGZjvX_WV-XqhGbzno5_kBZI69Ye3wTQGaMfM51Acux4M9VhBq918E8-BwEtwguQ5qYCoRapGLyTVMf8VgunUM4UTRX6TF8Qi1TCfErKJVJGEnX5OwNFHynFex8dThq0RGbU4ioCkbJ0s2ejrckV5AyeGvJ8wEDrjJOz-U0qTKxzcCsO-EXLypHhdDWmXlAhBofdcLaV37NyVzfhcg7-Qa6yGnvbEsdv6UuYjznaFf0tolYwOsX5zNxAXH2tw5xkIBBBeRcD4hRZQmeQ9l6S3hGt3twJrbakw5Cbg%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=952b0513cd894b52bcfc39c42f110373&_e=ndCbkunCjTK_GSPrQ2ftrSnstdooteb3FBds2LDNwLU6F_1q9S9QDQcEk-N8HSgjdsNe9I8Us9uZiJzFSaWPUDyKFffSuN-4q8VxF8wD5t2ruVx6rNWpaNxGacooF4frbCj0QnSGZjvX_WV-XqhGbzno5_kBZI69Ye3wTQGaMfM51Acux4M9VhBq918E8-BwEtwguQ5qYCoRapGLyTVMf8VgunUM4UTRX6TF8Qi1TCfErKJVJGEnX5OwNFHynFex8dThq0RGbU4ioCkbJ0s2egfme-4n71I9BP6jk2YLuQAmRgxFuYw9S8eKhsa1xcmiPuSi4KKJL5dOzFlGJQDehghZ5XejxwyOVS1fQQ5mCm7F8TYvYbQatadldVdMYRYovA0gV2i51yqx_chGfb5ijDBo2A7PzavFKvtJ7BuOF8I%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=952b0513cd894b52bcfc39c42f110373&_e=ndCbkunCjTK_GSPrQ2ftrSnstdooteb3FBds2LDNwLU6F_1q9S9QDQcEk-N8HSgjdsNe9I8Us9uZiJzFSaWPUDyKFffSuN-4q8VxF8wD5t2ruVx6rNWpaNxGacooF4frbCj0QnSGZjvX_WV-XqhGbzno5_kBZI69Ye3wTQGaMfM51Acux4M9VhBq918E8-BwEtwguQ5qYCoRapGLyTVMf8VgunUM4UTRX6TF8Qi1TCfErKJVJGEnX5OwNFHynFex8dThq0RGbU4ioCkbJ0s2egL4cN9YJY10boshOZB4EqHbH0EwHh4VSPX4RpxyTLrNOzHux7YP9Q7g_vfXYY1hT21UoMrl7-bSd0LBVAFxz0zt2XxNvz81tg5p64Ac-UOswIJ2khkLnrJW0FKyxeagFF5UXnN3PkkS2RBVnSuQnOY%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Sign the letter 📝 [against the Texas GOP]
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=zKRJgDiNqYzDkJFSL7QxwWRUTLqcnf1UhiljeR6v%2BmENIJn1Uv06v2tR4cKOYQ0ITE210wYOUQ2z2jzSAthgZ1%2FmtLdvWip4X4Ekwl5rRMeEO4BaCtE2RDQXaw%2B8S4Hm6Wt4CZXged8zAXUJyFgQsGPfLMVCk9Q549hGZnjDEgKaxmN7z4SK0ZYAzTKW0lYGgBZcVgKBOcmTHSS3jv9ZnP8PpdjEalmsjMPS%2F40fTGwib70QIs5w438igmes0dHKGSNiRnFmbzeq%2FbuXrqhtTvWsDPzxMV4DSpN5LN80knAgatWFJ8fhfdDiCRpJZcdlTJj1xItnUoO6EepcxK1BZKKIvnIYO1ukV%2FUrC9IkkzJKRmva9LN5rkXworPwldHYJy2rusEJMv2dhXKFZic%2FHS4FnEWfOH8JpFXh9fojfq8%3D]

# [#]
Peter, it’s no secret that the Texas GOP has a destructive, hate-filled agenda that’s only purpose is to target historically-marginalized communities and attack the fundamental rights of EVERY Texan.

The campaigns they ran this year were fueled by divisive hate and fear, and as we enter the new year, we have to show them that we’re not backing down.

That’s why we’ve written the letter below to show them that we’re ready to fight back in the new year. But we need 500 of our top supporters to sign on to show we have a movement behind us. Can you read the letter below and sign on? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z5_JEzvHKkGHjqKv0Hz_GQ2]

Dear Texas Republicans,
We know your hate-filled, destructive agenda is a direct attack on historically-marginalized communities in Texas.
You’re dead-set on refusing to expand healthcare, suppressing the vote of Black and Latino communities, voting against pro-tenant policies, and attacking our transgender community, among many other harmful threats to our fundamental rights.
And although you won races in Texas by spreading hate and fear, we’re not backing down for a single second.
We’re ready to get back to work and fight back against your attacks. We’re laser-focused on elevating progress for ALL Texans — no matter age, race, or background — and standing strong against your MAGA extremism and hypocrisy.
In 2025 and beyond, we’re ready to come back stronger than ever.
—Texas Organizing Project PAC and [YOUR NAME]

SIGN THE LETTER ✏️ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z5_JEzvHKkGHjqKv0Hz_GQ2]

Thanks for signing!

Texas Organizing Project PAC

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, it’s no secret that the Texas GOP has a destructive, hate-filled agenda that’s only purpose is to target historically-marginalized communities and attack the fundamental rights of EVERY Texan. The campaigns they ran this year were fueled by divisive hate and fear, and as we enter the new year, we have to show them that we’re not backing down. That’s why we’ve written the letter below to show them that we’re ready to fight back in the new year. But we need 500 of our top supporters to sign on to show we have a movement behind us. Can you read the letter below and sign on? [] Dear Texas Republicans, We know your hate-filled, destructive agenda is a direct attack on historically-marginalized communities in Texas. You’re dead-set on refusing to expand healthcare, suppressing the vote of Black and Latino communities, voting against pro-tenant policies, and attacking our transgender community, among many other harmful threats to our fundamental rights. And although you won races in Texas by spreading hate and fear, we’re not backing down for a single second. We’re ready to get back to work and fight back against your attacks. We’re laser-focused on elevating progress for ALL Texans — no matter age, race, or background — and standing strong against your MAGA extremism and hypocrisy. In 2025 and beyond, we’re ready to come back stronger than ever. —Texas Organizing Project PAC and [YOUR NAME] SIGN THE LETTER ✏️ [] Thanks for signing! Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. For more information, visit toppac.org [] . name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A personal request:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/LTBDbgvvrhHdqbzDJP-U4g~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUVvHP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ2XS1m5nt4ck8FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-JslZPM-P5mh_a5lxwWOdg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUVvHP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~) Hi friend, Eric Sorensen here. I hope you had a few days of rest and solace with loved ones. If you’re able I have a personal request: [**We’ve set a modest goal of raising $20,000 to start 2025 off strong. Can I count on you to chip in $ 5 or any amount toward our final fundraising goal of the year – our first end-of-quarter deadline since the election?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-JslZPM-P5mh_a5lxwWOdg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUVvHP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~) | **[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-JslZPM-P5mh_a5lxwWOdg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUVvHP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~)**
---
I know you have heard a lot from my team and I over this past year, and I am grateful that you are still standing with us. A lot has changed over the past few months:
* Before even starting 2025 with Donald Trump as president, Republicans nearly shut down our government, and only kept it open after stripping funding to protect American-made products and investments in child cancer.
* * Billionaires behind national Republicans campaigns are threatening primary challenges for anyone who doesn’t comply in advance – _not very holiday-like._

Despite the attention on the circus in Washington, I am proud that our team has kept the real prize in focus – delivering first, second, and third for our district and Western Illinois.
[**With that said, will you chip in $ 5 or any amount today? In a district this competitive, your support truly makes the difference.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-JslZPM-P5mh_a5lxwWOdg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUVvHP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~)
Thank you,
Eric
| Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: “The Perilous Fight” - Your Guide to Restoring Family Strength and Values Preheader Text
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Dear Fellow Patriot,

My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I
have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American
families today.

Our new book, The Perilous Fight, addresses these issues
head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and
strengthen the family unit.

Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our
society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges,
our foundational values may be lost.

In The Perilous Fight, we dive deep into the social and
economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of
traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding
familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations;
it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong
family units.

As someone committed to the promotion of truth and values, I am
offering to send you my new book "The Perilous Fight" with a gift
of $45 or more.

The Perilous Fight with allow you to:

Understand the current challenges American families face;

Discover actionable steps to strengthen your family and
community; and

Be part of a broader effort to uphold traditional values
and promote societal stability

The American Cornerstone Institute is devoted to advancing
faith, liberty, community, and life. By making a gift, you are
taking a crucial step towards healing our nation, starting at its
very heart-the family.

Click here to make your gift of $45 or more and receive your
own copy of The Perilous Fight now and join us in the mission to
strengthen American families.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

Founder and Chairman

American Cornerstone Institute

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of
promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty,
helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and
developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in
society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's
citizens.

Copyright © 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights
reserved.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is
important to us. It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect
your privacy and comply with any applicable law and regulation
regarding any personal information we may collect about you,
including across our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market
Street # 114
City: Leesburg

State: Virginia

Zip Code: 20176

Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

You were added to the system August 17, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/p/iWyJelSWSN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/p/oWyJelSWSN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Senator Jennifer B. Boysko
subject: Call to Action! Kannan needs our help
body:
**Hello Friend! Right now, thousands of Virginians are already casting their votes in the pivotal special election that will decide control of our State Senate. With Democrats holding a slim one-seat majority, we’ve been tackling the issues that matter most to Virginians: lowering costs, protecting reproductive rights, investing in public education, and so much more.**
**Our Democratic Senate Majority and everything we care about rests on this election. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting my friend, Kannan Srinivasan, for State Senate District 32. **
**Kannan and his dedicated team have been working tirelessly to engage voters as we approach the final two weekends before Election Day on January 7th! Exciting news—this Saturday, December 28th, marks the first day of Saturday voting! If you’re a resident of SD-32, you can cast your early vote this Saturday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM at one of the following locations:**
* **Loudoun Office of Elections (750 Miller Drive, Suite 150, Leesburg, 20175) **
* **Claude Moore Recreation Center (46105 Loudoun Park Lane, Sterling, 20164)**
* **Dulles South Recreation Center (24950 Riding Center Drive, Chantilly, 20152)**

**Kannan and his team are counting on our support to get voters to the polls. Join them for canvassing and phone banking opportunities all weekend as they work to turn out the vote and secure victory!**

* **Saturday, December 28th at 10:00 AM:[Canvass Launch with Virginia & Loudoun Young Democrats feat. Loudoun Democratic Committee! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99353517/519654238/1180023428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJmNjM3YTUtNzBjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HTCn-elA_80NxJP8YjBKRqcpmI_ngDxnclfyqzJdrcA=&emci=1cf05556-66c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b2f637a5-70c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=22486556)**
* **Saturday, December 28th at 12:00 PM:[Door Knock with the Democratic Asian Americans of Virginia! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99353518/519654239/-145124960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJmNjM3YTUtNzBjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HTCn-elA_80NxJP8YjBKRqcpmI_ngDxnclfyqzJdrcA=&emci=1cf05556-66c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b2f637a5-70c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=22486556)**

**[MORE VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99353519/519654241/856529108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJmNjM3YTUtNzBjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HTCn-elA_80NxJP8YjBKRqcpmI_ngDxnclfyqzJdrcA=&emci=1cf05556-66c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b2f637a5-70c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=22486556)**

**Out of town or unable to volunteer? You can still make a difference by[donating to Kannan’s campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99353520/519654242/1191396683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJmNjM3YTUtNzBjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HTCn-elA_80NxJP8YjBKRqcpmI_ngDxnclfyqzJdrcA=)! Your contribution will help ensure every voter’s voice is heard as we fight to secure a Democratic Senate Majority and kick off the New Year strong! **

**I'd be so grateful if you would help in whatever capacity you can. Our Senate Majority depends on this important race.**

**Kindest regards,**
**Jennifer**

Herndon, VA 20172
United States

clean_body: Additional match for Sonoma Coast Redwoods Dear Peter, We have exciting news! The Troper Wojcicki Foundation has generously offered to match your gift up to $200,000. With our already existing $1 Million Match from the Schuman Family Foundation, your gift will now have triple the impact for Sonoma Coast Redwoods. You can see our progress. We’re getting close to safeguarding this stunning piece of redwood forest along the California coast – but we need your donation to help us make the most of this opportunity. The triple match means your You’ll help secure a future for the stunningly beautiful Sonoma Coast Redwoods, and the diversity of wildlife that call this place home. body:
| | | Y'all...Ohio and Florida. **Ohio and freakin' Florida!**

As pissed as I am that Trump and his followers are gonna be back in charge, they could be giving us two HUGE chances to take back the Senate.

Putting JD Vance's and Marco Rubio's seats up for grabs in special elections? I mean, they might as well be handing us a personalized invitation to get right back in this!

And you know what? We've gotta reply HELL YES! If you agree, **[chip in $5 before our end-of-year deadline to fight for every seat and say "sorry Donald Trump, but we're gonna win back the Senate!!" Your gift will even be TRIPLED to $15 until the deadline>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20852?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241227-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241227-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19174%2E9716520%2EJ0zcR7)**

Pretty soon, JD Vance and Marco Rubio could be out of the Senate. And that means their seats in Ohio and Florida could be back on the ballot YEARS before anyone expected. **If you want to be one of the FIRST people to take a stand to win seats like those, you've got to do it NOW!**

**So are we gonna do this or what?!** We could be looking at a once-in-a-presidency chance to STOP Trump, but it'll ONLY work if we take advantage. **We need all hands on deck, so don't wait another moment:**

**[If we pull this off, it could be LIGHTS OUT for the GOP. So please, my friends at the DSCC and I are counting on you: Chip in $5 (becomes $15) to help Democrats win and _take back the Senate majority from Donald Trump's allies!_](https://go.dscc.org/go/20852?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241227-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241227-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19174%2E9716520%2EJ0zcR7)**

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Happy New Year!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Happy New Year!**_
---
Friends, As we bid farewell to 2024 and welcome 2025 with open hearts, I hope this message finds you reflecting on a Christmas season spent with family and friends. The holidays are a time for gratitude, togetherness, and hope for the future, and I trust that yours was filled with love and celebration.

Looking ahead, we are excited for the opportunities this new year brings for our party and the future of Indiana. Together, we will continue working to build a brighter future for our state and our communities. Going into 2025, the Indiana GOP will be hiring Spring interns. If you know any ambitious young Republicans, please send them our way! To apply, [click here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c710aeee877548389b5cd03657275c76&_e=lckRoDZnmC4Jrw9v4KOrltk03srxw1VokWhnxyyy0G1rgTZm4HNR6vjlxavHN7Qz1Mmf-cT-WL3fjgZmEkq4Fcv4K2uLGCD_K-Zs0T1lmztQVoCwIxaM9UdUGqtXw8l_ekfIhJKKxJUjolaNKXgn0YjHgITeJ3SbslM6yR9Ifd7QeyKnwMYHWg9K0wzMs0vegSpgwwjgDDC44_huPeJaCw%3D%3D)!

On behalf of the Indiana Republican Party, I wish you and your loved ones a happy, healthy, and prosperous New Year. Thank you for your dedication, and I look forward to the great steps we take in 2025.

Thank you for all you do!
---
| |
---
| | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor-Elect Mike Braun Wishes Hoosiers a Merry Christmas**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [wished](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c710aeee877548389b5cd03657275c76&_e=lckRoDZnmC4Jrw9v4KOrlhjlv11NkOUTRF4ICmsLAX6nYsjR-DRBiW6JjDqNcydqbHOW4VUXVERanYr2LsE_ZYkDzc5vtRLxpDs7Gu6esX4lbShBLINE62jHWyIy8vzREjlEVMtUH012s5WFUUGXgV9MNe3uIRul0plKzr0EJsVxIviF9aBJkdE_372fPgY-FaNtFxbwHvZkISyeZyGA_oQHCAonzJscXcFW7PKefntVPFi-UdbBPhAP_AbQJCip) all Hoosiers a Merry Christmas. **What's he saying** : "Wishing Hoosiers a Merry Christmas and a joyful holiday season! I'm grateful for the opportunity to serve and look forward to working with all of you in the year ahead. May your holidays be filled with peace, joy, and happiness. Merry Christmas, Hoosiers!"
\- **Governor-elect****. body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20786?t=1011?refcode=email-122724_v&akid=7443%2E5885482%2E9ZnawY ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

AIPAC’s influence is so massive that this year, there were only a few
races it stayed out of:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20786?t=1061&akid=7443%2E5885482%2E9ZnawY ][IMG]

Its first target? Progressives who dare to stand against the horrors
unfolding in Gaza. AIPAC spent millions of right-wing, pro-Netanyahu money
to send a clear, ominous threat to members of Congress: ‘do it, and we’ll
come after you.’

After spending $30 million alone to oust Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush this
year, AIPAC’s super PAC is now emboldened and ready to do it again and
again.

Bernie’s vowed to fight back against AIPAC’s clear intimidation over
members of Congress – but he can’t do it alone. We need to show that
there’s MASSIVE grassroots support behind him and those who dare to stand
up to AIPAC’s war machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20786?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-122724nd&akid=7443%2E5885482%2E9ZnawY ]While AIPAC may have millions, what they don’t have is all of us. Our
Revolution is fighting every single day to end the U.S.’s blank checks to
Israel – and to take big money out of politics. Will you chip in to help
us stand up to AIPAC and stop their money from buying our elections?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

mega donors and billionaires to spend directly on Congressional campaigns
to oust those who dare to criticize Israeli human rights abuses or the
billions in U.S. military funding that fuel atrocities against
Palestinians.

This strategy has taken on a terrifying life of its own. This year, AIPAC
was THE BIGGEST source of Republican money flowing into Democratic
primaries, spending millions to boost “moderates” over progressives who
have been critical of Israel.

The mainstream media keeps running headlines like this:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20786?t=1060&akid=7443%2E5885482%2E9ZnawY ][IMG]

But they’re wrong. We are the ones who are going to stop it.

Our Revolution is fighting every day alongside Bernie and other champions
to push the Democratic party to ban super PACs in Democratic primaries —
and we’ll be backing many progressive candidates in 2025.

We’re working around the clock to elect candidates and support policies to
stop the establishment status quo....all while mobilizing record numbers to

don’t work.

News Nation host Bill O'Reilly **[EXPLODED at left-wing clown Rosie O'Donnell](https://substack.com/redirect/a9524136-dc27-4cc7-a741-3673f1d5602b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an intense live debate about Donald Trump's involvement in January 6.
The heated debate happened just as the 2024 election cycle was really starting to ramp up in April. **[This did not age well AT ALL for Rosie...](https://substack.com/redirect/a9524136-dc27-4cc7-a741-3673f1d5602b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch the political brawl below:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a9524136-dc27-4cc7-a741-3673f1d5602b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a9524136-dc27-4cc7-a741-3673f1d5602b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I totally disagree with you saying 'he didn't have anything to do with the insurrection,' that he didn't instigate it, demand it of his fans, because he did Bill!" Rosie insisted.
"I will take a $10,000 bet with you right now Rosie,... that Donald Trump will not be convicted of insurrection because he wasn't charged with it," O'Reilly fired back.
Chris Cuomo called O'Reilly a "cheapo" for making the bet, since Trump was never charged for "insurrection," insisting he switch the bet to say Trump would be found guilty of nothing at all related to Jan. 6.
"Alright, you got that bet," O'Reilly agreed.
* * *
# **Fed-up mom SNAPS at woke teachers for shameful mistreatment of children**
A fed-up Georgia mom **[SNAPPED at her child's school board](https://substack.com/redirect/465f3e94-0295-4da8-8361-6798471317b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for pushing radical left-wing gender messaging to students instead of prioritizing teaching them to read and write.
"Theres a problem! A severe problem!," the mom told the administrators.
**[Watch the look on the teachers' faces as she tells them off](https://substack.com/redirect/465f3e94-0295-4da8-8361-6798471317b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for their utter failure to educate children appropriately.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/465f3e94-0295-4da8-8361-6798471317b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/465f3e94-0295-4da8-8361-6798471317b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Are you focussing on their ability to spell and to read,... or let alone how body functions work? Or are you more concerned about what they do with those body functions or their right to change them?!" the mom pressed.
This is the kind of active, engaged parenting that America needs to push back against the woke activist who have flooded our school systems and want to influence our kids with radical ideology.
Amazing job mom!!!
* * *
# **New York momma bear makes woke school board PANIC with genius stunt: "This is America Ma'am!"**
Another incredible parent taking action on behalf of her kids; Watch this **[New York mother GO OFF on her children's woke school board](https://substack.com/redirect/34011672-56f3-42cf-a15b-c67519e3117b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for pushing divisive critical race theory on students.
She's had enough... "Excuse me?!! You work for me!!"
**[Watch what she does when they try to cut her mic to shut her up.](https://substack.com/redirect/34011672-56f3-42cf-a15b-c67519e3117b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: The Boar Sighter
subject: Instant Precision: Now Available to the Public (shipping covered...)
body:
I’ve got something here you need to check out...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19498/6374453/8ee93da861b8e981cb561bfb4933d23122b782b2/01c65e50cd5220f9341264c9ee315a5feebe67f5)

_December 27th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
I’ve got something here you need to check out,

In fact, you’ll never shoot the same way again...
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19498/6374453/8ee93da861b8e981cb561bfb4933d23122b782b2/01c65e50cd5220f9341264c9ee315a5feebe67f5)
---
Because this new boresighter will let you zero in on your target with pinpoint accuracy, all without firing a single shot!

In fact, you can achieve sniper precision without wasting a single round of ammo or even leaving your home!

Introducing...

Codename: **The Boar**

Once reserved for military sharpshooters, this advanced sighting technology is now available for civilian use.

Take a look: The Boar is compatible with all calibers from .17 HMR to .50 Cal, requires no live fire, and gives you a perfect zero in just 10 seconds!

Thanks to an exclusive deal, I’m able to offer The Boar to you at an insane [**36% OFF discount...**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19498/6374453/8ee93da861b8e981cb561bfb4933d23122b782b2/01c65e50cd5220f9341264c9ee315a5feebe67f5)

While supplies last, I’m throwing in free adapters and free shipping!

[**Grab your MCG Boar Laser Boresighter before I run out.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19498/6374453/8ee93da861b8e981cb561bfb4933d23122b782b2/01c65e50cd5220f9341264c9ee315a5feebe67f5)

In Liberty, Oli Fischer

P.S. Imagine getting the best zero or your entire shooting life... without firing a single round.

**Zero ammo. Zero range trips. Zero frustration.**

This little device allows you to get a sub-MOA zero on any rifle, carbine, handgun or even shotgun -- 100% safely and from the comfort of your own home.

[**Get your MCG Boar 37% OFF here (Free S &H)**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19498/6374453/8ee93da861b8e981cb561bfb4933d23122b782b2/01c65e50cd5220f9341264c9ee315a5feebe67f5)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Just one dollar
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That is the donation we are asking you to make to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today.
#

Peter -
$1.
That is the donation we are asking you to make to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today. Yes, $1.
$1 because our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year is approaching, fast.
$1 because the number of donations we receive will be public and EVERYONE will be watching given the attention.
$1 because, most importantly, it will help Ruben be ready for anything once we enter the new year.
We know $1 may not seem like the kind of money that can make a big difference, but honestly... tons of people are chipping in their $1. Now they are hoping you’ll do the same one more time.
What do you say?
[**Use this link to contribute $1 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign. Your donation, along with others, will help us report a huge number of individual donations and send a critical message to everyone watching — our friends, our foes, and the media — about the strength of this team.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24.kYyuzx&refcode=em241227-1-90&t=1&akid=3621%2E734936%2EcnIaTt)
[CONTRIBUTE $1](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24.kYyuzx&refcode=em241227-1-90&t=2&akid=3621%2E734936%2EcnIaTt)
Thank you,
Team Gallego

name: Brian Lenney
subject: going in
body:
|
---
| | Take a look at this...

Club for Growth just did a deep dive into Idaho legislators focused on economic growth—months after the session ended. Unlike some, I don’t vote to chase a score; plenty of groups hand out "grades" long after we’ve cast our votes. So, according to Club for Growth, I’m one of the few leading the Senate in pro-growth policy. One of my bills, H. 572, which preemptively prohibited "Guaranteed Basic Income," even got a shoutout.

As for the bottom-dwellers on the list... well, turns out voters noticed, too—many of them didn’t make it back.

>> [See all the details here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=e876563b1b&e=dea908e0fe "see the report")

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S. **

The legislative session kicks off Jan 6th (how fitting). I’ll keep you posted on everything as it unfolds. Thanks for being in my corner—and to the spies and lobbyist hacks lurking on this list, enjoy the emails.

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&t=b&e=dea908e0fe&c=561a302915).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=00664fc1a4&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**
