name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: The news revolution
body:
It’s the end of an era. And I can’t say I’m sad to see it go.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_t=7S6BcjNqsEnSWF1zqrIgGWRghRcLxYjmr6AgYee6dUh1JAsAK08Rkv3eGitxazodUwQHgoYVGtDkgIrAiwxzzaks5BK1C6p7aT56-DVGyOlu5gZJdJWu11zj4OXb9pxM)_
---
[
](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWCgt12jaGGPI7HUyUpPIifER3Zptp2jeXYpZxNNa_vtrbILk2kfmq5T_lxd-7Hit8qtLePTsRkHbVbHuqECBXVPzuRl7gTT257CqvZgkO2IFA1H0dqIi8qCLUMGuRdzM--JUNQVFltL8uga1H8eAb6Z)
| |
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

**Big media is over**.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that [I need YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news revolution.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWCC3N3IE3v3CeTH2X8VjBZ0TBKbZIsO726VUmHsNstQyWJ-lZHKRD4gpuoaXjhXQEFo5_5IuOtE0Sp3JfTvF89Oqs8oqNdbCxwV1cTIr9WmZ4VI0x77DbzRgQi2SY2uE3f6O34fVKuHApbMqLmy6OKK)

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media. And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on _The View_ are already blaming the election results on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The _New York Times_ claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

[**Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for decades--with YOUR help!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWDTO4iFmYgzo7lr0X73IjgpPmBLB8pSuzdEpad2SSB4gm3jZB-ZZ-uNMkI0OQ_BQHo8TrTVcIwTNv7Ct4Bgx7jIRH1cGFwzDqr-A6chnWQuzV6Rrfe0iuEckxhIoiycgka7rtS6LsDtJwtaRIAzNOsM)

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk. We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWCTvuKmraoBq_DNC3L05p4UG4-faI54VQxTXJEcmV5vFf-oxs4P5JpfT8owN1uYX6jzAh6NZF91fqg2WmtXlMrganlOrhkdlU8vTTBWuo5nRtuMTFQnccQvCDIPsCjIAJYqNb7VhmKTQNvj_6k5Piry)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWAwpMw3jQh42l5sEcF_J7qkvY3c4a3L8Yto6cFz7uCsg9Sq7OqbmthsmLEjEG1qvkQg2b7Tb3WUpJ-V8e8Kv65oOM0aoDqwLw_aXY4Wp3vihLiTNZbwqFtSWJijfyEucpZu2zb4W6Pl4xsUSZ1iR51D)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWBgt6mUm2pmMqE0H_RMqeSxIN4uQrNX-jI-uWbeZ4UD5jSKDZxUWgiR5PD3UbC-TiMKHvbI2HiYWI4ALLQW9dvW4GmVI0XsNzzIKv_RkLUR14gN7o03x8_3adZW2g4bIQunTSB2FUsw_4t2vtnB-2nR)

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** The era of Big Media is over. But next year, as legacy media attempts to cling to relevance, we can expect even more attacks. So I need your help to provide all our outreach, including _Imprimis_ , the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on the vanguard of new media--standing up to the lies and propaganda of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more important in 2025.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec5598188bdd4ae7a6a128c7eb27dad6&_e=TfiNPiftOUcNY0Svj4tIZwwmN3ryGlX6DWvBFtXVlsxEfgaiGkc4TLbLuy25gerOBxvxAZ1GwdBImotnZ4VPQzL40hXx8pYIWGDU4xxbJYrkV8RNuqnqx2PKt8iFumcXf_2spkNdAkhKAf-cyOYc_nApieEgoZ7StcvobUPFcKqozZlsN2Ppf-70k7DSd9dIdmvMm6bav9BtMbYsFQrrsVgD_kJK4TpknD2RQttSgWBj6Vv3-s5Jth3Y-APqMh86CgttlZZ9I56qnmMF1gYPO5NM14S1yPCBvjHvSH2nx2dG9gm2hvInf412Dlh7HUBmv5Pqg0A9nzrV2QFgOhEGMOhmZ68X4F8Mqn0D-A-cmoEp1lSG4q5LQ7pujdRmyRHK)

body:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18307%2E878179%2EN48h9I). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18307%2E878179%2EN48h9I).**

Please accept or decline the invitation below no later than Monday, January 13, 2025. Ticket prices increase beginning December 18, take advantage of discounted pricing now. More info - For questions regarding your attendance, please email events@michiganstatesociety.org PEACHTREE BALL -Saturday Jan. 18 Black Tie, Union Station "Every four years, Georgians gather in Washington, D.C. to celebrate the presidential inauguration with a ball hosted by the Georgia State Society. Inaugural balls are a fixture of Washington's celebratory inaugural activities, with the first ball dating back to James Madison's inauguration in 1809. The Georgia State Society will celebrate the occasion with members of our state's congressional delegation and statewide elected officials, complete with live entertainment, dancing, drinks and southern bite HISPANIC INAUGURAL BALL: You're currently a free subscriber to . Hi there, it's Dan — JanePAC’s Director of Organizing and Digital Engagement. I know it’s Friday, and the last thing you probably want is another email. But I’m reaching out because this is truly important. **_[We’re so close to hitting our ambitious $25,000 end-of-year goal, and your support right now could make all the difference. Can we count on you to chip in just a few bucks today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99358211/519668997/2105508926?refcode=ea.a2afb685-76c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.a2afb685-76c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyYWZiNjg1LTc2YzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZVyYWdGa8Hd0m7eV74DMc2EwnT-XNTKXB6vgL7fRsZs=)_** See, we don’t send emails just because we feel like it. A _huge_ percentage of the money we bring in every month to support our climate champions comes from emails just like this one — from people just like you. Your support today will help us build a climate firewall at the city, county, and state levels to fight back against the Trump Administration and the fossil fuel giants who put profits above our planet. All of that takes resources and plenty of funding. **_[So please, can you contribute today? name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily’s Notes: Assembling the team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Hello and welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates directly from your friendly neighborhood Congresswoman-elect! It’s been a busy couple of weeks:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358402/519669466/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Hello and welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates directly from your friendly neighborhood Congresswoman-elect! It’s been a busy couple of weeks: • We made two significant hires: **Zahraa Saheb** will be our Chief of Staff in D.C., and **Katy Crabtree** will serve as District Director at home. I look forward to working with them and continuing to build a powerhouse team to serve the 6th District. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358403/519669467/2140780397?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358404/519669468/1053694925?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) • I attended the ribbon-cutting of the **Pacific Building** in Port Orchard, a 75–bed facility for unhoused Washingtonians with access to services including mental health and substance abuse treatment. As I told the [_**_Kitsap Daily News_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358405/519669469/1270298918?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442): This place is a special opportunity for us to ensure folks don’t have to live in the woods, students don’t have to sleep unsheltered and then pack themselves up to get to school down the road, and folks have a warm place to sleep as they think about how to rebuild a life for themselves. • **I spoke extensively to the _Seattle Times_** , along with Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Adam Smith, about our strategies for working with the incoming Trump administration. [_**You can read the full piece here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358406/519669470/-1045151280?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) I’m optimistic we can work across the aisle on issues like STEM education — but I’ll do everything in my power to protect my constituents’ fundamental freedoms, including reproductive freedom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358407/519669471/-1045151280?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) • In case you missed it, Zahraa and I took a road trip around _**[Washington’s 6th District](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358408/519669472/443574214?hl=en&img_index=1&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=&emci=ef4c09c4-41be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4da9ec39-77c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442)**_. We drove through five counties, visited the Makah Tribal Council, met with eleven Neah Bay community leaders, shopped at four small businesses, and made it home 14 hours after we left. The 6th Congressional District is vast and beautiful. The drives are long, the people are hardworking, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather live and represent. **Now, this is the part where I ask for your help.** I see it as my job to work with anyone in Congress if it will deliver results for my constituents in the 6th District, communities across Washington State, and our country. But as long as Republicans have a majority – our healthcare, our safety net, and our fundamental freedoms will be under threat. Speaker Mike Johnson has spoken about “massive” changes to the Affordable Care Act and cuts to Social Security and Medicaid. Along with Nancy Mace, he’s added new rules to make life harder for LGBTQ+ members and staff on Capitol Hill. And that’s the tip of the iceberg. **That’s why we’re laying the groundwork NOW to take back the House in 2026. The earlier we start, the better chance we’ll have to help great Democrats flip seats.** [_**We’re aiming to raise $25,000 in grassroots donations by the end-of-year deadline. Together, Team Emily has taken on big challenges and won — can you make a contribution to keep up the fight in 2025 and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358409/519669473/1938114812?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99358410/519669474/1938114812?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.27_DecNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE5ZWMzOS03N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHJMCuvniU7eWqEdJDT2ogTT5JjnTUurNkLtlB6JaRg=) Thank you for your continued engagement and support 💙 — ER

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let’s end the year strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Here’s
what you need to know about our upcoming FEC deadline in a few days:

This is the last fundraising deadline of the year, and it’s our chance to
show the momentum we’ve built post-election. Now that I’m officially
serving as your U.S. Senator, we need to demonstrate that our grassroots
team is as strong and determined as ever.

Donald Trump’s dangerous plans for a second term are already taking shape
— and his MAGA allies are prepared to pour millions into their agenda to
roll back our freedoms and undo everything we’ve fought so hard for.

We can’t let that happen.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]Our end-of-year fundraising goal is on December 31, and reaching it
will ensure we’re prepared to protect everything we’ve achieved together.
Will you pitch in any amount right now to help us close the gap and meet
this critical goal?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]DONATE

These final days of 2024 are a critical moment for our movement. If we
fall short, Trump and his allies will seize on any sign of weakness to
push their extremist agenda.

Let’s show them that we’re prepared to fight back and build a stronger
future. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us meet our
end-of-year fundraising goal.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2024_abs_em.qow-zo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=dec2024_abs_em.hc18Wf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2024_abs_em.Kw-e7E&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=dec2024_abs_em.Uyo2Ps&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=dec2024_abs_em.iHvqVy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for standing with me, every step of the way. Let’s close out the
year strong and build the foundation for everything we’ll accomplish in
2025.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8242%2E5257348%2E7sKBbH ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:
I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused
It's a voice America needs

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

body:
It’s been an unprecedented year from start to end

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=zL6MALP8QtNyQOXLnS29cdrrl4Z4%2FVovyqpJy8ONEwgSaDvdDox0ofkzGrbgHWa9RvwyDDzo4Mh4K%2BrWQTA657XyaQMZJUKpsXOmpFhz2pE0yHY3%2B%2BURU7W0eDw5Okc5b4GAoAaWcg92dG%2BmdE1jICHXTqm4DH3XCwzW%2F09utp0T14KHsJlUQpzqsy7uTFY6LHJgNUstRiP65ccoAKgKtqH8fwKF4E9JxLInkm9k9RxGx97tjGr%2BrclLK39%2FycFvYiBnhzJCgc%2BKrwsZ%2FzDL9No5Inri6vu5u9VaHdTm77KcpJD7QmY2vmNTYgkwOgXI5h2JKlmbMj2u8LHR%2FX50wbJ4BrZbXLncJp5VIrknqunLg%2F%2FBnlqg%2BAmkIn%2Bx64zwHApiczR8BLOIJxmVXVdK8wt%2FSFbsr0bnBwNvl2oF7rg%3D)

I hope your holiday season has been filled with celebration and relaxation. 2025 is just four days away, and I’m feeling reflective. 2024 has been a whirlwind of a ride, to say the least. It’s been an unprecedented year from start to end, and I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. Despite the results of the presidential election, I can’t help but feel grateful that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. But truth be told, we have a lot of work ahead of us, folks. As we enter another term under Donald Trump, we have to be prepared for every possible curveball Republicans could throw our way. We’ve proven that Team Vasquez is a winning machine, and that makes us a TOP target of national Republicans. Our final FEC reporting deadline of 2024 is on New Year’s Eve at midnight, and we’ve set an end-of-year fundraising goal of **$15,000** — that’s what it’s going to take to win the fight for freedom, democracy, reproductive rights and New Mexico. clean_body: It’s been an unprecedented year from start to end Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | I hope your holiday season has been filled with celebration and relaxation. 2025 is just four days away, and I’m feeling reflective. 2024 has been a whirlwind of a ride, to say the least. It’s been an unprecedented year from start to end, and I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. Despite the results of the presidential election, I can’t help but feel grateful that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. But truth be told, we have a lot of work ahead of us, folks. As we enter another term under Donald Trump, we have to be prepared for every possible curveball Republicans could throw our way. We’ve proven that Team Vasquez is a winning machine, and that makes us a TOP target of national Republicans. Our final FEC reporting deadline of 2024 is on New Year’s Eve at midnight, and we’ve set an end-of-year fundraising goal of $15,000 — that’s what it’s going to take to win the fight for freedom, democracy, reproductive rights and New Mexico. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

name: David Hogg
subject: There is no ceiling to the progress we can make if we stay in this fight together, Peter. Can you help us reach our year-end goal?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Here’s why we’re getting right back to work through the end of the year:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241227-1&t=1&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)
Peter, I hope you were able to enjoy the holidays this week.
Here at Leaders We Deserve, we’re getting right back to work through the end of the year. **We have a mission-critical $50,000 fundraising goal to hit by Dec. 31.**
**[Can you rush a $5 contribution now to help us close the gap on our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241227-1?refcode=em20241227-1579&amount=5&refcode2=1579_587540_b_H8SY&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)**
This incredible grassroots team has blown me away at every opportunity. What we’ve accomplished in just more than a year has surpassed every expectation.
**There is no ceiling to the progress we can make if we stay in this fight together.** We can have a major impact on the future of the progressive movement, electing young people who are ready to lead the way in the fight for our shared values.
We have already elected seven young leaders to state legislatures and Congress:
⭐ Bryce Berry (Georgia) ⭐
⭐ Nadarius Clark (Virginia) ⭐
⭐ Christine Cockley (Ohio) ⭐
⭐ Molly Cook (Texas) ⭐
⭐ Oscar De Los Santos (Arizona) ⭐
⭐ Sarah McBride (Delaware) ⭐
⭐ Dante Pittman (North Carolina) ⭐
This is an excellent track record for an organization barely a year old. That’s how awesome this team is – you’ve helped us reach seemingly impossible heights.
But like I’ve always said, this work is about more than any single election. It’s about the long game. **It’s about building the future of the Democratic Party.**
That’s why I’m asking each and every one of you to stay in this fight with us. Don’t lose hope. This work is a long-term project and _we are only just getting started._
As we look to the year ahead, we’re going to need to keep recruiting, training, and supporting the courageous young people stepping up to run for office next cycle.
We can only succeed with your continued support. **We are 100% people-powered.** We don’t accept corporate cash. We rely on grassroots supporters just like you.
**[Peter, the clock is ticking on our year-end deadline and we still have a ways to go to reach our $50,000 goal. Can you make a $5 donation right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241227-1?refcode=em20241227-1579&amount=5&refcode2=1579_587540_b_H8SY&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241227-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241227-1579&refcode2=1579_587540_b_H8SY&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241227-1&t=2&refcode2=1579_587540_b_H8SY&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1579%2E587540%2Eb_H8SY)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Here's my thoughts on how we can close out 2024 STRONG—be expectant for Him to move until the clock strikes midnight!

name: sydney@uso.org
subject: FW: Double-checking that you heard about your exclusive match offer
body:
For strong supporters of our service members
Did you see Christopher's big announcement about your limited-time match offer? I know you're a strong supporter of our service members, **so I wanted to reach back out to be sure you saw this exclusive chance to DOUBLE the value of your gift to help the USO support our heroes in uniform.**
With just a few hours left to reach today's $100,000 goal, we need your urgent gift before midnight. Help us end 2024 strong to help ensure we have the resources to support our heroes and their families heading into 2025.
**[Will you donate $29 or more now, have your tax-deductible gift matched, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $35,000, and help provide care packages, warm meals, video calls home and more for our service members?**](https://links.e.uso.)**

Sydney,
You may not see this on the evening news, but it's important: **2024 has been a tough year for our military and their families.**
40,000 of our service members are stationed in the Middle East, and approximately 120,000 more are deployed abroad. I can speak from my personal experience serving in the Air Force: Deploying to dangerous parts of the world, far from your home and loved ones, is one of the most difficult parts of military life. That's why these heroes need our urgent support, and why I'm reaching out today.
**[Sydney, will you make a tax-deductible donation of $29 today to help us support our heroes into 2025? Your gift will be MATCHED by Leonardo DRS to help us reach our critical goal of raising $500,000 over email and text message by the end of the year-- all toward programs and support for service members.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT FOR SERVICE MEMBERS NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/yvb0Cwkk_khV9/ZFUydG1NUWs3aFFTa0tnQ01iN2dMeHRBeWs3ZkVuYk9WKytJalo5VURVZWp0NUNJUk8zZTZUK3M2L2IxSWs5OFRYZEgwdzZtb0dRY3hSQ0UyVnpvaE9iTExaUFBHUkwvWUdGakxUU0ptUjQ9S0/K3BpeW4zR2k1RloyeEo1V2tHL29CNVY5dVJBUGtjV2pNNURRV2J5YzkvWlExY0QrS0tvOHhFckZ4MDZsVnplWUVDbjFOeVpIUUxiWXJaNVlnWExSSzA1TVJLQUtFZkd1S0)
---
Whether it's the National Guard rescuing people from flooding during Hurricane Helene or ongoing deployments to the Middle East -- our service members risk their lives for our country every day. Now it's up to us to give them the critical support and appreciation they deserve. But as a nonprofit organization -- the USO is not part of the government -- we rely on the generosity of grateful Americans like YOU to help us accomplish our mission every year.
**What we raise in the next five days can impact how much we 're able to support our service members in 2025. That's why I'm personally asking: [Will you make a tax-deductible gift of $29 or more now? ](https://links.e.uso.)**
[DONATE $29 (BECOMES $58!)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $58 (BECOMES $116!)](https://links.e.uso.)
---

Thank you for your generosity. With so much uncertainty about the year ahead, it's mission-critical that we hit our $500,000 end-of-year goal, so I'm grateful for anything you can contribute today.
Christopher Plamp
Col., USAF (Ret.)
Chief Operating Officer, USO
*Leonardo DRS is matching all gifts to the USO through a mail, text and email campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $35,000, through December 31, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

name: Lila Rose
subject: Sign our petition to stop subsidizing Planned Parenthood
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=4c75e5f8ffab4adaafffd6dc9a4c83f5&_t=PmPbX4Q86CbMan0kEkTBSCGfbYEY7uCnCnLNfcpfhKiRlzj6wQB0dqSNXEd8duL9TQbRSXvi2fyLaKNuC1HoblYr4GdCp8TWLsUhmlGNYD7YQ99rDIQX5Ob3xupQti9X)_

[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4c75e5f8ffab4adaafffd6dc9a4c83f5&_e=pPVgCLGAhg96P0qShoGckqLwh7cjYQHrSuB0Co1Jl9nskyEeGx9CXqwalrC256loOMaMALqV7fB3m8QkLEsmHxJlKHoMtC78bMiEbkGAo7MW4vCWeOHkPk-q4up1WL_WFoaqjIF14FyKadgsbYyBCJtGFkmVDnRxBO4S46FLAvHz6oe8DcD6FS4aUUQfytOEf2uOX3sQ3uPNzrDmw7U-rhXcpVtopCc2OGCXzAnsAj8sggxUlreosJHlnpQqFlVeyAoEHfbWqCg9IRAboMgo3yLoB9mp_mT56RTMWo6Nc7w6n2qgHHibSqC0AbpoufCp2F0TsuhMPnl15LrD8MOMbtgoIumY1hfD_2ZbrQMV_gy4pw6bZNg9osD9t4FAGSARYeVdtIazgSOWYwkQ3mUtHA%3D%3D)
#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4c75e5f8ffab4adaafffd6dc9a4c83f5&_e=pPVgCLGAhg96P0qShoGckqLwh7cjYQHrSuB0Co1Jl9nskyEeGx9CXqwalrC256loOMaMALqV7fB3m8QkLEsmHxJlKHoMtC78bMiEbkGAo7MW4vCWeOHkPk-q4up1WL_WFoaqjIF14FyKadgsbYyBCJtGFkmVDnRxBO4S46FLAvHz6oe8DcD6FS4aUUQfytOEf2uOX3sQ3uPNzrDmw7U-rhXcpVtopCc2OGCXzAnsAj9oZdSVYmC-JPKrmuHENeaLcfi3Qvqa92BbrF0aV4aLSpAOdbHcRi1TW18mAQh1uvdMrdWgQj0oNeyDqdl-NSaFIvijgXSRTU0j9Z2LQhVvoIGe3AET_VbKQkTXNFtgFhOYHmu3u3wRkvtdH0YqaGQR_oEnRkt6prpMrxMfuVO-Eg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4c75e5f8ffab4adaafffd6dc9a4c83f5&_e=pPVgCLGAhg96P0qShoGckqLwh7cjYQHrSuB0Co1Jl9nskyEeGx9CXqwalrC256loOMaMALqV7fB3m8QkLEsmHxJlKHoMtC78bMiEbkGAo7MW4vCWeOHkPk-q4up1WL_WFoaqjIF14FyKadgsbYyBCJtGFkmVDnRxBO4S46FLAvHz6oe8DcD6FS4aUUQfytOEf2uOX3sQ3uPNzrDmw7U-rhXcpVtopCc2OGCXzAnsAj9Vw0F_yl_9XHJo8oo_o3bFTcgmZkGXYRi17oN3L9q2dhGiQfrUlWH6svX7kEioxFc67fDkIY8CG-EpXGyQQudCDz-QXEN-M0ydbrf5kfI0H_GdAPAj7e2MKlg3QdkdY6gaqkgbMu2-8yrZjBbbsOhpYvI73Sjetgy-GUbWIvLujg%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

Peter, it’s Ritchie. There are 3 things you need to know before the year ends:

1\. We are **$4,021** short of our $15,000 end-of-year goal.

2\. House Republicans **_dominated_** Democrats at the ballot box this year — they’re about to have the House, Senate, and White House!

3\. We have a make-or-break opportunity to actually flip the House and **end the GOP trifecta** in 2025 by winning the special elections, but we can’t do it without a SURGE of fundraising.

[**Peter, we’re so close to our end-of-year goal, and I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. | | Friends, 2024 was a year that tested our grassroots movement. From the unlawful actions of the Georgia State Election Board to new legislation designed to limit access to the ballot box, we exposed voter suppression, we organized in our communities, and we fought back. These attacks aren’t over yet — Georgia’s legislative season starts in just over two weeks, and weakening federal voting protections is part of the GOP strategy for Trump’s administration. **We were built for this moment.** We were created to take on challenges to our rights, and with activists like you fighting with us, we can win. That’s why we've created the **Fight Back Fund** , to help gather the resources we need to protect our democracy in 2025. With Trump rising into power, an autocrat has reached the highest levels of our democracy — and our fight for voting rights is now national.
We keep repeating it because it’s true: our work to protect our rights is more important now than ever. So many of our freedoms are at stake, and without free and fair elections, we can’t have a say in who represents us or the progress we can make.
Together we can fight for a democracy where every American has the equal opportunity to make their voice heard, be treated with dignity, and create a more just future.

clean_body: Help us reach our $15,000 goal | | | Friends, 2024 was a year that tested our grassroots movement. From the unlawful actions of the Georgia State Election Board to new legislation designed to limit access to the ballot box, we exposed voter suppression, we organized in our communities, and we fought back. These attacks aren’t over yet — Georgia’s legislative season starts in just over two weeks, and weakening federal voting protections is part of the GOP strategy for Trump’s administration. We were built for this moment. We were created to take on challenges to our rights, and with activists like you fighting with us, we can win. That’s why we've created the Fight Back Fund , to help gather the resources we need to protect our democracy in 2025. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- With Trump rising into power, an autocrat has reached the highest levels of our democracy — and our fight for voting rights is now national. We keep repeating it because it’s true: our work to protect our rights is more important now than ever. So many of our freedoms are at stake, and without free and fair elections, we can’t have a say in who represents us or the progress we can make. Together we can fight for a democracy where every American has the equal opportunity to make their voice heard, be treated with dignity, and create a more just future. = We’re not backing down anytime soon. | Dear friends, we hope you are having a wonderful holiday season. Our team here at the California Democratic Party is now laser-focused on our final Federal Election Commission (FEC) Filing Deadline before Donald Trump’s inauguration. The stakes of this filing deadline couldn’t be higher. We will be doing a lot of our 2025 budgeting based on how much we raise before the end of the year — **which could impact our ability to keep year-round organizing programs going.** Additionally, this filing is fully public. That means that the media and pundits can take a close look at how energized our grassroots team is. **If they see a downward trajectory in our resources, they will run endless stories on how Democrats are giving up and letting Donald Trump run wild.** _But we aren’t giving up. Nothing close to it._ In fact, California just had a special session to allocate funding needed for our state to stand up to Trump. Additionally, we mobilized tons of volunteers and supporters during our ultra-close U.S. House races to ensure that every vote was counted. **[Now, we need to prove that we have the energy and momentum to hold Trump accountable and take back the U.S. House. And the best way to do that is show our grassroots fundraising efforts are holding strong and are capable of funding “always-on” organizing. clean_body: following up | = | Dear friends, we hope you are having a wonderful holiday season. Our team here at the California Democratic Party is now laser-focused on our final Federal Election Commission (FEC) Filing Deadline before Donald Trump’s inauguration. The stakes of this filing deadline couldn’t be higher. We will be doing a lot of our 2025 budgeting based on how much we raise before the end of the year — which could impact our ability to keep year-round organizing programs going. Additionally, this filing is fully public. That means that the media and pundits can take a close look at how energized our grassroots team is. If they see a downward trajectory in our resources, they will run endless stories on how Democrats are giving up and letting Donald Trump run wild. But we aren’t giving up. Nothing close to it. In fact, California just had a special session to allocate funding needed for our state to stand up to Trump. Additionally, we mobilized tons of volunteers and supporters during our ultra-close U.S. House races to ensure that every vote was counted. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: How To Finish 2024 STRONG & Start 2025 RIGHT!
body:
How we finish one season determines how we begin the next season. I want to encourage you to make plans to finish 2024 on a strong note! Join the Sh
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10018.1.e15a66fb62a11f477f0b33259e92b718) |
---
**How we finish one season determines how we begin the next season.** I want to encourage you to make plans to _finish 2024 on a strong note_! Join the [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10019.1.3b6c2049fb169eeefc8c1157625b791d) Family this Sunday for our "**End of the Year Service**." **Tulsa** 10am | **OKC** 6pm Watch online: [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10020.1.0a685b27cc231513ab59c97ef34a241d) Also, _please consider_ making an **end of the year donation** to [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10021.1.56e143ba398ea5917e06b7d1a8de837e) by visiting [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10022.1.e4bdab018ccd2a1d2c8b52fd275d1f76)
(_all donations are tax deductible_) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church In 2025:** -Sun, Jan 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wed, Feb 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** -Thur, Mar 6 @6:30pm: **Eric Trump** | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10023.1.a5f05c8c59ef8104abc247b4f17dd00a) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Make An "END OF THE YEAR DONATION" To Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10024.1.c5b579861746f3a59b9b5636d6912e95)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10025.1.def5c8be118d6e81684c004480328f3c)
---
You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10026.1.d7c0ede1c1bd43de73b694c2abf16766) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10027.1.7ded69ec957ed45bfaf5a24f09f4f722) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10028.1.e72df8375b628e106130e0c52b08e9e5) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10029.1.1d22c8275ec0d39078f622af2bdc493d) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10030.1.17f4a6c424b81d8d8997599bbb511a03) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Eric Trump | Tulsa, OK ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10031.1.b5d847680aa8ad0fe37d671da4fc0991)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10032.1.25f36c83f25f5914908ec56d835cbc7f)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10033.1.4d19feca5eb9ef41021a6c827095ee5e), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10034.1.f07b01500cd14554b96594fe1c52a00f). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10035.1.1aeb25899a5c3e8448ea714d6b9f440a)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10036.1.8b5a2344d7a103b0abe7ad0d578a0c39)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10037.1.162dafc24e479119cbbf6e0f2816db66), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10038.1.3f1aee7d2035d8030a4190d4983eaff6), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10039.1.c6b778db912f675b250bba3fa4d80349)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10040.1.a776493bc59706e7f8f707c10f7a073b), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10041.1.c3a6c66714603d2366d72eb62e6d5ffb), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10042.1.4c936d1ac27778e94986eaeb9996176a), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10043.1.ec33b0729fe6bedb43c95f588e82d02d), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10044.1.0172d632c8da5e4302d78e41a4ccf5f5), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10045.1.0146e3032ccae83decb47f41a9271c25), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10046.1.5fecbc552fbb78bac83e496110dfdedb), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10047.1.38123e42f146e3122b537aead8b4009f), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18569371.10048.1.610556be3d1e41059cd6523ee4951115) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---
---
©2024 Jackson Lahmeyer | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
---

clean_body: | Hi fur-iend, Zuma here — official campaign spokespaw-rson of Team Crow! = Me and my dad! Team Crow has been reallyyy busy getting ready for our last big fundraising deadline of the year, so I have to say — the holidays were a welcome break! When I’m not hard at work, I like to pass the time by 1) eating treats, 2) bugging my dad for treats, and 3) playing fetch to earn more treats. And even better — my dad Jason gets to come home from work in DC to celebrate the howl-idays here in Colorado! It’s hard not seeing him for a while, but it makes moments like these even better. = Alright enough chasing our tails here — my dad is ready to get back to work for all Colorado families (+ dogs!), but he needs your help to reach his big end-of-year fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank youuuu — Zuma Crow 🐾 sorry for any typos — typing with paws isn’t easy! **YESTERDAY,** we decided to ask again to see if you had missed the email, __but you still hadn’t responded this morning!__

subject: WHOA - Democrats can FLIP two Senate seats?!?!!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Peter, let me give you some hope this holiday season
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99363329/519684301/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYjkxODkzLTgwYzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjfhMSRG95NN1CV8y_2SszH5N8oBdCEpW0Uu_6pcWXg=&emci=48f34b9a-75bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=93b91893-80c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
# Hi Peter, I hope you have been enjoying a warm and joyful holiday with your loved ones.
---
I’m writing to you today to extend a branch of hope as we head into 2025. The holidays remind me of the spirit of togetherness, giving, and hope. The next four years will be tough with Trump back in the White House, but here in Oregon we are lucky to be in a position that many other states aren’t. With newly elected supermajorities in the Oregon House and Senate and pro-environment statewide leaders, we can and must still make progress on climate and defend against threats from the federal level.
---
| | **I’m hopeful about what we can accomplish next year and beyond, but we still need your support.**[**Will you donate to OLCV now and help us build the resources we need to pass pro-environment legislation and defend our progress in 2025?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99363331/519684304/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYjkxODkzLTgwYzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjfhMSRG95NN1CV8y_2SszH5N8oBdCEpW0Uu_6pcWXg=&emci=48f34b9a-75bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=93b91893-80c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99363334/519684306/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYjkxODkzLTgwYzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjfhMSRG95NN1CV8y_2SszH5N8oBdCEpW0Uu_6pcWXg=&emci=48f34b9a-75bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=93b91893-80c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
| | Next year, we have important work to do protecting our clean air and water, making sure Oregonians have access to affordable energy, improving our communities’ climate resiliency, and passing an equitable and climate-friendly transportation package. We have our work cut out for us, and in addition to passing our priorities we know that we will have to defend against threats and rollbacks at the state and federal level. There’s a lot ahead of us, but _I’m hopeful_ because I know that we have you and thousands of other grassroots supporters with us. We accomplished a lot this year — securing nearly $20 million in funding for programs that help low income Oregonians lower their energy bills while increasing energy efficiency and clean energy, passing legislation to reduce e-waste, and protecting and strengthening our marine reserves. We elected over 84% of our endorsed candidates and secured supermajorities in the senate and house. [**I’m so proud of all that we accomplished this year and none of it would be possible without you. Will you help us continue our critical work - protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected officials accountable - by making a donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99363336/519684308/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYjkxODkzLTgwYzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjfhMSRG95NN1CV8y_2SszH5N8oBdCEpW0Uu_6pcWXg=&emci=48f34b9a-75bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=93b91893-80c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99363337/519684310/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYjkxODkzLTgwYzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjfhMSRG95NN1CV8y_2SszH5N8oBdCEpW0Uu_6pcWXg=&emci=48f34b9a-75bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=93b91893-80c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)

I’m so grateful for all that you do, whether it’s donating, volunteering, or taking one of our online actions. Thank you for being part of our community. Much gratitude,

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I hope you have been enjoying a warm and joyful holiday with your loved ones. I’m writing to you today to extend a branch of hope as we head into 2025. The holidays remind me of the spirit of togetherness, giving, and hope. The next four years will be tough with Trump back in the White House, but here in Oregon we are lucky to be in a position that many other states aren’t. With newly elected supermajorities in the Oregon House and Senate and pro-environment statewide leaders, we can and must still make progress on climate and defend against threats from the federal level. | | I’m hopeful about what we can accomplish next year and beyond, but we still need your support. | | | Next year, we have important work to do protecting our clean air and water, making sure Oregonians have access to affordable energy, improving our communities’ climate resiliency, and passing an equitable and climate-friendly transportation package. We have our work cut out for us, and in addition to passing our priorities we know that we will have to defend against threats and rollbacks at the state and federal level. There’s a lot ahead of us, but I’m hopeful because I know that we have you and thousands of other grassroots supporters with us. We accomplished a lot this year — securing nearly $20 million in funding for programs that help low income Oregonians lower their energy bills while increasing energy efficiency and clean energy, passing legislation to reduce e-waste, and protecting and strengthening our marine reserves. We elected over 84% of our endorsed candidates and secured supermajorities in the senate and house. I’m so grateful for all that you do, whether it’s donating, volunteering, or taking one of our online actions. Thank you for being part of our community. Much gratitude, Lindsey ScholtenOLCV Executive Director P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, but still remain on our general email list! | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: We’ve budgeted to train 15 candidates, but we received a record number of applicants. Can you help us meet the need?
body:
Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities. | | |
---
Friend, A friend once told me, “People like us never think about running for office and that’s the problem.” **That’s exactly why we created the Rooted in Community Campaign School** , an in-person program to train progressive candidates running for local or state office. **Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities.** This month-long course, which will take place over five Saturdays in February and March, is completely free and will train the leaders of tomorrow, today. **While we budgeted for training 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants and would love to expand this year’s Campaign School further.** The cost per trainee is just $400, which means that every donation, whether it’s $5 or $400, goes a long way toward training future leaders to run for office. [**Click here to donate today and power our Rooted in Community Campaign School to train working-class candidates with the lived experience to represent their communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1Fh3rx5SKuzIBr3Yg5nQcNTLhw_dPyb8PtmK4Ccrl3WJ5TTMJvNc1vdxu2oUvaWhp3QezFAtbErlGdeHAdHfxarBXLM_wRPeUdy7stee9dJNg4VuxSwzQlHYBsJLbcs_Xn5-e_btHXb1RMBeRm4uJtS3FGL45Q0qvbHT0FoKgtZstn_uGi1Ri01OMY1KzQUGIQ-l5-Dn81Ly_LfZhNzTjpgZT8jxr02zQ8kdf9DiZSW_1LGLSJFZ6zfaV9JM7CTnOmj0eS1pst_N3BjY9lHSQeYAmHxLS96cOanhIFPxrdzvSHZS30WDha0L27xZdQwDngWqs5m2RcKm90izzMIU0qtlnWzZ6ZT_-B1u27U4fYLEJsc6-0zhgJ3A4RMTXps7Wn9oYd9xXPS5s7EoTu84CETjPskI2JFMRFBU-0_CZqIoJiCHg2RZzsxb58DnlNwV1JYkQgh8Q4TjwZlNfbTu3BxNj1KN7T9G5QZvSoc-hQippu5-X4ZAxGrKxcGwdICi5pT7sRs9aM7bwjuBL5-S0bEUw/4cn/A0qfaLdxS52YomW43dp8wA/h0/h001.h8od2Qv7NqunMxmZrUZ_7JruFDY7PXDHbzgGGRHOExk) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1Fh3rx5SKuzIBr3Yg5nQcNTLq5OKGXAfIcE89_5pgo_AyrRaFGTB1y6pBouCz5pKna2KO5S6671tNXtd-D4PeqejkwKwdUKnrMYKtitwB69sl7eosTvsly9eGTxMqjaTwOpMYMljDQ7X730LctJANGpgnxQSNG_eEQsWLHVJLwIS4XVMWySFtV6MXrmtlcpqScgEgdPt2lwbZw9p7doIqSkR03ZuZFr9Vaq225TaxDkGuBQsi_YXWTPs58XESxfPR22z4bsp97Ef2DcyR8LTrKO0hGD4Gc-Ny8RuRGM4sGEFfFVW4fg97OthhltmEvBxW8oCLk736effWkc5XcfAdlN_-wlZgbND63sgJhcypLB7DxHto0vvyDwkxycdgz4ed6KYAewAaD90mecW4EXt15DQHJ0iNRrl6HsABvQ_ljJ3yn3WAZJJFg-6og_p9sSVWdOzRWHaaYaqiENih0SL4ji95EMqAkAj7rVgpnk9YLvOAzoksTV0Jzes1XeD7V_AssM-V6x41pnA0ZneXpwnOVZag/4cn/A0qfaLdxS52YomW43dp8wA/h1/h001.BV5NC6CwVG99mDKwMs8k-6ZnnIwEKhQ7j5AxI_I3i28)

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: A quick, personal favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible
body:
Before you celebrate, I have a quick request.
| | |
---
Friend, I sincerely hope you are enjoying the holiday season, holding your loved ones close and spending time on whatever brings you peace and joy. I know it’s a busy season, so I won’t take up too much of your time today, but I do have a quick request.
**[With my end-of-year fundraising deadline coming up fast, my team and I just crunched the numbers and realized we need to raise another $20,000 to close out the year. Will you please donate $5 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99363678/519685170/2042411210?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3044-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzA3ZmQ0NC04MWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KK_x_pV7-ONFdTPpofSzEU8iUZlO0qEVYG7gxmvSvNM=)**
As much as we’d all love to enjoy the holidays without thinking of the political landscape, we cannot forget what’s coming in January: a Donald Trump-controlled White House, a GOP-led Senate and House and an administration that will be ready to do Trump’s bidding and implement his dangerous agenda from day one. **Democrats need to be ready to fight back. **
**After the devastating results of this year’s elections, early preparation has never been more important. subject: Fighting for our shared Wisconsin values

body:
|

Can I explain something, Peter? Every three months or so, our team creates a budget for the upcoming quarter and sets fundraising goals and deadlines to help us stay on track — and one of those deadlines is just around the corner. Next Tuesday marks our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year. Once we close the books, we’ll tally the numbers and send our finance report to the Federal Election Commission, and shortly after, our report will be made public. That means everyone will be able to see our fundraising numbers, including Wisconsin Republicans who are eager to score some wins in 2025. **With your support now, we can send a powerful message that people believe in our shared Wisconsin values and want to see me take up the fight in the Senate next year and beyond.** **[That’s why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in before our FEC deadline expires on Tuesday? subject: Deadline: 𝟰 𝗱𝗮𝘆𝘀

body:
Here’s the deal, Peter: Our first and only public fundraising deadline of the year is four days away, and we need your support to show that our people-powered movement is prepared to hit the ground running in 2025.

With Donald Trump set to take office on January 20, we can count on Keith to defend our rights and freedoms when MAGA Republicans try to impose their extreme and dangerous agenda in Minnesota. But he can’t do it alone.

To prove that we’re ready for every challenge that comes our way in 2025, our team set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by 11:59 pm on December 31. Reaching this target will send a clear message that we won’t back down.

According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make your fully refundable $75 donation today to prove we’ll have Keith’s back in the New Year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Team Keith

name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: The LaRouche Case and the American System of Injustice
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241227_symposium&n=1)
---
| Friend – The drive to silence Lyndon LaRouche and his ideas goes as far back to the early 1970s. In 1982, as LaRouche’s activities and policy initiatives began to seriously threaten those of Henry A. Kissinger, Kissinger sent a letter directly to FBI Director William Webster demanding action be taken against LaRouche. In what came to be known as the LaRouche case, an unprecedented collaboration of private bankers and organizations working with major news media outlets, directly coordinated with corrupt government law enforcement and intelligence agencies to establish a _modus operandi_ for silencing political opponents in the United States. An initial trial against LaRouche, et.al. in Boston in 1988 ended in a mistrial after the presiding judge ordered a search of then-Vice President George H.W. Bush’s files after a document had been discovered in which Oliver North and other such spooks of the so-called “Iran-Contra” apparatus had been ordered to target LaRouche on behalf of the “Get LaRouche” task force. It was only in the intelligence community’s “rocket docket” kangaroo court in Northern Virginia that LaRouche was later able to be railroaded to 15 years in prison. Several of LaRouche’s associates were also sentenced to lengthy prison terms, most notably Michael Billington, a top fundraiser, who received an unbelievable 77 year jail sentence for “securities fraud,” which was interpreted as taking political loans without a stock broker’s license, obviously completely ridiculous. It's no accident that a key member of the "Get LaRouche" task force was none other than Robert Mueller, who went on to become the "Special Counsel" legal hatchet man in the fraudulent "Russiagate" investigation of President Trump. But there have been dozens upon dozens of other individuals also deemed as political "threats" to the current War Party establishment in the United States who have suffered the same fate, most without the means to fend off such overwhelming attacks on them. Join us this week as we discuss how, like Germany in 1989, we can now finally topple this "Berlin Wall" of injustice in the United States and restore our nation as the government “of the People, by the People, and for the People” that it should be.
* * *

clean_body: | | | Friend – The drive to silence Lyndon LaRouche and his ideas goes as far back to the early 1970s. In 1982, as LaRouche’s activities and policy initiatives began to seriously threaten those of Henry A. Kissinger, Kissinger sent a letter directly to FBI Director William Webster demanding action be taken against LaRouche. In what came to be known as the LaRouche case, an unprecedented collaboration of private bankers and organizations working with major news media outlets, directly coordinated with corrupt government law enforcement and intelligence agencies to establish a modus operandi for silencing political opponents in the United States. An initial trial against LaRouche, et.al. in Boston in 1988 ended in a mistrial after the presiding judge ordered a search of then-Vice President George H.W. Bush’s files after a document had been discovered in which Oliver North and other such spooks of the so-called “Iran-Contra” apparatus had been ordered to target LaRouche on behalf of the “Get LaRouche” task force. It was only in the intelligence community’s “rocket docket” kangaroo court in Northern Virginia that LaRouche was later able to be railroaded to 15 years in prison. Several of LaRouche’s associates were also sentenced to lengthy prison terms, most notably Michael Billington, a top fundraiser, who received an unbelievable 77 year jail sentence for “securities fraud,” which was interpreted as taking political loans without a stock broker’s license, obviously completely ridiculous. It's no accident that a key member of the "Get LaRouche" task force was none other than Robert Mueller, who went on to become the "Special Counsel" legal hatchet man in the fraudulent "Russiagate" investigation of President Trump. But there have been dozens upon dozens of other individuals also deemed as political "threats" to the current War Party establishment in the United States who have suffered the same fate, most without the means to fend off such overwhelming attacks on them. Join us this week as we discuss how, like Germany in 1989, we can now finally topple this "Berlin Wall" of injustice in the United States and restore our nation as the government “of the People, by the People, and for the People” that it should be. Diane Sare President, The LaRouche Organization * | | | ---|---|--- | The LaRouche Organization · 2 University Plaza Dr, Suite 100, Hackensack, NJ 07601, United States

I’ve always loved _Spotify Wrapped_ because it reminds me that every action we take during the year contributes to something bigger in the end.
Much like our year-round organizing.
**[**_Peter, in the same way we still listen to music even when there isn’t a _Replay_ or _Wrapped_ on the horizon, will you donate now to support our work reaching, educating, and mobilizing young voters even when there’s not an election right in front of us? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0Et9aj7mbrhw5UbkGHhCvw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpUYI2P0TJaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIyN19lbV9mcl9iMV93cmFwcGVkX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJxZEhCdlcwcERkenRmSjVCWmJVQk5NMEJqdiZyZWZjb2RlMj0ycWRIQnZXMHBEZHp0Zko1QlpiVUJOTTBCanYmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MnFkSEJ2VzBwRGR6dGZKNUJaYlVCTk0wQmp2VwNzcGNCCmdlNv1uZ7m5IKFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)**
