name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Privitization is the wrong answer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_2&amount=25]
Folks,
The United States Postal Service has served every corner of our nation for nearly 250 years. But Trump and his billionaire allies want to rip it apart, placing profits over an essential public service. Their dangerous plan to privatize the USPS threatens rural communities, Indigenous communities, seniors, veterans, small businesses, and many millions of Americans who rely on affordable, reliable mail service.
It's simple: Privatization means higher costs, reduced access, and the elimination of mail services in areas where private companies refuse to deliver. For rural Americans, this isn’t just inconvenient, it’s catastrophic, especially for mail-in ballots.
Please, step up and tell Congress: Do NOT privatize the USPS now or ever! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
A coalition of groups stopped Trump’s last privatization push in 2018 with overwhelming, bipartisan public outcry. But this time, the stakes are higher. Trump is working with his billionaire friends Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and other MAGA allies to pressure Congress into dismantling this beloved institution.
The USPS isn’t just a service; it’s a promise to every American. That’s why both parties came together in 2022 to pass the Postal Service Reform Act with overwhelming bipartisan support. Even Postmaster Louis DeJoy stepped up to lobby Congress at the time. They knew privatization was wrong then, and it’s wrong now .
The USPS is America’s lifeline, delivering to every corner of the nation. We cannot let it be picked apart, sold for its parts, and placed into the hands of Wall Street billionaires. We must raise our voices louder than ever to protect the USPS.
Add your name and make it clear to Congress: We won't let you privatize our critical postal service >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=8BaQ43pasrZKOCJtl4jpVV%2Ft33OCe85IFVsAuK0iBqNe5YAX0%2Fr7alDOpUwamyxWBsCQ9KC3AYAhkHwHA4NX0POxZREunlHcrVqpBX7YBcl7FocFtmINbtV4l7yOtr%2FVwCq%2B6Z2%2F8GdSAfsn4mxW%2BEsyq0xsAtMn41BljZmg9lMiGF5YlkoPPmiDeo8qjo7cR%2FcY%2FeZUDPDec7f9Q7bHXxR8f44TH%2B5Aq4MJjbQZM7t9YG49OI6QnDSp3DgQ4HqEd%2Fprq7ZCoYtpWlZBsMV5ldRME98D2gvXudiHm8jSg3epIFoHfNV7ze2qsp%2B2MGRt7feJ9dmEYnn8QMR0j4h1xojNvLAaxC%2BWMnEutYcDR530pfxq4Ia99gWW8CXMEZ5sw3%2Bf6oxY9w8FLKqfnoZ60JPn0uP26Mj3qTAcBF4IBvc%3D .

Peter, is there ANYTHING that I can say right now to convince you to make a contribution to my campaign?

**What if I told you** that more than 40,000 people lost their lives to gun violence last year while the gun lobby strengthened its vise grip on GOP leaders?

**What if I told you** that Republicans across the nation are rapidly stripping away our reproductive freedoms – but as long as I’m attorney general, New York will _always_ be a safe haven for all who need reproductive care?

**And if I told you** that the most powerful and corrupt forces in our country who I work to hold accountable are rooting for me to fail so they can continue to act without consequence?

From day one, my focus will be on addressing the challenges that matter most to our community: cutting costs for everyday essentials like groceries and prescription drugs, working to create more good-paying jobs for Michiganders, fighting to protect reproductive rights, including access to abortion, contraception, and IVF. This won’t be easy, but it’s my mission to stand up for all mid-Michiganders and push for policies that truly improve their lives. And I will work with both Democrats and Republicans to make real progress for Michigan families, workers and kids and deliver meaningful, bipartisan change. body:
Ahead of our end-of-year deadline, a group of generous donors has agreed to match grassroots donations SEVEN TIMES. Will you show your support and chip in today? | | |

| |
---|---
Republicans are preparing to take full control of our federal government next month – they’re hell-bent on restricting abortion access, passing hateful anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and destroying voting rights. clean_body: Ahead of our end-of-year deadline, a group of generous donors has agreed to match grassroots donations SEVEN TIMES. Will you show your support and chip in today? | | | | | ---|--- Republicans are preparing to take full control of our federal government next month – they’re hell-bent on restricting abortion access, passing hateful anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and destroying voting rights. But they don’t know what they’re up against. Grassroots Democrats are pouring in donations ahead of our end-of-year deadline to stop their right-wing agenda from spreading to our statehouses: All donations are being matched SEVEN TIMES by a group of generous donors right now. But this 7X-MATCH is only available until 11:59 PM on December 31st – and after falling short last month, we need to hit our end-of-year goal and make up lost ground. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let's hit the ground running, Team DLCC | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: 4 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There are only 4 days left in 2024, and we are falling short of reaching our critically important $20,000 end-of-year goal.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241227-4620-footer&t=1&akid=4620%2E420207%2EpWcXRQ)
Peter, there are only 4 days left in 2024, and we are falling short of reaching our critically important $20,000 end-of-year goal. We always expect fundraising to slow down after an election and during the holidays. But it’s a big problem when small-dollar donations from emails like the one you’re reading right now make up a huge chunk of our overall fundraising.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241227?refcode=em20241227-4620&amount=3&refcode2=4620_420207_pWcXRQ&akid=4620%2E420207%2EpWcXRQ)
**With Donald Trump heading back to the White House and big fights looming over the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries, we can’t afford to miss our end-of-year goal.**
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now so we can catch up on our fundraising and continue pushing for our progressive priorities in the new year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241227?refcode=em20241227-4620&amount=3&refcode2=4620_420207_pWcXRQ&akid=4620%2E420207%2EpWcXRQ)
**The challenges we face will only get more urgent when the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve.** Americans will be counting on us to defend our democracy from Trump’s authoritarian impulses. And working people will still be relying on us to organize the Democratic Party around a bold, populist agenda that delivers real, tangible change — like paid leave, Medicare for All, affordable child care, and so much more that will make a real difference for families and communities across America.
If we get to work now, 2025 can be the year we rebuild the Democratic Party around a robust working class coalition. But to make that happen, we need to catch up on our goal — and fast.
[**Make a contribution of $3 or anything you can afford to help reach our final goal of the year before the mandatory federal deadline. Doing so will help us be prepared to keep up these important fights in the new year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241227?refcode=em20241227-4620&amount=3&refcode2=4620_420207_pWcXRQ&akid=4620%2E420207%2EpWcXRQ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241227?amount=3&refcode=em20241227-4620&refcode2=4620_420207_pWcXRQ&akid=4620%2E420207%2EpWcXRQ)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241227-4620-footer&t=2&refcode2=4620_420207_pWcXRQ&akid=4620%2E420207%2EpWcXRQ)**

clean_body: There are only 4 days left in 2024, and we are falling short of reaching our critically important $20,000 end-of-year goal. Peter, there are only 4 days left in 2024, and we are falling short of reaching our critically important $20,000 end-of-year goal. We always expect fundraising to slow down after an election and during the holidays. But it’s a big problem when small-dollar donations from emails like the one you’re reading right now make up a huge chunk of our overall fundraising. With Donald Trump heading back to the White House and big fights looming over the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries, we can’t afford to miss our end-of-year goal. The challenges we face will only get more urgent when the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve. Americans will be counting on us to defend our democracy from Trump’s authoritarian impulses. And working people will still be relying on us to organize the Democratic Party around a bold, populist agenda that delivers real, tangible change — like paid leave, Medicare for All, affordable child care, and so much more that will make a real difference for families and communities across America. If we get to work now, 2025 can be the year we rebuild the Democratic Party around a robust working class coalition. But to make that happen, we need to catch up on our goal — and fast. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: George Whitesides
subject: This won’t be easy.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99366885/519694629/2104826962?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDJhY2UyNC04ZGM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZfPxFQgiinkJx8ZJhSNHF1pdeF8-7ztX5osZEDsZ5as=)
Peter,

As we inch closer to 2025, I’m reflecting on all we accomplished this past year.
* We defeated Mike Garcia by just under 3% of the vote.

* We knocked on tens of thousands of doors and made nearly one million calls, connected with voters at community events and online, and worked hard every day to flip CA‐27.

Now, the work in Congress begins when I’m sworn in one week from today. I’m looking forward to delivering results for our community.

But it won’t be easy. Republicans in Congress are already making life hard – nearly forcing a government shutdown and refusing to work across the aisle for the benefit of all Americans.

**[As a first time incumbent, I’m guaranteed to become one of the Republicans’ top targets. That’s why we’re pushing to meet our final FEC fundraising goal of 2024. We knocked on tens of thousands of doors and made nearly one million calls, connected with voters at community events and online, and worked hard every day to flip CA‐27. Now, the work in Congress begins when I’m sworn in one week from today. I’m looking forward to delivering results for our community. But it won’t be easy. Electing pro-choice women is at the heart of the strategy to stop Trump. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99366959/519694830/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX49_20241227_EOYTextLaunch_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055532&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTJhY2UyNC04ZGM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC71-kBZqFLdHgVBxcsfTb0SEs3-Vb2gY_nP_jIh_OU=) Peter,

Last week, I sent you a message about how **the only way to stop Donald Trump is to dilute his political power.** As we look ahead to the new year, I wanted to follow up with more details on how we're making that happen.

The stakes have never been higher. Our opponents continue to push dangerous policies that threaten fundamental freedoms for all Americans, including the very fabric of our democracy. But we also know that electing pro-choice women is at the heart of the strategy to stop Trump — and EMILYs List is ready to do everything we can to help those women run and WIN in 2025 and beyond. [**That's why, through the end of 2024, every donation to EMILYs List (up to $100,000!) will be MATCHED by a generous group of grassroots donors. Donate now to take advantage of this opportunity to double your impact for Democratic pro-choice women: **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99366960/519694831/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX49_20241227_EOYTextLaunch_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055532&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTJhY2UyNC04ZGM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC71-kBZqFLdHgVBxcsfTb0SEs3-Vb2gY_nP_jIh_OU=) | [JOIN OUR FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99366961/519694832/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX49_20241227_EOYTextLaunch_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055532&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTJhY2UyNC04ZGM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC71-kBZqFLdHgVBxcsfTb0SEs3-Vb2gY_nP_jIh_OU=)

EMILYs List women are already leading the charge against Trump's extremist agenda. Governors are protecting fundamental freedoms, secretaries of state are defending our democratic process, and attorneys general are safeguarding the rule of law. Many of these frontline fighters ran in tough races — and, with the support of this community, emerged victorious. Investing in women doesn't just make for better policy — it makes for better candidates. **Our women showed that they can win in even the most difficult circumstances.**

Our strategy for the upcoming election cycle will rely on our ability to make early investments in key state and federal races — so it's critical to remember that supporting candidates in the earliest stages of their campaigns is the best way to help them win. Our research and data teams are already analyzing what worked this cycle, so we can apply those lessons to future races across the country. We have staff on the ground across the country, recruiting even more Democratic pro-choice women candidates and helping them build winning campaigns. This is just the beginning of our plans for 2025.
Together, we can weaken Trump's political grip and elect pro-choice leaders who will move our country forward.
[**With our End-of-Year deadline approaching, every contribution to EMILYs List will be MATCHED, doubling the impact of your support. Please donate today to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women nationwide:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99366962/519694833/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX49_20241227_EOYTextLaunch_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055532&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTJhY2UyNC04ZGM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC71-kBZqFLdHgVBxcsfTb0SEs3-Vb2gY_nP_jIh_OU=)

name: Lara Trump
subject: Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids
body:
The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’ll never stop cutting through the political noise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
The worst thing we could do right now is lose hope. My fight to stand up for working families is far from over, and I’m honored my constituents reelected me to continue this work. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99367415/519696217/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC120_20241227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWEwMzU4Mi04ZWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UcQLhS1C-qmH9cgQD6rB_w27sc9DYm84XbwEr98TiY=)
---
Hi team, As 2024 comes to a close, I’ve been reflecting on the past year and the overall difficult election night for Democrats. The worst thing we could do right now is lose hope. My fight to stand up for working families is far from over, and I’m honored my constituents reelected me to continue this work. **I have cut through the political noise to get results for IL-13 since day one, and my commitment to bipartisanship hasn’t changed.** It's not always an easy path to go down, but it’s important to find common ground with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle. Otherwise, we would not have accomplished so much for Central and Southern Illinois. We focused on local issues impacting Illinois families, farmers, and workers, addressing their priorities through commonsense solutions. From lowering the cost of insulin, passing the _PACT Act_ to expand health care benefits for veterans, and fighting for a Farm Bill that treats our farmers fairly — I’ll always put real results over petty politics. **There’s still so much work to do, and with your support, I'll continue advocating for working families in Illinois.[If you can chip in any amount today, I’d really appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99367416/519696218/-147474916?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC120_20241227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWEwMzU4Mi04ZWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UcQLhS1C-qmH9cgQD6rB_w27sc9DYm84XbwEr98TiY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99367417/519696219/-147474916?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC120_20241227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWEwMzU4Mi04ZWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UcQLhS1C-qmH9cgQD6rB_w27sc9DYm84XbwEr98TiY=)

clean_body: The worst thing we could do right now is lose hope. My fight to stand up for working families is far from over, and I’m honored my constituents reelected me to continue this work. | = Hi team, As 2024 comes to a close, I’ve been reflecting on the past year and the overall difficult election night for Democrats. The worst thing we could do right now is lose hope. My fight to stand up for working families is far from over, and I’m honored my constituents reelected me to continue this work. I have cut through the political noise to get results for IL-13 since day one, and my commitment to bipartisanship hasn’t changed. It's not always an easy path to go down, but it’s important to find common ground with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle. Otherwise, we would not have accomplished so much for Central and Southern Illinois. We focused on local issues impacting Illinois families, farmers, and workers, addressing their priorities through commonsense solutions. From lowering the cost of insulin, passing the PACT Act to expand health care benefits for veterans, and fighting for a Farm Bill that treats our farmers fairly — I’ll always put real results over petty politics. There’s still so much work to do, and with your support, I'll continue advocating for working families in Illinois.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for continuing to stand with me. Nikki = | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

| | **It's time to jumpstart next year's fights in Virginia, New Jersey, and in local races and special elections across the country.** We're not giving up on our fight to protect democracy and spread our progressive values, and we know that you're not either. So, here's the deal:
* Filing deadlines for local races are hitting as soon as January
* We're going to recruit thousands of candidates to contest Republican incumbents
* We're going to keep building resources to fund over 300 county party organizations across 28 states
* We're going to keep developing digital tools to organize, recruit, and target the people we need to run, vote, and volunteer.

[**We're making the commitment to revamp our best practices and double down on places where we can make the most movement forward. subject: 📎 Survey Attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for Congress
body:
As I prepare to take office, I want to hear directly from you about the issues that are most important to you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99367677/519697055/478451526?refcode=BLU_EM_GOOD_2024-12-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjA0Y2IzMzEtOTBjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4YuVFsNUkX62Hmco_FTap4KoFN14eQyANdhAi0_KwAQ=)
---
| Peter,

Last month, Granite Staters in our second district elected me to represent them in Congress. I’m so proud of the work we did together to keep this open seat blue, but now the hard work begins.

As I step into my new role as your representative, I’m preparing for the tough work ahead in a Republican-controlled House of Representatives. The road to meaningful progress on the issues that matter will not be easy, but I’m prepared to work across the aisle and do whatever it takes to deliver for our community.

As I prepare to take office, I want to hear directly from you about the issues that are most important to you. **Whether it be lowering costs, safeguarding reproductive rights, or protecting our environment – I would greatly appreciate it if you could take just a few minutes and fill out our survey to let us know which issues are important to you:**
---
| [TAKE OUR SURVEY >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99367678/519697056/-1870159641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjA0Y2IzMzEtOTBjNC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4YuVFsNUkX62Hmco_FTap4KoFN14eQyANdhAi0_KwAQ=&emci=261f902b-90c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=f04cb331-90c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=10367155)
---

clean_body: As I prepare to take office, I want to hear directly from you about the issues that are most important to you. | = | Peter, Last month, Granite Staters in our second district elected me to represent them in Congress. I’m so proud of the work we did together to keep this open seat blue, but now the hard work begins. As I step into my new role as your representative, I’m preparing for the tough work ahead in a Republican-controlled House of Representatives. The road to meaningful progress on the issues that matter will not be easy, but I’m prepared to work across the aisle and do whatever it takes to deliver for our community. As I prepare to take office, I want to hear directly from you about the issues that are most important to you. Whether it be lowering costs, safeguarding reproductive rights, or protecting our environment – I would greatly appreciate it if you could take just a few minutes and fill out our survey to let us know which issues are important to you: | Thank you, Maggie Goodlander = * | | = Paid for by Maggie for Congress Maggie for Congress 131 Daniel Webster Hwy #949 Nashua, NH 03060 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Robert Antonellis
subject: Exclusive: The Deep State Decoded—Evidence Attached
body:
Shocking new evidence freshly decoded—what the Deep State doesn’t want you to know. | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobforma/press-release-state-police-investigate-murder-of-mary-jo-kopechne-473?e=eb86c99a95)
---
| | | |
---
|
# NEW EVIDENCE EXPOSES DEEP STATE TIES TO HISTORIC CRIMES
---
| Dear Fellow American,The Deep State doesn’t want you to know the truth—but together, we can expose their crimes, defend President Trump, and fight for America First.
Gridlock is back. Despite a landslide victory for President Trump, the Deep State is working overtime to sabotage his administration, derail the America First agenda, and bury the truth.
But we have the power to fight back—with hard evidence and the will to act.
---
[Download the Exclusive PDF Now](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=3cdcc7efc8&e=eb86c99a95)
| After years of research, I’ve uncovered explosive evidence that exposes the greatest crimes of the Deep State, in the 20th century and beyond. This information can finally shatter their lies, protect President Trump, and restore justice for all Americans.

### What’s at Stake?
* **Decoding the Deep State’s crimes and breaking their stranglehold:**
We can’t wait for the CIA and FBI to investigate themselves or produce documents so heavily redacted they’re meaningless. This is our chance to uncover the truth.
* **Defending President Trump from relentless attacks and sabotage** :
The attached PDF reveals shocking evidence no news organizations have reported—an insidious 9/11-style attack on Trump’s first term, nicknamed "The Kaiser's Revenge," with chilling echoes of past Deep State tactics.
* **Advancing America First principles and protecting the American way of life:**
Everything we hold dear is under threat—from relentless attacks within our own country to foreign enemies scheming endlessly to take us down.

---
[Access the Evidence Here](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=04198208ed&e=eb86c99a95)
| This PDF contains revelations you won’t hear from the media or anyone else—information that could change the way we understand the Deep State’s grip on America.
---
| Take a few moments to print it out, read it, and share it with others.
This is a fight we can’t afford to lose. Will you stand with me today?
Your support will keep these investigations alive—like the shocking evidence in my two new books,_The Camelot Murders_ and _The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail_ , where hidden crimes and coded messages expose calculated attacks on America’s leaders, stretching back far longer than anyone dares to admit.
As a special thank-you:
* $50 Donation: Receive a signed paperback copy of _The Camelot Murders - The Crucifixion of Mary Jo_.
* $100 Donation: Receive signed paperback copies of both _The Camelot Murders_ and _The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail - Weather Warfare and Bloody Jackpot in Vegas_.
* $250 Donation: Receive signed paperback copies, plus extra-hardcover editions of both books, personally inscribed by me.

---
[Read Decoding the Deep State](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=d0235126a5&e=eb86c99a95)
| Every dollar makes a difference. Every action you take helps protect America First values, bring truth to light, and hold those responsible accountable. Together, we can Decode the Deep State and fight for the America we believe in.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
Robert J. Antonellis Email:Robert@Spirit-Rising.com Phone:857-360-7856Support the mission: [www.givesendgo.com/RobertAntonellis](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=4736f24681&e=eb86c99a95)
---
[Stand with Trump—Donate Now!](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=11d3820417&e=eb86c99a95)

**About the Author**
Robert J. Antonellis is an investigative researcher and author based in Massachusetts. He is dedicated to exposing hidden connections in American history, uncovering the truth behind political figures, tragic events, and unresolved mysteries. With a particular focus on New England’s pivotal role in shaping the nation's legacy, Robert’s work seeks to restore justice, preserve truth, and shine a light on stories left untold.

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Marxist Hijacking?
body:
Something is seriously wrong in our nation’s schools

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b39a081a474e424dbce9f99a1e29eec0&_e=rgJbfO0tN7Uh2iX5LTOipT44DvOEGBZe0BiEZXv7ST5Tzt8ywms1W47dNJbZlc5KtrudyleJkEL0p8TB-76g3QrRrQtiVsOJcF6ISRgi7t4Pme1OAQG4qLv1cZGGxGg3RPueq1wC-iqf66ddf6P3fgabx9ApC1KCQEOALneb4Wu_gQ2JwohSoG1W-SczR15lKJOzQdYnCGkKAMCcTQZd6WdV-NaPWSCitEAXd_-oUKYdk2m5FMUBE8yCmW2vNTKV98q8hoWcJSTTithGExJ6KSQIou4oYsoVllMViaEYGz722UNqPlaqQLd2VJ1ZHnH2JVD_6o6ONfFUlbLKcvkhudhcoQldkFeI14fEw4wxeVgqmk-inZfY3_xf5po_kzo73ZShzioxG8sHsK9ZKTlzGw%3D%3D)
---
| | Have you followed the latest coming from college and university campuses in America?

In 2024, revolutionary leftists and rent-a-mob organizations funded by progressive billionaires occupied elite universities across the country.

Many of these universities canceled classes and commencement due to pro-terror protests. Police have arrested students and even professors at several institutions due to violence!

That's why I need to hear from you right away. What do you think about all of this?
**Could you please take a few minutes to complete our National Survey on Higher Education and let me know your thoughts[today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b39a081a474e424dbce9f99a1e29eec0&_e=rgJbfO0tN7Uh2iX5LTOipT44DvOEGBZe0BiEZXv7ST5Tzt8ywms1W47dNJbZlc5KtrudyleJkEL0p8TB-76g3QrRrQtiVsOJcF6ISRgi7t4Pme1OAQG4qLv1cZGGxGg3RPueq1wC-iqf66ddf6P3fgabx9ApC1KCQEOALneb4Wu_gQ2JwohSoG1W-SczR15lKJOzQdYnCGkKAMCcTQZd6WdV-NaPWSCitEAXd_-oUKYdk2m5FMUBE8yCmW2vNTKVz0GIHuLt_lFMf1EPPAvbFfpPljeIaZ7Jv2i31akiOJqVD1Pjx0poL8gwthiIUdWCDT3ogpOQK0HVV_fHZDVfIQtn2f0pw02DMAXGnNfmURlFiR4UArPEgZnfT6CRUMIh_jVqBYm_jv56HTV0_A9Wtg%3D%3D)?**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b39a081a474e424dbce9f99a1e29eec0&_e=rgJbfO0tN7Uh2iX5LTOipT44DvOEGBZe0BiEZXv7ST5Tzt8ywms1W47dNJbZlc5KtrudyleJkEL0p8TB-76g3QrRrQtiVsOJcF6ISRgi7t4Pme1OAQG4qLv1cZGGxGg3RPueq1wC-iqf66ddf6P3fgabx9ApC1KCQEOALneb4Wu_gQ2JwohSoG1W-SczR15lKJOzQdYnCGkKAMCcTQZd6WdV-NaPWSCitEAXd_-oUKYdk2m5FMUBE8yCmW2vNTKV7i6KbuQIIKsUEOlVuaOvTsnuPp-DSI-Y06DRTc1KYRqj0CgePGZp_m2LhINpCVi5u_sqHUMjpiitBVjonOW1k6UozEV3vbJSe2bjKMOKifSMFlrK7OPYl-6-BCl_aajSyM0HhscqxckLRPCI97ncXA%3D%3D)

It’s no secret that these campus radicals get their inspiration from the student protestors of 1968...

Our country has changed a lot since that year. And I would say—and I think you agree—not for the better.

A big reason is that many of these radicals took over our education system...as professors, administrators, and government bureaucrats.

And they spread far-Left propaganda in our schools and culture with the help of big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars.

**Hillsdale College is one of the _only_ colleges in this country that hasn’t fallen into this madness. **

We are one of the _only_ colleges that teach young Americans—and millions of people around this country—what makes our country the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

**But in response to the violent mobs we see in far too many colleges and universities, we need YOUR HELP to do even more. We must reach and teach millions on behalf of liberty, far beyond Hillsdale’s campus. **

We refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly, in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

This independence frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations. It’s why our college is a place that seeks to DEFEND LIBERTY rather than OVERTHROW IT.

But it comes at a cost! We rely heavily on the generosity of friends like you to do our work.

So, would you consider chipping in to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide?

**You can teach millions** —everyone from the high school senior who takes a civics course in one of our K-12 classical schools using our **free** curriculum ...

...to the family who reads _Imprimis_ —our **free** digest of liberty—and engages in a lively discussion at the dinner table over what Heather Mac Donald, Victor Davis Hanson, or Christopher Rufo had to say ...

...to the grandparents who watch our **free** online courses on the Constitution and American history and tell stories to their grandchildren about the great heroes of liberty.

When elite schools are doing everything they can to destroy this country, you can change this country for the better—one person, one family, one community at a time.

So, after you take our survey, please consider supporting us once again.

Any gift you can give from **$10** , **$25** , **$35** , or even **$50** , if you’ve been especially blessed this year, will help us relentlessly pursue our mission on behalf of liberty—especially when our higher education is in crisis. But we need your help right away.

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on Higher Education** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b39a081a474e424dbce9f99a1e29eec0&_e=rgJbfO0tN7Uh2iX5LTOipT44DvOEGBZe0BiEZXv7ST5Tzt8ywms1W47dNJbZlc5KtrudyleJkEL0p8TB-76g3QrRrQtiVsOJcF6ISRgi7t4Pme1OAQG4qLv1cZGGxGg3RPueq1wC-iqf66ddf6P3fgabx9ApC1KCQEOALneb4Wu_gQ2JwohSoG1W-SczR15lKJOzQdYnCGkKAMCcTQZd6WdV-NaPWSCitEAXd_-oUKYdk2m5FMUBE8yCmW2vNTKVvJMxiUanLy5WjjO5ZOq805N6zYMib5apSma7mbvX9lTXTGkiwaPZeDeo63CA3OljnHjZxnxoXiiw7OruBHbAK_pQEebU0cjMhywn8eKC8C4dUJCp5bIOetHCKxLa4lzDnw3NKRGCn3tJPjjokP0c0g%3D%3D)

Thank you in advance for letting me know your thoughts.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ’01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars have helped far-Left activists, administrators, and bureaucrats take over elite colleges and universities. That’s why you see these places erupt in protests—and even violent mobs—that have led to canceled classes and commencements, and even the arrests of students and professors.

That’s why I’m asking you today to take Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on Higher Education**. It’ll only take a few minutes. You can find our survey at the secure link here:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b39a081a474e424dbce9f99a1e29eec0&_e=rgJbfO0tN7Uh2iX5LTOipT44DvOEGBZe0BiEZXv7ST5Tzt8ywms1W47dNJbZlc5KtrudyleJkEL0p8TB-76g3QrRrQtiVsOJcF6ISRgi7t4Pme1OAQG4qLv1cZGGxGg3RPueq1wC-iqf66ddf6P3fgabx9ApC1KCQEOALneb4Wu_gQ2JwohSoG1W-SczR15lKJOzQdYnCGkKAMCcTQZd6WdV-NaPWSCitEAXd_-oUKYdk2m5FMUBE8yCmW2vNTKVGnRjTdzS6qJ1PjhU3j2nQ-_-MdC51MNyNEMWEhD2uSyslDGCnBFGgkeMTR_nLB35ZTuESS2XxSuZQZnw7fCbi5mEv2277A1C1vzhM2NURvZL2bFzLiLGBcVYFzWLi4Pk8VukhsnRt6ZM0akJy2F9mA%3D%3D)**

Thanks again! [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=b39a081a474e424dbce9f99a1e29eec0&_t=ZcYmInBrVBJKY2piIoLLkbSZYLWPGRNqsomoCt0Y1c2fJwrfapXMmEodRuflTLYZ5omv6zbxyyYYQu52TMed8KtFHQFlyZNS2jsGzPpqD3LFazRhDhRRVxIear_zOJbw)

clean_body: Something is seriously wrong in our nation’s schools A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Have you followed the latest coming from college and university campuses in America? In 2024, revolutionary leftists and rent-a-mob organizations funded by progressive billionaires occupied elite universities across the country. Many of these universities canceled classes and commencement due to pro-terror protests. Police have arrested students and even professors at several institutions due to violence! That's why I need to hear from you right away. What do you think about all of this? Could you please take a few minutes to complete our National Survey on Higher Education and let me know your thoughts? It’s no secret that these campus radicals get their inspiration from the student protestors of 1968... Our country has changed a lot since that year. And I would say—and I think you agree—not for the better. A big reason is that many of these radicals took over our education system...as professors, administrators, and government bureaucrats. And they spread far-Left propaganda in our schools and culture with the help of big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars. Hillsdale College is one of the only colleges in this country that hasn’t fallen into this madness. We are one of the only colleges that teach young Americans—and millions of people around this country—what makes our country the freest and most prosperous nation in history. But in response to the violent mobs we see in far too many colleges and universities, we need YOUR HELP to do even more. We must reach and teach millions on behalf of liberty, far beyond Hillsdale’s campus. We refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly, in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This independence frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations. It’s why our college is a place that seeks to DEFEND LIBERTY rather than OVERTHROW IT. But it comes at a cost! We rely heavily on the generosity of friends like you to do our work. So, would you consider chipping in to help us reach and teach millions more citizens nationwide? You can teach millions —everyone from the high school senior who takes a civics course in one of our K-12 classical schools using our free curriculum ... ...to the family who reads Imprimis —our free digest of liberty—and engages in a lively discussion at the dinner table over what Heather Mac Donald, Victor Davis Hanson, or Christopher Rufo had to say ... ...to the grandparents who watch our free online courses on the Constitution and American history and tell stories to their grandchildren about the great heroes of liberty. When elite schools are doing everything they can to destroy this country, you can change this country for the better—one person, one family, one community at a time. So, after you take our survey, please consider supporting us once again. Any gift you can give from $10 , $25 , $35 , or even $50 , if you’ve been especially blessed this year, will help us relentlessly pursue our mission on behalf of liberty—especially when our higher education is in crisis. But we need your help right away. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on Higher Education , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you in advance for letting me know your thoughts. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars have helped far-Left activists, administrators, and bureaucrats take over elite colleges and universities. That’s why you see these places erupt in protests—and even violent mobs—that have led to canceled classes and commencements, and even the arrests of students and professors. That’s why I’m asking you today to take Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Higher Education. It’ll only take a few minutes. You can find our survey at the secure link here: Thanks again! | |

# [Affirmative Action Repeal & Rising White Supremacy](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153690258&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjkwMjU4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUzMzE5MzIsImV4cCI6MTczNzkyMzkzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bRL9ZVWd7JRJ3uM8jKo_ZirjcBtCjyXs4ZtCflaMhuw)
### The latest Harvard data is a daunting reminder that racist policies are not only systemic in our higher education systems--they're getting worse
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8e641MTMxHIQ2BDrEfBZc_g0uZTKR3VPn2sRru0LT7Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153690258)
The right wing assault on all things diversity related is full speed ahead. Whether its MAGA attacks on Critical Race Theory (CRT), Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI), or Affirmative Action (AA)--right wing MAGAs have waged an all out culture war on anything that makes them uncomfortable.
More than 35 states have attempted to ban, or [successfully banned CRT](https://substack.com/redirect/10a72c15-4144-4118-a7db-6ef27abe87b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). More than 30 states are trying to [do the same with DEI](https://substack.com/redirect/03f2e482-5e3c-44f8-a226-64f237325ddd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And since the [Supreme Court repealed Affirmative Action](https://substack.com/redirect/24a49157-b437-4e8a-b5e1-1f772fa423a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we are now seeing some hard data from Harvard University on the devastatingly racist impact it is having on higher education. **Let 's Address This.**
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8e641MTMxHIQ2BDrEfBZc_g0uZTKR3VPn2sRru0LT7Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153690258)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1cd730b-6265-4d08-8ea6-07d4d3d02ea0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: https://library.law.howard.edu/civilrightshistory/blackrights/desegregation
## New Data From Harvard Law
A new report shows that Harvard Law Black enrollment dropped by more than 50% since the Supreme Court banned affirmative action last year. Just 19 first-year Black students this fall, the lowest number since the 1960s. The Harvard Crimson [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/f247761e-8c97-4717-9eab-d082921b84c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> According to the data, which was submitted to the American Bar Association, the number of Black students enrolled in HLS's first-year class decreased from 43 students the previous year to 19. The number of Hispanic students also decreased from 63 to 32 students. Meanwhile, the number of Asian students in the 1L class climbed from 103 to 132 students.
First, a reminder that Asian plaintiffs, backed by right wing MAGA funders, pushed to repeal Affirmative Action, meritlessly arguing that it hurt their admission. This, despite the fact that evidence demonstrates that Affirmative Action [helps Asian admissions](https://substack.com/redirect/20f8fa62-3201-43f9-83a3-87c4def94b20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Likewise, consider that the 29 student increase among Asian students admitted corresponded with a combined 53 student decrease among Black and Hispanic students. In other words, a net decrease of 24 non-white students, and a roughly net increase of 24 white students.
MAGAs will no doubt argue that this is the logical result of admission based on meritocracy as opposed to based on Affirmative Action. Anyone making this argument is either deliberately dishonest, or hopelessly misinformed. And here are the facts why.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2d7caf8-6f18-42e0-8091-ecf89ca9321d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Who Did Affirmative Action Benefit?
We must first understand the history of who Affirmative Action benefitted _most_ --because it was not Black people. In reality, the demographic that benefitted most from Affirmative Action--more than Black, Indigenous, Latino, and Asian Americans _combined_ --are white women. As TIME Magazine [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/fb38dd5c-cfb9-4dc9-a239-b6fce98762a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> While people of color, individually and as groups, have been helped by affirmative action in the subsequent years, data and studies suggest women -- white women in particular -- [have benefited disproportionately](https://substack.com/redirect/c56081e7-32e8-4026-bb5a-4258642fefab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). According to [one study](https://substack.com/redirect/48c58ae4-8997-460d-8c39-1ef34493d666?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in 1995, 6 million women, the majority of whom were white, had jobs they wouldn't have otherwise held but for affirmative action. Another [study](https://substack.com/redirect/ea331f76-e37c-4fe2-a1cd-ebfe1b6e4d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shows that women made [more than 7X] greater gains in employment at companies that do business with the federal government, which are therefore subject to federal affirmative-action requirements. Even in the private sector, the advancements of white women eclipse those of people of color.
Likewise, we must understand that Affirmative Action was _never_ about accepting unqualified people (whether they were women or of color, or women of color). Affirmative Action was _always_ about ensuring underrepresented qualified people _also_ had a fair shot at acceptance.
## What Was the Actual Purpose of Affirmative Action?
Prior to Affirmative Action, universities and corporations systemically discriminated against non-white applicants for the entirety of American history up through Jim Crow. This is why even post Civil War, Black Americans were forced to build Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) to ensure Black children could attain education. When W.E.B. Dubois (1868-1963) made history in 1895 as the first Black PhD graduate of Harvard University, he famously and correctly said, "_The honor, I assure you, was Harvard 's_."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e12828f9-2a76-4b1b-974c-a673552ce1e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Carl Van Vechten, (C) Van Vechten Trust. Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University
Affirmative Action required universities and corporations to finally _also_ consider non-white applicants when making hiring decisions. To repeat, Affirmative Action did not force universities and corporations to accept unqualified women and Black people--it required them to _also_ consider qualified women and Black people. And the ample data backs up how such diversity has historically [benefitted the economy and innovation](https://substack.com/redirect/626d0066-e56f-4cf5-8fad-d1f9769c0c43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on a national and international level. And claims that we are somehow "post-racial" are backed not by facts or evidence, but meritless opinions.
## Let's ID the Real 'Unqualified Admission' Issue
Finally, if anyone truly objected to unqualified admissions or acceptances, they would have attacked and repealed Legacy Admissions, not Affirmative Action. The receipts make this clear. For example, while conservatives protested the 8% Black students at Harvard, Legacy Admissions and sports admissions accounted for 43% of white students accepted to Harvard. And shockingly, 75% of those students would _not_ have qualified or been accepted on merit. A [study](https://substack.com/redirect/6efcc8d0-e24f-4cca-bbdf-3e927bbe2a6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the National Bureau of Economic Research (NBER) confirms this, as does another by UCLA, which [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/03885fdc-f969-4ebc-a1f9-3bd7333fdd48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The UCR study cites[ research](https://substack.com/redirect/3bfb5cc2-30ea-4466-8854-12f492623d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that found 43% of Harvard's white students were admitted through what researchers termed an "ALDC" status (athletic, legacy, dean's preferences, and children of faculty) between 2014 and 2019, and that **75% of these students would have been rejected without their ALDC status**. Comparatively, less than 16% of Harvard's Black, Asian American, and Latino student were ALDC students.
In other words, if the conservative outrage was truly about the lack of meritocracy, their exclusive target should have been Legacy Admissions. Even if we go with the false claim that every single Black person admitted was admitted due to Affirmative Action and was unqualified, the number of those admissions still dwarfs in comparison to the unqualified white Legacy students admitted.
Yet, complete silence from conservatives on this fact. I cannot imagine why.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8e641MTMxHIQ2BDrEfBZc_g0uZTKR3VPn2sRru0LT7Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153690258)
## Conclusion
The repeal of Affirmative Action is another step by right wing conservatives to revive white supremacy, and the latest admissions data from Harvard Law further backs this up. Indeed, the facts do not lie. The movement to repeal Affirmative Action, or ban DEI, or demonize CRT--was never about merit and was never about applicant qualifications. It was always about reviving Jim Crow white supremacy. The scariest part is--so far--it is working. This is one more reason we must continue stay informed, active, and organized as people across racial and economic backgrounds to reject this extremism and demand meaningful justice.
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**

---|---|---

Conclusion The repeal of Affirmative Action is another step by right wing conservatives to revive white supremacy, and the latest admissions data from Harvard Law further backs this up. Indeed, the facts do not lie. The movement to repeal Affirmative Action, or ban DEI, or demonize CRT--was never about merit and was never about applicant qualifications. It was always about reviving Jim Crow white supremacy. The scariest part is--so far--it is working. This is one more reason we must continue stay informed, active, and organized as people across racial and economic backgrounds to reject this extremism and demand meaningful justice. Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Subscribe and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Squad up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After AIPAC and its super PACs spent an unprecedented $25 million in the
2024 Democratic primaries, we unfortunately lost Justice Democrats Rep.
Cori Bush and Rep. Jamaal Bowman from Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241227?refcode=em20241227-36268&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36268_1203867_NBL_y7&akid=36268%2E1203867%2ENBL_y7 ]I want to reflect on their legacies and bold leadership in Congress,
but before I do, will you pitch in a contribution to help Justice
Democrats recruit more working-class progressives like Cori and Jamaal to
run for office in 2026?

Cori and Jamaal’s primary losses were a major blow to the Democratic
Party, our progressive movement, and the people as a whole. Cori and
Jamaal were true champions of the working class, having worked as a nurse
and a school principal before challenging and defeating establishment
incumbents in 2020.

As two of the only Black, working-class representatives, they constantly
defied the status quo, worked tirelessly for justice and a better world,
and never backed down from a fight — which is exactly why the corporate,
right-wing, dark money machine spent so much to silence and unseat them.

Cori was our first Justice Democrat because she embodies the working-class
leadership we want to see at the center of the Democratic Party. She will
always be a model for what we're fighting for: everyday people using their
lived experiences to transform our nation. As Cori said in her farewell
address, “My life experiences may differ from many of my colleagues in
Congress, but beyond these walls, they are familiar to so many.”

During her congressional terms, Cori courageously shared her own stories
of facing homelessness, experiencing sexual assault, and having an
abortion. She put her pain into action by fighting for reproductive
justice for all, staging a sit-in on the Capitol steps to protect millions
of people from eviction, leading the call for a ceasefire in Gaza, and so
much more.

Similarly, Jamaal is one of the greatest champions for our kids and
families this Congress has ever seen. He secured historic investments in
gun violence prevention, health care, and climate action, and delivered
over $1 billion to his communities, including for housing, education, and
childcare.

Jamaal took on the tough fights, spoke up for the silenced, and never
compromised on the values that drive his radical optimism for what our
government can do for its people. Few leaders' joy is more contagious and
their rage more righteous, and we're forever grateful.

Cori and Jamaal will leave a hole in Congress that cannot be filled with
the two career politicians replacing them. We know they will keep up the
good fight in whatever they do next.

Though we’re losing these two progressive champions, we’re already
searching for more working-class candidates like them to challenge
corporate Democrats and carry on their fight for the people in the halls
of power.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241227?refcode=em20241227-36268&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36268_1203867_NBL_y7&akid=36268%2E1203867%2ENBL_y7 ]Help us Squad up and build the bloc in 2026: rush a grassroots donation
of $5 or more toward our $100,000 end-of-year goal before
December ends.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241227?refcode=em20241227-36268&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36268_1203867_NBL_y7&akid=36268%2E1203867%2ENBL_y7 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241227-36268-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36268_1203867_NBL_y7&akid=36268%2E1203867%2ENBL_y7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36268%2E1203867%2ENBL_y7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Peter — we’re reviewing our list of grassroots donors* from this year, and didn’t see your name on the list. This year, contributions from people like you helped power our work in some of the most consequential state-level races in the country to stop Republicans’ gerrymandering, defend fair election maps, and stay ready for the fights ahead. [**There’s still time to update your supporter record with a contribution to the NDRC and make the list of 2024 donors.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99368165/519698807/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_EOY24SupporterRecord_email_20241227-NDRC-Tier1-EOY24SupporterRecord_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241227-NDRC-Tier1-EOY24SupporterRecord_&utm_campaign=EOY24SupporterRecord&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkOGJiODYwLTk0YzQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xEOEu-tcGbuT8VjlTsgU5XiI7NgEGWnUQC7bUICC-gM=) | 2024 END-OF-YEAR

*The contribution history information in this email is based on our records associated with this email address. If you have donated with a different email address, via mail, or in another way — thank you so much!
The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political and electoral engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that the right people are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle.
Just this next year, we have opportunities such as state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania.
Together, we’ll ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair maps.
Thanks for fighting alongside us.
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

If you have donated with a different email address, via mail, or in another way — thank you so much! The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political and electoral engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that the right people are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle. Just this next year, we have opportunities such as state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania. Together, we’ll ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair maps. Thanks for fighting alongside us. | | Thank you all very much, from the bottom of my heart, for your prayers and well wishes. [**Now more than ever, I am determined to make sure that 2025 is a healthy New Year for all of us and am honored to keep fighting alongside the American people to Save Our Health Care. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368355/519699513/1582891121?s=12&source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) [**_Click here to watch a special message from Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368356/519699514/1582891121?s=12&source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368357/519699515/1582891121?s=12&source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)

\-------- Original Message ---------
[_**I just launched my LAST Save Our Health Care survey of the year – and I’ve selected you to be one of the FINAL grassroots Democrats to share your insights and help devise Democrats’ plan to STOP Donald Trump’s attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act and destroy our health care. I need 25,000 responses to build an accurate sample size with reliable results – will you please take 3 minutes to fill out my survey before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368358/519699517/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)
[**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368359/519699519/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) Trump tried and failed more than 60 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act – which 50 MILLION Americans rely on for direct coverage and which protects more than 140 MILLION Americans with preexisting conditions.
[**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368361/519699520/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) Folks like YOU hosted and attended 10,000 events to help people share their personal stories across the country – and we STOPPED him.
[**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368363/519699521/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) Democrats need to join together and step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again.
Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. [_**That’s why I’ve selected you to be one of the FINAL Democrats to complete my last survey of the year and share your thoughts. I need 25,000 responses before midnight to ensure reliable results and build a foolproof plan to stop Trump again. Please, I’m counting on your insight more than you could know. Will you submit your feedback before midnight? It will only take 3 minutes. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368364/519699522/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) **[NAME:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368365/519699523/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**[ID:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368366/519699527/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) **117907000 | **[PELOSI HEALTH CARE SURVEY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368367/519699528/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)**
---
Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care:
* 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately.
* 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage.
* Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26.
* Prescription drug prices would skyrocket.

I’ll be honest.
**[Passing the Affordable Care Act into law was the happiest day of official life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368370/519699529/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)**
Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier.
[_**With so much at stake, I’m asking you one final time. Together, Democrats STOPPED Trump’s disastrous plans to crush our health care during his first term. We can do it again – but only if grassroots supporters like you step up and share your insight. I need 25,000 responses to build a large enough sample size to ensure accurate results. Will you take 3 minutes to share your feedback and help us Save Our Health Care from Donald Trump and Republicans? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99368371/519699531/-487728681?source=20241227_em_pet_b2_np4c_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFlMTM4OS05NWM0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pVmRx6qYW14iiKEU-ZSDAmRfQmqjtk76RD18zyHJGw=&emci=f23d389a-6bc4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=4dae1389-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)
I’m looking forward to your response.
Thank you all very much for your well wishes. I am grateful for my care and good health and am honored to keep fighting alongside the American people to Save Our Health Care.

NANCY

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Folks like YOU hosted and attended 10,000 events to help people share their personal stories across the country – and we STOPPED him. Democrats need to join together and step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again. Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. dpwillis67@gmail.com 117907000 | Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care: 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately. 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage. Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26. Prescription drug prices would skyrocket. I’ll be honest. Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier. I’m looking forward to your response. Thank you all very much for your well wishes. I am grateful for my care and good health and am honored to keep fighting alongside the American people to Save Our Health Care. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99369006/519701442/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI1ZjAzMC05N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKKOamMVazFdbvkYqKe7jq8xlBanrSgbyS4fp-28oUQ=&emci=93e4259a-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=01b5f030-97c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535)_ ****
_Happy Holidays From INDems_
**** With the holiday season here, we wanted to wish all Hoosiers a very Happy Holidays no matter where you are or how you celebrate. We hope you get to spend the time with the ones you love, and safe travels for the New Year. ****_Federal Audit Shows State Lost Tens of Millions to Improper Medicaid Payments_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99369007/519701443/1392790755?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI1ZjAzMC05N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKKOamMVazFdbvkYqKe7jq8xlBanrSgbyS4fp-28oUQ=&emci=93e4259a-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=01b5f030-97c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99369008/519701444/1392790755?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI1ZjAzMC05N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKKOamMVazFdbvkYqKe7jq8xlBanrSgbyS4fp-28oUQ=&emci=93e4259a-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=01b5f030-97c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535) With the state facing an unexpected $1 billion shortfall for Medicaid funding over the last year, many families are at risk to lose their care in the new year. To make matters worse, a federal audit has found that Indiana spent $56 million in improper Medicaid payments. This is only costing care for the most vulnerable Hoosiers, including the 13,000 seniors on a state waiting list for benefits. It’s time for more oversight and transparency. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99369009/519701445/49357274?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI1ZjAzMC05N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKKOamMVazFdbvkYqKe7jq8xlBanrSgbyS4fp-28oUQ=&emci=93e4259a-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=01b5f030-97c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99369010/519701446/49357274?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI1ZjAzMC05N2M0LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKKOamMVazFdbvkYqKe7jq8xlBanrSgbyS4fp-28oUQ=&emci=93e4259a-95c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=01b5f030-97c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535) With the government facing a shut down over the Holidays, Democrats went to work to make sure crucial programs were protected and that the government remained open to start the new year. While Republicans bicker and fight over their small majority, Democrats are putting in the work to get results for Hoosiers and the American people. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Happy Holidays From INDems With the holiday season here, we wanted to wish all Hoosiers a very Happy Holidays no matter where you are or how you celebrate. We hope you get to spend the time with the ones you love, and safe travels for the New Year. Federal Audit Shows State Lost Tens of Millions to Improper Medicaid Payments With the state facing an unexpected $1 billion shortfall for Medicaid funding over the last year, many families are at risk to lose their care in the new year. To make matters worse, a federal audit has found that Indiana spent $56 million in improper Medicaid payments. This is only costing care for the most vulnerable Hoosiers, including the 13,000 seniors on a state waiting list for benefits. It’s time for more oversight and transparency. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. With the government facing a shut down over the Holidays, Democrats went to work to make sure crucial programs were protected and that the government remained open to start the new year. While Republicans bicker and fight over their small majority, Democrats are putting in the work to get results for Hoosiers and the American people. ** Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 9th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News FOX59: WTIU: WIMS: WKDQ: Indiana Capital Chronicle: WBAA: * FOX59: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
