name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Happy New Year to you and your family.... | | | I've been looking through so many photos of Terence this holiday season. Here are some from when he was just a little boy.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Thinking of the New Year is especially hard as I continue to fight for Terence and worry if he'll be taken from me.And though you and I have never met, **[I'm praying you'll help me save him.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3TM-xs81LAef_HkIQB7QP6_iMYMTFkvX96g2CmU2xKvvZLFKCg8ZWZm3JGned5N6sU7PVGHz3Y0WNNOl6BBJx0RrWGWhrXREaxhqgSsdpXbX3k9d6zS2B0RWGoDI-IQ-E7eyqve1NOrboc97P-wGPmw%3D%3D)** I've been looking through so many photos of Terence this holiday season. Here are some from when he was just a little boy.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3HTRNXnHRt7l1yb22ouDVLaqXtmTa8tnbnLHgdOztndSXppKBCM9xmeMDJ4x4FTOqQofEuWZfNzw2Dk7yRaKrU1Q78EH4wRYC5vF36n3VNZyYEP64ixGl0CeQ_Q6xY4w5luDn3rov0VMo3zCxjVA_fw%3D%3D)
---
He always dreamed of following in his dad's footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.I was so proud that night.Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder --** murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.****[**I'm praying you will help me save my son**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3ZfgRO8DKKmCK9cKLRR5IkqvBSjtaXIQIEkXcJ2X9q8Bzfa5KsapNT7uPpVIeoJMcobWS0jyVDn7crT5aN4EgR_cjzPLG35UXriZhtufoBQTxk1D4FvdEa3aP-4hkAdFzm87sVR7E9fN2ZSsehx2o5g%3D%3D)** \-- **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long -- including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.Then it happened.Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with ****Second-Degree Murder.****Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced -- to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.** Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!But unless Terence's appeal is successful, he's going to prison -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help today.The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence's defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops -- and their families -- at their lowest moments.We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence's conviction.So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone: **[**Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3EMX-7pLY5_NREXR_5Qug_nlf2h9B1mSsWPGCAxGeTUwQLk61zXkm74C9Ofg9uTUnFadyqVKQsisgUoQSW8CZqBhog5lOxYbfdsMGiQBmfHJemJ_ZcTJYh7V69MEyiJpDf-9xWvt-uAUffekjubI_bg%3D%3D)**I'm not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself -- though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.**[**But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence's appeal over the next 12 months.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3PNE5gkmXK3UgUfgEHi2wyv28CO9JvOlbALJFTMtImMmO5h5fNKLSoDb4YTTNfFuwL_5_6lu8ay6VUMtBvl-Fl0xHrfk9Y_fbwvqKOivGxjPyGtng7PtoWPp61yXshUKDtfhDTdcMYtD_L_FrUEQoYQ%3D%3D)** In addition to Terrence's appeal, LELDF will be funding the defense for three different wrongly accused officers who are set to go to trial within the first three months of the New Year. **[**So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3MLIhE-W5FktHkN9tQwy4Rd6ZurByrLmXnjx4QKbBo9Ihsuhm5ZQ-N4wVLr4B-OzA3NhRaA0uKhgN4Qg_YJKb-grVjmifj1DZ9jYuuG5jmoG12-v0ppNhrXOAPvz9ecm9HpLZ1GNn_Rvc8Te-Ef8dBQ%3D%3D)****Any amount -- $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more -- will help.** And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly since **their crucial end of year goal must be met before January 1st.** Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.I wish a happy New Year to you and your family and ask that you please pray for mine.
---
Gratefully,
---
Patti Reilly
---
P.S. Don't get me wrong, I'm thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn't have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence's conviction overturned, it's going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**Will you please help save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5b4df04a8a84380bb2cb07d6fe14df9&_e=9tatRku67kKRQS6WjUOWl8tO682y0Wpw7wY6hbvirq0p1khNg1dydwfjdiP1kxISkZ2Bk1E4n6jH_X4TTiun3AeHA-qL0p4z2YjMg3-vRfOs7XZSer1z1aR92w4A7xtsPcgwwsl55eXvkqpVVdUSwv8WX0mRcM0SMWrpXhyk4M69p_6WfnPIiZUk2M5HE_p1xFpmzWG6u8znJQILBNMIpTaMOpw6GSEkOFb4sPNsLl55Q3JDoRq2BRw__bZhZPo3kCRC4n6BLYg06_QuvxIf2_6BuP_IhEosxKVzegdbKUinQRms6BhJ0T4WRuIfRWXX7wKz83ZKnLtiY076i1UAeTh5955cvQsbN8zQEQwI3o05ew5HSVvK7JXWON0_Ryk_o_diaPgbCVmMrAYGmFyoMw%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence's conviction overturned, it's going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
If standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b35ed34bd7b6412187c2d79353a3d15d&_e=5CV9fKD_kaeJ7ZaYdvD-nChkgHI4R1nLO3sLzTezv6G3yyqghGzBQOB1X-tie2jpTYxZWW2m2qAUOyjxPgLU60DCpZvh2F_xILHsIpVx_SEb25XhHGMRCZeJukFWVf_rrFit2hhML-Bbn_Vk0AzFYWld07LHjj2YB_oPu3eApTw5IElkb3ztFQdbindnL0heiqkSKZpXIUl_7fBN-TjLrvV3CJUvETDM4glrQhgjRNWgCfXJNnei9sa_BmNeQSk0OkXwrHaDEemex9kGy-yVtPJq36S54_Gb4Rl2I7QC7bUA4Oz66UiP-Se67BwQHFcMS3FXK6_Pa29wXAc0oIU4C6t6dFu-bybHmqepI7Tr4ZpxsXKmlkkmvFQTQWYamDddcEkoYloN6QjALynCwQDoCD3HcrJ7xs_QJe-FiqywzCg%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b35ed34bd7b6412187c2d79353a3d15d&_e=5CV9fKD_kaeJ7ZaYdvD-nChkgHI4R1nLO3sLzTezv6G3yyqghGzBQOB1X-tie2jpTYxZWW2m2qAUOyjxPgLU60DCpZvh2F_xILHsIpVx_SEb25XhHGMRCZeJukFWVf_rrFit2hhML-Bbn_Vk0AzFYWld07LHjj2YB_oPu3eApTw5IElkb3ztFQdbindnL0heiqkSKZpXIUl_7fBN-TjLrvV3CJUvETDM4glrQhgjRNWgCfXJNnei9sa_BmNeQSk0qZBe4hAnlBcbW0BmapEL5uxKADUNwmGd5ioIKtngiy0HaAKWUPXDEJPdJ2aPcI78TrbrPURfQfEez8M_i23vW5zxpfg0ukTaDi4qNUZ6z1F72wbVNLtVLfooOcEX2XIoSsW5Jf7bnmiXp74cThQVU6pCxlUkuKusbc4f0ZgyJf0%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b35ed34bd7b6412187c2d79353a3d15d&_e=5CV9fKD_kaeJ7ZaYdvD-nChkgHI4R1nLO3sLzTezv6G3yyqghGzBQOB1X-tie2jpTYxZWW2m2qAUOyjxPgLU60DCpZvh2F_xILHsIpVx_SEb25XhHGMRCZeJukFWVf_rrFit2hhML-Bbn_Vk0AzFYWld07LHjj2YB_oPu3eApTw5IElkb3ztFQdbindnL0heiqkSKZpXIUl_7fBN-TjLrvV3CJUvETDM4glrQhgjRNWgCfXJNnei9sa_BmNeQSk0zv14rm4yYZLLggB6EHMDxmk99iKrZQVuhFIvjfG80Hm3upEKflEr_EPM4utTz18mhLvnxG1fYlrDEYq6XWZzgnQyib8is7fkj8Cp_wXp4FlgYAUvpNKHNATzoNWh0NrP3Tc2S5RnZHTovQ0u3McqI9z_2rvvpHTVTV9Clm5qOd8%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b35ed34bd7b6412187c2d79353a3d15d&_e=5CV9fKD_kaeJ7ZaYdvD-nChkgHI4R1nLO3sLzTezv6G3yyqghGzBQOB1X-tie2jpTYxZWW2m2qAUOyjxPgLU60DCpZvh2F_xILHsIpVx_SEb25XhHGMRCZeJukFWVf_rrFit2hhML-Bbn_Vk0AzFYWld07LHjj2YB_oPu3eApTw5IElkb3ztFQdbindnL0heiqkSKZpXIUl_7fBN-TjLrvV3CJUvETDM4glrQhgjRNWgCfXJNnei9sa_BmNeQSk0lf9SVJ5j72msZgsSRks42n8dVpz0VvqyXc1aLgdW2VIIBlZ1BCuvRCNqmpB2_XnUpY5pLPFFK9fnFZjHExa89ZTq0ZD2n0tk_KZ7BgWcUZKmldht2-ll4_-lqu8EBZu9RW_gcGiz8SFD0ZhIQjUWviyM02dPed9W8wN-Jkt8_nE%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b35ed34bd7b6412187c2d79353a3d15d&_e=5CV9fKD_kaeJ7ZaYdvD-nChkgHI4R1nLO3sLzTezv6G3yyqghGzBQOB1X-tie2jpTYxZWW2m2qAUOyjxPgLU60DCpZvh2F_xILHsIpVx_SEb25XhHGMRCZeJukFWVf_rrFit2hhML-Bbn_Vk0AzFYWld07LHjj2YB_oPu3eApTw5IElkb3ztFQdbindnL0heiqkSKZpXIUl_7fBN-TjLrvV3CJUvETDM4glrQhgjRNWgCfXJNnei9sa_BmNeQSk0JVpW7DWNAMkKRYGxH7WbBm4NF81v8pYNc7byI0sOmlx1JnLKkEvSkUQ-x68ZLsx3iT0EBh6T7fdhDoakyamMEpQI0UWUH7k9X-P43XHYl_8cet8ffDgByQFlGiGpv-b4Q0bkvf7R8OZQQNG7VYa3TkT9AQdswwCE5gHFIMy47Qg%3D)**

[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d9c275c0c75d4cff9d64b5a6f66e4930&_e=y8QE2h7TMiWbOCu-tWPDQ3CCTbXOSw_27HeNtdgcSbAslel8pkaEZHe7vXNsv9W6P8_caSLt_Ajfu3sBin6riLnXutPc6enDqtY6ZnL3noWCwon2bU3Cka998iVc_4jw-YlHktxpVmTXaK1C2LxSmCoW2jGMDfu26DVR8o4_zR6Q3XG9zvU5o9_jh76mTA_aPGe3mI8hehZnt7jmWKGHLk37VzoYHWqw1QKq6hQ12R_wy5VZ07EwyEfhxWInjdDt_p8lfT1zuz4IgIphqstiTw%3D%3D)
---
Sen. Katie Britt has added a fourth feather to her senatorial hat.

Britt, already a member of the Senate Appropriations, Banking, and Rules committees, will serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee in the 119th Congress.

The Judiciary Committee evaluates all judicial nominations for the federal judiciary, including the Supreme Court, and has broad jurisdiction over several legislative areas—including immigration and issues related to our Constitution.

“I am proud my Republican colleagues selected me to serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee and am honored to have the opportunity to serve under the leadership of incoming Chairman Chuck Grassley,” Britt said in a statement. “I will work tirelessly to bring Alabama’s conservative values to the forefront of the committee’s decisions, especially when evaluating nominees for the federal judiciary and safeguarding the God-given rights and individual liberties protected by the U.S. Constitution.”
---
[**READ MORE >>**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d9c275c0c75d4cff9d64b5a6f66e4930&_e=y8QE2h7TMiWbOCu-tWPDQ3CCTbXOSw_27HeNtdgcSbAslel8pkaEZHe7vXNsv9W6P8_caSLt_Ajfu3sBin6riLnXutPc6enDqtY6ZnL3noXLKvrGJD_scSKaxsRDa1eToaeeIeRoHsjiLITbW6Yqfpn7_hL3hAG2SLZ9J0YvUNMfTpl8WLGfDwAKneRhkCrwHvzk_So94CidotGYktiD4GO3cvg7nKjMhoGkj7nj0t1QxM-MlPqeWOtMAzoIMT65EtP6R0avkE0t-hfOGQbmxw%3D%3D)

| | **U.S. Senator Katie Britt secures more than $1 billion for Alabama’s military installations, families in 2025 NDAA**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d9c275c0c75d4cff9d64b5a6f66e4930&_e=y8QE2h7TMiWbOCu-tWPDQ3CCTbXOSw_27HeNtdgcSbDNDndpWkK__R4RCMYbFctwfKkvSQ1WsSoMNK-uEqriBUvliE-5aPS40lMVmxAClvAiLBNc5HPDxbxAVci2IptHoYZ1oTxA82DPyjfBxiIaEnRV9cSOSFt3ZuyyK0jHBu0zQA2kdwS9iDKrPTtZj-lby2QtRSF0uCSym9VDj0dC2ysFIRbe6s4SiW_gMQyvjb0_BeIhwu-iQEOImB4W0uDGv5J1W_CnKQVY2DyrtBk73gVsSc1fggsSPdMBos5MTSipeGkH8DSbHPle3FZ7sHLePnz6UgAIoRGQ4ADD9XHPihbrGPknTB5SmQYbCXqpqsY%3D)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt hailed the passage of the Fiscal Year 2025 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), passed late last week as lawmakers depart Washington for the Christmas holiday.

Britt and top lawmakers are celebrating provisions that deepen Alabama’s role as a cornerstone of America’s defense infrastructure while delivering historic support for servicemembers and their families. Sen. Britt personally advocated for and secured key funding and provisions benefiting Alabama’s military installations, defense industry, and the men and women of the Armed Forces.

“The FY25 NDAA ensures the Yellowhammer State remains at the forefront of America’s defenses while modernizing our military’s cutting-edge capabilities and assets, so our warfighters remain the best equipped, trained, and prepared in the world,” Sen. Britt said after its passage.
---

U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-AL) has announced that she has voted in support of the American Relief Act of 2025, legislation that would continue funding the government through March of 2025 amidst a potential shutdown as well as provide critical assistance for Alabama’s family farmers.

“The American people overwhelmingly chose President Trump to get America back on track, and it is vital Congress support him. Keeping the government open through March 14 will give the Trump Administration the opportunity to shape funding for the remainder of Fiscal Year 2025 when Republicans are in control of both chambers of Congress. This will allow us to better reign in wasteful spending while prioritizing the needs of hardworking Americans,” continued the Senator.

“The American Relief Act will also ensure our brave border patrol agents and service members aren’t worried about missing a paycheck this Christmas season. I look forward to Congress finally getting back to regular order so we can end CRs and omnibuses while avoiding these chaotic moments of political brinksmanship moving forward.”
---

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Britt named to Senate Judiciary Committee Sen. Katie Britt has added a fourth feather to her senatorial hat. Britt, already a member of the Senate Appropriations, Banking, and Rules committees, will serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee in the 119th Congress. The Judiciary Committee evaluates all judicial nominations for the federal judiciary, including the Supreme Court, and has broad jurisdiction over several legislative areas—including immigration and issues related to our Constitution. “I am proud my Republican colleagues selected me to serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee and am honored to have the opportunity to serve under the leadership of incoming Chairman Chuck Grassley,” Britt said in a statement. “I will work tirelessly to bring Alabama’s conservative values to the forefront of the committee’s decisions, especially when evaluating nominees for the federal judiciary and safeguarding the God-given rights and individual liberties protected by the U.S. Constitution.” | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt secures more than $1 billion for Alabama’s military installations, families in 2025 NDAA U.S. Senator Katie Britt hailed the passage of the Fiscal Year 2025 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), passed late last week as lawmakers depart Washington for the Christmas holiday. Britt and top lawmakers are celebrating provisions that deepen Alabama’s role as a cornerstone of America’s defense infrastructure while delivering historic support for servicemembers and their families. Sen. Britt personally advocated for and secured key funding and provisions benefiting Alabama’s military installations, defense industry, and the men and women of the Armed Forces. “The FY25 NDAA ensures the Yellowhammer State remains at the forefront of America’s defenses while modernizing our military’s cutting-edge capabilities and assets, so our warfighters remain the best equipped, trained, and prepared in the world,” Sen. Britt said after its passage. | | Britt votes to support Alabama farmers and President Trump U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-AL) has announced that she has voted in support of the American Relief Act of 2025, legislation that would continue funding the government through March of 2025 amidst a potential shutdown as well as provide critical assistance for Alabama’s family farmers. “The American people overwhelmingly chose President Trump to get America back on track, and it is vital Congress support him. Keeping the government open through March 14 will give the Trump Administration the opportunity to shape funding for the remainder of Fiscal Year 2025 when Republicans are in control of both chambers of Congress. This will allow us to better reign in wasteful spending while prioritizing the needs of hardworking Americans,” continued the Senator. “The American Relief Act will also ensure our brave border patrol agents and service members aren’t worried about missing a paycheck this Christmas season. Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| | Dear Peter, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a500233ea5f04277825849b100f2a1cf&_e=SrcKdGAF3xQhMxrwXJZvgTWPfwT2mtBeg_7DX_7a0wGdViqHL3AebLfp_kDN67psky8r8SjvoXfUXGEJp2kYR667CICqMylTA8KBtqBLt4Ud1QzYmAwbS4m3PxyPM3r26TUKonVKtdg-9V-kRLq9MOS9d7ONgZnCncMFYpzrxnEx6P-1xykpSdCFdY34mCSXr2tDOwM0Vuahz9aqE4RmQwcJmQpJhuhOeCy95HVisf5ftZJfb8ofJfEEhFp8BzA83UZjxxhORf0MCnT-KfKJMIDuCuR9w23P789V7HFPL0agMQB0m2smGNP5CzxtjWmlb-ppGLIp3YtWzI1LL3MJPVDtwHzEx-45A2HUZCbpvWUR76JI0SwKfHnwQ4aVWqDs0p-_RKqoo-TjWq9GZurNpMqDtQxhDC0OdYavbDI8s8ivYQIcAo2xldG773lUM2izvmSTtKZuQN9El1TNvzaorg%3D%3D)
---
| | It was partly due to my parents' unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a500233ea5f04277825849b100f2a1cf&_e=SrcKdGAF3xQhMxrwXJZvgTWPfwT2mtBeg_7DX_7a0wGdViqHL3AebLfp_kDN67psky8r8SjvoXfUXGEJp2kYR667CICqMylTA8KBtqBLt4Ud1QzYmAwbS4m3PxyPM3r26TUKonVKtdg-9V-kRLq9MOS9d7ONgZnCncMFYpzrxnEx6P-1xykpSdCFdY34mCSXr2tDOwM0Vuahz9aqE4RmQwcJmQpJhuhOeCy95HVisf5ftZJfb8ofJfEEhFp8BzA83UZjxxhORf0MCnT-KfKJMIDuCuR9w23P789V7HFPL0Za5tf9LROkzshxi_vqnQ7C3Tvkh9B4cshpYKwP3UEf2JronV6RoxgsoTq2c7j2I18wUS3okTxvHZC9f0bqQjLlZhfLb5MZP3QGhje8-OHePdCNNnvENknmI7ZWBrjtkCY0rHZPNCQ-ouKHDHfbnm0DCH1-2DGUXfVkHlfMvrcZEQ%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---

clean_body: | | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. | | Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water. | | Dear Peter, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water. | | | It was partly due to my parents' unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, not faith. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called Brave Books. as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage, | | Bethany Hamilton Professional Surfer and Mother | | | P.S. I've set aside a small number of copies of "Surfing Past Fear" just for the friends of Brave Books. Thank you for helping America's children learn that God "has not given them a spirit of fear!" (2 Timothy 1:7) -- Bethany | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 |

subject: We won’t beat around the bush
